It enables seamless creation, publishing, and maintenance of APIs with features like Json5/Mockjs-based data modeling, automated testing, mock server with expectations, and support for importing from Postman, HAR, and Swagger. With a rich plugin ecosystem and code generation tools, it enhances API collaboration and productivity in enterprise environments.

metadata.name: 996.ICU
metadata.description: Repo for counting stars and contributing. Press F to pay respect to glorious developers.

summary.zh: 996.ICU 是一个由程序员发起的倡议，旨在揭露和抵制中国科技行业盛行的 '996' 工作制（早9点至晚9点，每周6天），倡导劳动者权益保护。项目通过开源社区收集侵权企业黑名单、推广反996许可证，并推动建立尊重员工权益的工作文化。
summary.en: 996.ICU is a developer-led initiative exposing and resisting the '996' work schedule (9am-9pm, 6 days/week) in China's tech industry. It builds an open-source blacklist of violators, promotes the Anti-996 License, and advocates for worker rights through community-driven transparency and legal tools.

metadata.name: awesome-cheatsheets
metadata.description: 超级速查表 - 编程语言、框架和开发工具的速查表，单个文件包含一切你需要知道的东西 :zap:

summary.zh: 该项目是专为开发者设计的中文速查表集合，涵盖编程语言（如 Bash、Python、Go、JavaScript）、开发工具（如 Git、Gdb、Tmux）和文本编辑器（如 Vim、Emacs）的核心语法与命令，每个速查表均为单个文件，便于快速查阅，解决日常开发中频繁查阅文档的问题。
summary.en: This project provides a curated collection of Chinese cheatsheets for developers, covering programming languages (Bash, Python, Go, JavaScript), development tools (Git, Gdb, Tmux), and text editors (Vim, Emacs). Each cheatsheet is a single-file reference for quick lookup, eliminating the need to search scattered documentation.

metadata.name: Jike-Metro
metadata.description: :metro: 即刻 Ⓙ SDK

summary.zh: Jike Metro 🚇 是一个即刻（Jike）平台的 Python SDK，提供用户信息获取、动态浏览、内容发布、收藏管理、评论互动等全套接口，支持流式数据拉取与自动化操作，适用于开发者快速集成即刻生态功能。
summary.en: Jike Metro 🚇 is a Python SDK for the Jike platform, offering comprehensive APIs for user profiles, news feeds, content creation, collections, comments, and interactions. It supports streaming data and automation, enabling developers to integrate Jike's ecosystem efficiently.

metadata.name: mmh
metadata.description: Nothing, just a simple ssh tool.

summary.zh: mmh 是一个轻量级 SSH 管理工具，提供便捷的远程主机连接与命令执行功能，适合运维场景下的快速访问。支持配置管理与批量操作，界面简洁，适合日常使用。
summary.en: mmh is a lightweight SSH management tool designed for quick remote host access and command execution. It supports configuration management and batch operations, featuring a simple interface ideal for routine system administration tasks.

metadata.name: ao
metadata.description: Elegant Microsoft To-Do desktop app

summary.zh: Ao 是一款优雅的开源 Microsoft To-Do 桌面应用，支持深色/黑色/琥珀色主题、紧凑模式、全局快捷键、列表导航及跨平台使用，覆盖 120 余国用户，提供高度可定制界面与自动夜间模式，通过 GitHub Sponsors 获得社区支持。
summary.en: Ao is an elegant, unofficial, open-source Microsoft To-Do desktop app used globally, featuring dark themes, compact mode, global shortcuts, list navigation, scalable UI, and auto-night mode, with community-driven development and support via GitHub Sponsors.

metadata.name: mall
metadata.description: mall项目是一套电商系统，包括前台商城系统及后台管理系统，基于Spring Boot+MyBatis实现，采用Docker容器化部署。 前台商城系统包含首页门户、商品推荐、商品搜索、商品展示、购物车、订单流程、会员中心、客户服务、帮助中心等模块。 后台管理系统包含商品管理、订单管理、会员管理、促销管理、运营管理、内容管理、统计报表、财务管理、权限管理、设置等模块。

summary.zh: mall 是一个完整的电商系统，包含基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis 的前台商城和后台管理系统，支持 Docker 容器化部署。前台涵盖商品展示、搜索、购物车、订单流程等核心电商功能；后台提供商品、订单、会员、促销等全链路管理。集成 Elasticsearch、Redis、RabbitMQ 等主流中间件，适合企业级电商项目开发与学习。
summary.en: Mall is a full-featured e-commerce system with front-end portal and back-end management, built on Spring Boot + MyBatis and deployed via Docker. It includes product display, search, cart, checkout, and user management on the frontend, and supports comprehensive backend operations like inventory, orders, promotions, and analytics. Integrated with Elasticsearch, Redis, RabbitMQ, and other modern technologies, it serves as a robust platform for enterprise-level e-commerce development and learning.

metadata.name: algorithm-visualizer
metadata.description: :fireworks:Interactive Online Platform that Visualizes Algorithms from Code

summary.zh: Algorithm Visualizer 是一个交互式在线平台，通过可视化代码将算法动态呈现，帮助学习者和开发者直观理解算法执行过程。支持多种编程语言，提供丰富的教程与可视化效果，适用于教学与算法研究。
summary.en: Algorithm Visualizer is an interactive online platform that brings algorithms to life through code visualization. It supports multiple programming languages and offers engaging educational content, making algorithm learning intuitive and effective for students and professionals.

metadata.name: flaskblog
metadata.description: person blog powered by flask

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Flask 开发的个人博客系统，支持文章发布与展示，提供完整的用户认证与数据库管理功能。项目包含传统单应用结构和蓝图（Blueprint）分离结构两种实现方式，适合学习 Flask 基础与模块化开发。
summary.en: A personal blog built with Flask, featuring article publishing, user authentication, and database management. Includes both monolithic and Blueprint-based modular architectures, ideal for learning Flask fundamentals and application structuring.

metadata.name: The-Flask-Mega-Tutorial-zh
metadata.description: 翻译自Miguel Grinberg的blog https://blog.miguelgrinberg.com 的2017年新版The Flask Mega-Tutorial教程

summary.zh: 本仓库是 Miguel Grinberg 《The Flask Mega-Tutorial》2017年版的完整中文翻译，涵盖从基础到部署的全栈开发实践。通过23章系统讲解 Flask 框架核心功能，包括模板、表单、数据库、用户认证、Ajax、全文搜索、国际化及多平台部署（Linux/Heroku/Docker），适合中高级开发者构建复杂 Web 应用。
summary.en: This repository contains the complete Chinese translation of Miguel Grinberg's 2017 'The Flask Mega-Tutorial', covering full-stack web development with Flask from basics to deployment. Spanning 23 chapters, it systematically teaches core Flask features including templating, forms, databases, authentication, Ajax, full-text search, internationalization, and multi-platform deployment (Linux/Heroku/Docker), ideal for intermediate to advanced developers building complex web applications.

metadata.name: mint-ui
metadata.description: Mobile UI elements for Vue.js

summary.zh: Mint UI 是一个专为 Vue 2.0 设计的移动端 UI 组件库，提供丰富的移动端常用组件，支持全局注册和按需引入，具备轻量、模块化、易集成的特点，适用于快速开发移动端 Web 应用。
summary.en: Mint UI is a mobile-first UI component library for Vue 2.0, offering a suite of mobile-optimized components. It supports global registration and modular imports, with features like lightweight design, modularity, and easy integration, ideal for rapid mobile web development.

metadata.name: FiraCode
metadata.description: Free monospaced font with programming ligatures

summary.zh: Fira Code 是一款专为程序员设计的免费等宽字体，支持编程连字（ligatures），可自动将常见符号组合（如 `->`、`<=`、`:=`）渲染为单一视觉单元，提升代码可读性。字体完全兼容 ASCII，保留源码结构，同时提供丰富的字形变体、样式集和 Unicode 支持，适用于编辑器、终端及数学公式显示。
summary.en: Fira Code is a free monospaced font featuring programming ligatures that render multi-character sequences like `->` or `:=` as single glyphs, enhancing code readability. It maintains ASCII compatibility while offering stylistic sets, character variants, and full Unicode support for editors, terminals, and mathematical notation.

metadata.name: dopamine
metadata.description: Dopamine is a research framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms.

summary.zh: Dopamine 是谷歌开发的强化学习研究框架，专为快速原型设计和算法实验而设计。它支持 DQN、Rainbow、SAC 等主流算法，基于 JAX 实现，强调易实验性、灵活开发和可复现性，适用于学术研究和算法验证。
summary.en: Dopamine is a research framework by Google for rapid prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms. It supports DQN, Rainbow, SAC, and other state-of-the-art agents, implemented in JAX, with a focus on ease of experimentation, flexibility, and reproducibility for speculative research.

metadata.name: free-programming-books
metadata.description: :books: Freely available programming books

summary.zh: 该项目是免费编程书籍的权威集合，涵盖多语言、多领域的开源学习资源，支持动态搜索和静态网站访问，由非营利组织 Free Ebook Foundation 维护，是全球最受欢迎的开源项目之一。
summary.en: This repository aggregates freely available programming books across multiple languages and domains, featuring dynamic search and static site access. Maintained by the non-profit Free Ebook Foundation, it is one of GitHub's most popular open-source projects.

metadata.name: actionview
metadata.description: An issue tracking tool based on laravel+reactjs for small and medium-sized enterprises, open-source and free, similar to Jira.

summary.zh: ActionView 是一款基于 Laravel+React 的开源问题跟踪工具，专为中小型企业设计，功能类似 Jira。支持敏捷看板、甘特图、自定义工作流、权限管理、LDAP 集成、GitLab/GitHub Webhook 联动等，提供清晰代码结构和 Docker 部署方案，适用于轻量级项目管理和团队协作。
summary.en: ActionView is an open-source issue tracking tool built with Laravel (backend) and React+Redux (frontend), targeting SMEs as a Jira alternative. It supports agile boards, Gantt charts, custom workflows, LDAP integration, GitLab/GitHub webhooks, and Docker deployment, offering clean code and extensibility for team collaboration.

metadata.name: shadowsocks-android
metadata.description: A shadowsocks client for Android

summary.zh: Shadowsocks Android 是一款基于 Kotlin 开发的开源代理客户端，支持 Android 和 Chrome OS 平台。该应用提供安全、快速的科学上网功能，采用 Shadowsocks 协议加密传输数据，兼容多种服务器配置，具备自动切换、流量统计等实用功能，适用于需要隐私保护和网络访问的场景。
summary.en: Shadowsocks Android is an open-source proxy client built with Kotlin for Android and Chrome OS. It enables secure and fast internet access using the Shadowsocks protocol, supporting multiple server configurations, automatic switching, and traffic monitoring for enhanced privacy and network freedom.

metadata.name: vscode-syncing
metadata.description: :zap: Sync all of your VSCode settings across multiple devices, supports any VSCode variant.

summary.zh: VSCode Syncing 是一款强大的 VSCode 扩展，支持跨设备同步用户设置、键位绑定、扩展、语言包和代码片段至 GitHub Gist。支持增量同步、自动安装扩展、代理配置，并兼容 VSCodium、Cursor 等 VSCode 衍生版本。
summary.en: VSCode Syncing is a powerful extension that synchronizes all VSCode settings—including user settings, keybindings, extensions, snippets, and locales—across multiple devices via GitHub Gist. It supports incremental sync, automatic extension management, proxy configuration, and works with any VSCode variant like VSCodium and Cursor.

metadata.name: zsh-autosuggestions
metadata.description: Fish-like autosuggestions for zsh

summary.zh: zsh-autosuggestions 为 zsh 终端提供类 Fish 的实时命令建议功能，基于历史记录和补全引擎智能生成建议。支持自定义高亮样式与建议策略，可无缝集成 Oh My Zsh，显著提升命令行输入效率与用户体验。
summary.en: zsh-autosuggestions delivers Fish-like real-time command suggestions for zsh, leveraging history and completion engines. Features customizable highlighting and multiple suggestion strategies, integrates seamlessly with Oh My Zsh to boost terminal productivity.

metadata.name: spaceship-prompt
metadata.description: 🚀✨ Minimalistic, powerful and extremely customizable Zsh prompt

summary.zh: Spaceship Prompt 是一款极简、强大且高度可定制的 Zsh 终端提示符，提供丰富的信息展示，包括 Git 状态、多语言运行时环境、包版本、电池电量、Kubernetes 上下文等，支持深度自定义配置，显著提升终端使用体验。
summary.en: Spaceship Prompt is a minimalistic, powerful, and highly customizable Zsh prompt that displays essential information like Git status, runtime environments (Node.js, Python, etc.), package versions, battery level, and Kubernetes context, with extensive customization options for enhanced terminal productivity.

metadata.name: hiper
metadata.description: 🚀 A statistical analysis tool for performance testing

summary.zh: Hiper 是一款专为性能测试设计的统计分析工具，支持通过 Chrome 浏览器自动化采集页面加载时间、DNS 查询、TCP 连接等关键性能指标，提供详细的统计报告与可视化分析，适用于 Web 性能监控与优化。
summary.en: Hiper is a statistical analysis tool for performance testing that automates Chrome browser interactions to collect key metrics like DNS lookup, TCP connection, and page load times, delivering detailed reports and visualizations for web performance monitoring and optimization.

metadata.name: AndroidDevTools
metadata.description: 收集整理Android开发所需的Android SDK、开发中用到的工具、Android开发教程、Android设计规范，免费的设计素材等。

summary.zh: AndroidDevTools 是一个专注于 Android 开发的一站式资源平台，提供 Android SDK、开发工具、设计规范、教程及素材的整合。涵盖从开发环境搭建、代码生成、资源处理到设计协作的全流程工具链，支持 Android Studio、Gradle 等主流技术栈，助力开发者高效构建高质量应用。
summary.en: AndroidDevTools is a comprehensive platform for Android developers, offering curated resources including Android SDK, development tools, design guidelines, tutorials, and free assets. It covers the full development lifecycle—from environment setup and code generation to resource optimization and UI design—supporting major tools like Android Studio and Gradle to enhance productivity.

metadata.name: alfred-workflows
metadata.description: :metal: A collection of Alfred 3 and 4 workflows that will rock your world

summary.zh: 该仓库提供一系列 Alfred 3/4 工作流工具，涵盖系统休眠控制、浏览器兼容性查询、色彩格式转换、开发文档检索、域名搜索及表情符号查找等实用功能，通过快捷键快速调用，显著提升 macOS 开发者和效率用户的日常操作体验。
summary.en: This repository offers a curated collection of Alfred 3/4 workflows for macOS, including system sleep control, browser compatibility checks, color format conversion, developer documentation search, domain lookup, and emoji search, all accessible via keyboard shortcuts to boost productivity.

metadata.name: yu-writer.site
metadata.description: A feature-rich, efficient text editor - Web Site

summary.zh: Yu Writer Site 是一个功能丰富、高效的文本编辑器网站，提供现代化的写作体验。支持 Markdown 编辑、实时预览、多主题切换和本地存储，适用于内容创作者和开发者。项目采用轻量级架构，注重性能与用户体验。
summary.en: Yu Writer Site is a feature-rich, efficient text editor web application offering a modern writing experience. It supports Markdown editing, live preview, multi-theme switching, and local storage, ideal for content creators and developers. Built with a lightweight architecture focused on performance and user experience.

metadata.name: proxyee-down
metadata.description: http下载工具，基于http代理，支持多连接分块下载

summary.zh: Proxyee Down 是一款基于 HTTP 代理和 Netty 的高性能开源下载工具，支持多线程分块下载，具备扩展功能以满足特殊需求。项目因 Java 客户端开发限制暂停维护，作者计划用 Go + Flutter 重写以打造跨平台、低内存占用的下一代下载器。
summary.en: Proxyee Down is an open-source, high-speed HTTP downloader built on HTTP proxy and Netty, supporting multi-threaded chunked downloads and extensible plugins. The project is paused due to Java client limitations, with plans to rewrite using Go + Flutter for cross-platform, low-memory usage.

metadata.name: Aria2
metadata.description: 突破百度云限速合集，另外附带Baidu-Go、Tampermonkey、Proxyee-down教程。从此云端女友从不断线，有了这个它，忘掉那个她!

summary.zh: 该仓库提供Aria2下载工具及百度网盘破解限速方案，集成BaiduPCS-Go、Tampermonkey脚本和Proxyee-down等工具，支持多平台下载加速，实现百度云资源高速下载，解决限速问题。
summary.en: This repository offers Aria2 download tools and solutions to bypass Baidu Cloud speed limits, integrating BaiduPCS-Go, Tampermonkey scripts, and Proxyee-down for multi-platform accelerated downloads, enabling high-speed access to Baidu Cloud resources.

metadata.name: shadowsocks-rss
metadata.description: ShadowsocksR update rss, SSR organization https://github.com/shadowsocksr

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR C# 版本4.8.0 是一个全能代理工具，支持Socks4/4a/5、HTTP协议，具备节点统计、连接管理、UDP-over-TCP、多重代理及自定义协议插件功能。支持服务器订阅与自动更新，提供GPG签名校验确保安全性，适用于绕过网络限制与隐私保护。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR C# v4.8.0 is a comprehensive proxy tool supporting Socks4/4a/5, HTTP, with features like node statistics, connection management, UDP-over-TCP, multi-hop proxying, and custom protocol plugins. It supports server subscription with GPG signature verification for security, ideal for bypassing censorship and enhancing privacy.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-next
metadata.description: Elegant and powerful theme for Hexo.

summary.zh: NexT 是一款优雅且功能强大的 Hexo 主题，专为静态博客设计。支持多风格（Muse、Mist、Pisces、Gemini），集成 PJAX 加速、CDN 配置、第三方插件扩展等高级功能，注重代码高亮、响应式布局与 SEO 优化，适合技术博客与个人站点。
summary.en: NexT is an elegant and powerful theme for Hexo, designed for static blogs. It offers multiple styles (Muse, Mist, Pisces, Gemini), supports advanced features like PJAX navigation, CDN integration, and third-party plugins, with strong emphasis on code highlighting, responsive design, and SEO optimization for tech blogs and personal sites.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksX-NG
metadata.description: Next Generation of ShadowsocksX https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-iOS

summary.zh: ShadowsocksX-NG 是 Shadowsocks 的下一代 macOS 客户端，提供高性能代理功能，支持 SSR 协议，适用于科学上网与隐私保护。项目因监管要求已停止维护，原代码存档于 shadowsocksr-backup 仓库。
summary.en: ShadowsocksX-NG is the next-generation macOS client for Shadowsocks, offering high-performance proxy capabilities with SSR protocol support for secure browsing and privacy protection. The project has been discontinued due to regulatory reasons, with archived code in the shadowsocksr-backup repository.

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR for Windows 是一款基于 ShadowsocksR 协议的跨平台代理工具，专为绕过网络审查设计。支持多服务器配置、系统级代理、PAC自动更新及UDP流量转发，提供完整的隐私保护和网络访问解决方案。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR for Windows is a cross-platform proxy tool based on the ShadowsocksR protocol, designed to bypass internet censorship. It supports multiple server configurations, system-wide proxy, automatic PAC updates, and UDP forwarding, offering comprehensive privacy protection and network access.

metadata.name: VirtualXposed
metadata.description: A simple app to use Xposed without root, unlock the bootloader or modify system image, etc.

summary.zh: VirtualXposed 是一款基于 VirtualApp 和 epic 技术的 Android 应用，无需 root、解锁 bootloader 或修改系统镜像即可运行 Xposed 模块。支持 Android 5.0~10.0，适用于绝大多数非系统级修改的模块，如广告拦截、功能增强等。用户可在虚拟环境中独立安装应用与模块，并通过内置重启功能快速生效，极大提升了 Android 系统的灵活性与可玩性。
summary.en: VirtualXposed is an Android app built on VirtualApp and epic that enables Xposed module usage without root, bootloader unlock, or system image modification. It supports Android 5.0–10.0 and works with most non-system modules like ad blockers and app enhancements. Users can install apps and modules in a virtual environment and reboot within the app for instant activation, offering a safe and flexible way to customize Android without system-level changes.

metadata.name: TensorFlow-Examples
metadata.description: TensorFlow Tutorial and Examples for Beginners (support TF v1 & v2)

summary.zh: 本项目为 TensorFlow 初学者提供全面且结构化的学习路径，涵盖从基础操作到高级模型的完整示例。通过 Jupyter Notebook 和源码结合的方式，清晰展示 TF v1 与 v2 的实现差异，重点突出现代 API 最佳实践（如 layers、estimator、dataset），适合希望快速上手 TensorFlow 并掌握其核心功能的开发者。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive, beginner-friendly tutorial for TensorFlow, featuring clear examples in both notebooks and source code for TF v1 and v2. It covers fundamental operations to advanced models, emphasizing modern API practices such as layers, estimator, and dataset. Ideal for developers seeking hands-on experience with TensorFlow's core functionalities.

metadata.name: DOClever
metadata.description: 做最好的接口管理平台

summary.zh: DOClever 是一款专为中小型团队打造的商业化开源接口管理平台，完全免费并支持内网部署。它提供接口全生命周期管理、可视化调试、Mock 服务、自动化测试、团队协作及多格式导入导出等功能，支持 HTTP/HTTPS 协议及多种参数类型，具备版本控制与快照能力，助力高效开发协作。
summary.en: DOClever is a commercial open-source API management platform, fully free and supportable for on-premise deployment. It offers comprehensive API lifecycle management, visual debugging, Mock services, automated testing, team collaboration, and import/export in multiple formats. Supporting HTTP/HTTPS protocols and various parameter types, it features version control, snapshots, and seamless integration with Postman, Swagger, and RAP.

metadata.name: PerfectWindows
metadata.description: Power Keys - 解放 Windows 和 macOS 使用效率

summary.zh: Power Keys 是一款专为 Windows 和 macOS 设计的效率工具，通过精心设计的无冲突快捷键组合，显著提升系统操作效率。其核心价值在于统一跨平台快捷键逻辑，降低学习成本，适用于日常办公、开发及多任务处理场景。
summary.en: Power Keys is an efficiency tool for Windows and macOS that boosts productivity through well-designed, non-conflicting keyboard shortcuts. It unifies cross-platform shortcut logic, reducing learning curves for developers and power users in daily workflows and multitasking.

metadata.name: go-best-practice
metadata.description: Trying to complete over 100 projects in various categories in golang.

summary.zh: 《Go实战开发》是一本通过100+实战项目系统学习Go语言的书籍，涵盖Web开发、网络编程、数据库操作等全场景。作者astaxie结合PHP开发经验，以项目驱动方式帮助开发者掌握Go核心特性与工程实践，配套开源代码与社区支持，适合中高级开发者进阶。
summary.en: 《Go实战开发》 is a project-driven book teaching Go through 100+ practical projects across categories like web development and networking. Authored by astaxie, it leverages PHP experience to guide developers in mastering Go's core features and engineering practices, with open-source code and community support for advanced learning.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: 个人博客

summary.zh: 个人技术博客，涵盖算法、数据结构、计算机基础、分布式系统等核心领域，包含MIT 6.824课程笔记、Go/PHP语言实践、Pulsar消息队列及自研库设计文档，是系统性技术知识沉淀平台。
summary.en: Personal technical blog covering core computer science topics including algorithms, data structures, distributed systems (MIT 6.824 course notes), Go/PHP programming, Pulsar MQ, and custom library design docs, serving as a comprehensive knowledge repository.

metadata.name: SQLAdvisor
metadata.description: 输入SQL，输出索引优化建议

summary.zh: SQLAdvisor 是美团点评 DBA 团队开发的 SQL 索引优化工具，基于 MySQL 词法解析分析 WHERE、JOIN 等条件，智能生成索引优化建议。已在内部广泛应用，支持开源协作与持续迭代，提供完整文档与社区支持。
summary.en: SQLAdvisor is an index optimization tool developed by Meituan-Dianping's DBA team, analyzing SQL queries via MySQL's native lexer to generate intelligent index suggestions based on WHERE, JOIN, and aggregation conditions. Widely used internally, it supports open-source collaboration with comprehensive documentation and community feedback channels.

metadata.name: homebrew-cask-upgrade
metadata.description: A command line tool for upgrading every outdated app installed by Homebrew Cask

summary.zh: brew-cask-upgrade 是一个命令行工具，用于升级通过 Homebrew Cask 安装的过时 macOS GUI 应用。它提供交互式界面、细粒度控制及自动更新检测，支持批量升级、排除自动更新应用、清理缓存等功能，是 Homebrew Cask 生态中提升应用管理效率的关键工具。
summary.en: brew-cask-upgrade is a CLI tool to upgrade outdated macOS GUI apps installed via Homebrew Cask. It offers interactive prompts, granular control, auto-update detection, batch upgrades, and features like cleanup and quarantine bypass, enhancing the efficiency of managing Homebrew Cask applications.

metadata.name: synergy-stable-builds
metadata.description: Downloads : https://brahma-dev.github.io/synergy-stable-builds/

summary.zh: Synergy 是一款开源的跨平台输入共享工具，允许用户通过一套键鼠无缝控制多台计算机。支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux，提供简洁的配置与编译流程，适用于多设备办公场景，强调自由使用与二次开发。
summary.en: Synergy is an open-source, cross-platform tool that enables sharing a single mouse and keyboard across multiple computers. It supports Windows, macOS, and Linux, with straightforward configuration and build processes, ideal for multi-device productivity environments.

metadata.name: MacAssistant
metadata.description: Google Assistant for macOS!

summary.zh: MacAssistant 是一款将 Google Assistant 集成到 macOS 的 Swift 应用，支持语音交互与系统控制。通过 Google Assistant SDK 实现自然语言处理，支持天气查询、日程管理等常见指令，需用户自行配置 OAuth 凭证。项目采用 Swift 4.2 开发，基于 gRPC 和 Protocol Buffers，提供跨平台语音助手解决方案。
summary.en: MacAssistant is a Swift-based macOS app integrating Google Assistant via the Google Assistant SDK, enabling voice interaction and system control. It supports natural language queries like weather and agenda, requiring user-provided OAuth credentials. Built with Swift 4.2, gRPC, and Protocol Buffers, it offers a cross-platform voice assistant solution for macOS.

metadata.name: awesome-mac
metadata.description:  This project is dedicated to collecting high-quality macOS software and organizing them systematically by different categories for easy search and use.

summary.zh: Awesome Mac 是一个精选 macOS 优质软件的资源库，涵盖开发工具、设计软件、效率应用等多个类别。项目规模庞大，支持多语言（含中文、韩文），并提供 Docker 镜像和 npm 包形式发布。包含开源、免费、App Store 应用等标签分类，鼓励用户贡献与反馈。
summary.en: Awesome Mac is a curated collection of premium macOS software across categories like development tools, design apps, and productivity utilities. It features a vast scale, multilingual support (including Chinese and Korean), and is available via Docker and npm. The list categorizes apps by open-source, freeware, and App Store status, encouraging community contributions.

metadata.name: tmt-workflow
metadata.description: A web developer workflow used by WeChat team based on Gulp, with cross-platform supported and solutions prepared.

summary.zh: Tencent tmt-workflow 是基于 Gulp 的前端自动化开发工作流工具，专为微信团队设计，支持跨平台（macOS & Windows）。提供 Less/Sass 编译、CSS 雪碧图、图片压缩、SVG 内联、JS 合并、LiveReload 实时刷新、FTP 部署等完整解决方案，集成 px2rem、WebP 适配等现代前端优化方案，现已迁移至 Feflow 项目。
summary.en: Tencent's tmt-workflow is a Gulp-based frontend development workflow tool designed for the WeChat team, offering cross-platform support (macOS & Windows). It provides comprehensive automation features including Less/Sass compilation, CSS sprites, image compression, SVG inlining, JS bundling, LiveReload, and FTP deployment. Integrated solutions for px2rem, WebP, and MD5 reversion are included. The project has been migrated to Feflow.

metadata.name: WeChatTweak
metadata.description: A command-line tool for tweaking WeChat - 首款微信 macOS 客户端撤回拦截与多开 🔨

summary.zh: WeChatTweak 是一款专为 macOS 设计的命令行工具，支持微信客户端撤回消息拦截、阻止自动更新及多开功能，通过二进制补丁技术实现原生应用增强，显著提升微信使用灵活性与隐私保护。
summary.en: WeChatTweak is a command-line tool for macOS that enables WeChat enhancements including message recall blocking, auto-update prevention, and multi-instance support via binary patching, offering advanced customization for native app workflows.

metadata.name: WeChatPlugin-MacOS
metadata.description: 微信小助手

summary.zh: WeChatPlugin-MacOS 是一款 macOS 平台的微信小助手工具，旨在提升用户工作效率。它通过自动化消息处理、快捷回复、群管理等功能，简化日常沟通流程，支持多账号管理，适用于需要高效处理微信消息的 macOS 用户。
summary.en: WeChatPlugin-MacOS is a macOS assistant tool for WeChat, designed to enhance productivity. It automates message handling, enables quick replies, and supports group management, streamlining daily communication. Ideal for macOS users managing multiple WeChat accounts efficiently.

metadata.name: Aerial
metadata.description: Apple TV Aerial Screensaver for Mac

summary.zh: Aerial 是一款 macOS 屏保程序，基于 Apple TV 的 Aerial 系列航拍视频，展示纽约、旧金山、夏威夷、中国等地的壮丽景色。支持多语言地理特征标注、实时天气与预报，开源协作，兼容 Apple Silicon。
summary.en: Aerial is a macOS screensaver featuring Apple's Aerial video collection, showcasing aerial views of locations like New York, San Francisco, and Hawaii. It supports multilingual overlays, real-time weather data, and is open-source with community contributions.

metadata.name: easy-mock
metadata.description: A persistent service that generates mock data quickly and provids visualization view.

summary.zh: Easy Mock 是一个快速生成模拟数据并提供可视化界面的持久化服务，支持团队协作、Swagger 导入、Mock.js 语法及自定义响应配置，适用于前后端分离开发中的接口模拟与测试。
summary.en: Easy Mock is a persistent service that quickly generates mock data with a visualization interface, supporting team collaboration, Swagger import, Mock.js schema, and customizable responses for frontend-backend development and API testing.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksX-NG
metadata.description: Next Generation of ShadowsocksX

summary.zh: ShadowsocksX-NG 是 ShadowsocksX 的下一代 macOS 客户端，采用 Swift 重写 GUI 并集成 shadowsocks-libev 的 ss-local 组件。支持 SIP003 插件、AEAD 加密、PAC 自动更新及二维码分享服务器配置，提供手动代理模式以兼容其他应用。通过 launchd 后台运行 ss-local，提升稳定性并简化依赖管理。
summary.en: ShadowsocksX-NG is the next-generation macOS client for Shadowsocks, rebuilt with Swift and integrated with ss-local from shadowsocks-libev. It supports SIP003 plugins, AEAD ciphers, PAC auto-updates, QR code sharing, and manual proxy mode. By running ss-local as a background service via launchd, it improves stability and simplifies dependency management.

metadata.name: kafka-python
metadata.description: Python client for Apache Kafka

summary.zh: kafka-python 是一个功能完整的 Python 客户端库，用于与 Apache Kafka 分布式流处理系统交互。它高度模拟官方 Java 客户端的行为，支持高吞吐量的消息生产与消费，提供消费者组、偏移量提交、事务消息、消息头、反序列化等高级功能，适用于构建实时数据管道和流处理应用。
summary.en: kafka-python is a fully-featured Python client for Apache Kafka, designed to closely mimic the official Java client. It supports high-level asynchronous message production and consumption, consumer groups, offset commits, transactional messages, message headers, and deserialization, making it ideal for building real-time data pipelines and streaming applications.

metadata.name: wechat_jump_game
metadata.description: 微信《跳一跳》Python 辅助

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于 Python 的微信小游戏《跳一跳》自动化辅助工具，通过图像识别技术自动识别棋子位置与目标方块，结合 ADB 控制手机屏幕实现精准跳跃。支持手动校准与自动识别两种模式，利用像素距离计算按压时长，帮助用户高效刷分登顶排行榜。
summary.en: This project is a Python-based automation tool for WeChat's mini-game 'Jump Jump'. It uses image recognition to detect the player's position and target blocks, calculates the required press duration based on pixel distance, and controls the screen via ADB to achieve precise jumps, enabling automatic high-score gameplay.

metadata.name: you-get
metadata.description: :arrow_double_down: Dumb downloader that scrapes the web

summary.zh: You-Get 是一个轻量级命令行工具，用于从互联网下载视频、音频和图片内容，尤其适用于无官方下载渠道的网站。支持 YouTube、优酷等主流平台，具备流媒体播放、字幕下载及网页图片抓取功能，依赖 Python 和 FFmpeg，是开源的网页内容抓取工具。
summary.en: You-Get is a lightweight command-line utility to download media (videos, audios, images) from the web when no official download option exists. It supports platforms like YouTube and Youku, enables streaming playback, subtitle extraction, and image scraping, and relies on Python and FFmpeg as core dependencies.

metadata.name: lemon
metadata.description: Lemon is open source, embeddable, lightweight programming language http://www.lemon-lang.org

summary.zh: Lemon 是一种开源、轻量级、可嵌入的编程语言，提供完整的编译器与虚拟机实现。支持 POSIX 和 Windows 平台，内置 OS 与 Socket 模块，适用于嵌入式系统和脚本扩展。项目包含源码、核心库、文档与测试用例，采用 MIT 许可证。
summary.en: Lemon is an open-source, embeddable, lightweight programming language featuring a complete compiler and virtual machine. It supports POSIX and Windows, includes built-in OS and socket modules, and is ideal for embedded systems and scripting. The project provides source code, core library, documentation, and tests under the MIT license.

metadata.name: sentry
metadata.description: Developer-first error tracking and performance monitoring

summary.zh: Sentry 是一款开发者优先的错误追踪与性能监控平台，提供实时问题检测、错误追踪、性能分析和用户行为回放功能，支持 20+ 编程语言和框架的官方 SDK，助力团队快速定位并修复代码缺陷。
summary.en: Sentry is a developer-first error tracking and performance monitoring platform that enables real-time issue detection, error tracing, performance insights, and user session replay. It supports 20+ languages via official SDKs, helping teams debug and resolve problems faster.

metadata.name: NeteaseCloudMusicApi
metadata.description: 网易云音乐 Node.js API service

summary.zh: 网易云音乐 Node.js API 服务，提供音乐播放、歌单获取、用户信息查询等功能，支持无版权限制访问。因版权政策调整，项目已停止维护，建议用户注意合规使用。
summary.en: Netease Cloud Music Node.js API service offering music playback, playlist retrieval, and user data access. Now deprecated due to copyright policy changes; users advised to ensure compliance.

metadata.name: weweChat
metadata.description: 💬 Unofficial WeChat client built with React, MobX and Electron.

summary.zh: weweChat 是基于 React、MobX 和 Electron 开发的非官方微信客户端，支持桌面端多平台运行，具备消息防撤回、桌面通知、键盘快捷键、拖拽发送文件、批量消息发送等实用功能，界面现代化且兼容 macOS 窗口毛玻璃效果。
summary.en: weweChat is an unofficial WeChat desktop client built with React, MobX, and Electron. It supports desktop notifications, message recall blocking, keyboard shortcuts, drag-and-drop file sending, and batch messaging, offering a modern interface with macOS vibrancy effects.

metadata.name: mxnet
metadata.description: Lightweight, Portable, Flexible Distributed/Mobile Deep Learning with Dynamic, Mutation-aware Dataflow Dep Scheduler; for Python, R, Julia, Scala, Go, Javascript and more

summary.zh: Apache MXNet 是一个高效灵活的深度学习框架，支持符号式与命令式编程混合使用，具备动态依赖调度器实现自动并行化，适用于 Python、R、Julia、Scala、Go、JavaScript 等多种语言。其核心优势在于跨平台部署能力、多 GPU 及分布式扩展性，同时提供图优化层提升执行效率与内存利用率，广泛用于工业级 AI 系统开发。
summary.en: Apache MXNet is a deep learning framework optimized for efficiency and flexibility, supporting mixed symbolic and imperative programming with a dynamic dependency scheduler for automatic parallelization. It supports multiple languages including Python, R, Julia, Scala, Go, and JavaScript. MXNet excels in cross-platform deployment, multi-GPU and distributed scalability, and features graph optimization for fast, memory-efficient execution, making it ideal for production AI systems.

metadata.name: maptalks.js
metadata.description: A light and plugable JavaScript library for integrated 2D/3D maps.

summary.zh: maptalks-gl 是一个基于 WebGL 和 WebGPU 驱动的全新地图引擎，专为高性能 2D/3D 地图可视化而设计。支持矢量切片、3DTiles 和 GLTF 格式，提供丰富的 3D 分析功能与交通模拟动画，兼容旧版 maptalks API，便于迁移。
summary.en: maptalks-gl is a WebGL and WebGPU-driven map engine for high-performance 2D/3D mapping. It supports vector tiles, 3DTiles, and GLTF formats, offering advanced 3D analysis and traffic simulation. With backward-compatible APIs, it enables seamless migration from legacy maptalks.

metadata.name: ieaseMusic
metadata.description: 网易云音乐第三方

summary.zh: ieaseMusic 是一款基于 Electron、React 和 MobX 构建的优雅网易云音乐第三方桌面客户端，支持跨平台（macOS/Linux/Windows）、高音质（FLAC）、键盘操作、桌面通知、Last.fm 听歌记录同步、多平台音源修复（如 QQ 音乐、虾米等）、社交分享及微信扫码登录，集成 Alfred 3 工作流，提供现代化 UI 与下载功能。
summary.en: ieaseMusic is an elegant third-party Netease Music desktop app built with Electron, React, and MobX. It supports cross-platform use (macOS/Linux/Windows), high-quality FLAC audio, keyboard shortcuts, desktop notifications, Last.fm scrobbling, multi-source link fixing (e.g., QQ, Xiami), social sharing, WeChat login, and includes an Alfred 3 workflow for quick access.

metadata.name: Resume-template-for-Coder
metadata.description: Resume template for Coder 适合程序员的简历模板 🎉

summary.zh: 专为程序员设计的简历模板，基于Sketch.app制作，提供多版本（2021/2019/2018/2017/中文版）设计，突出技术能力与项目经验，支持一键导出PDF，适配不同求职场景。
summary.en: A professional resume template designed for coders, built with Sketch.app. Offers multiple versions (2021/2019/2018/2017/Chinese) to showcase technical skills and project experience, with one-click PDF export for job applications.

metadata.name: English-level-up-tips
metadata.description: An advanced guide to learn English which might benefit you a lot 🎉 .  离谱的英语学习指南/英语学习教程/英语学习/学英语

summary.zh: 《离谱的英语学习指南》是一份系统化的英语进阶学习指南，结合作者自身高分经验与科学方法，涵盖词汇、听力、阅读、口语、写作及AI辅助等模块，强调语言学习的自然性与趣味性，提供从CEFR等级到实用技巧的完整路径，助力学习者高效突破瓶颈。
summary.en: This advanced English learning guide offers a comprehensive, scientifically-informed approach to mastering English through structured modules on vocabulary, listening, reading, speaking, writing, and AI tools. It emphasizes natural language acquisition and personal enjoyment, providing a clear roadmap from CEFR levels to practical strategies for learners aiming to break through plateaus.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: A super blog lite -- just one page. use vue with github api !

summary.zh: 基于 GitHub Issue 的单页极简博客系统，使用 Vue 和 GitHub API 构建，支持自定义配置与 CI/CD 自动化部署，适合个人知识管理与轻量级内容展示。
summary.en: A minimalist single-page blog built with Vue and GitHub API, powered by GitHub Issues for content. Supports custom configuration and CI/CD via GitHub Actions for static site deployment.

metadata.name: coeditor
metadata.description: Yet Another Pair Programming Package for Atom.

summary.zh: Coeditor 是一个为 Atom 编辑器设计的实时协同编程插件，支持多用户无冲突文本编辑、语法高亮同步、文件操作同步及项目级协作感知。通过自建 WebSocket 服务器实现客户端间状态同步，适用于远程结对编程场景，需统一配置换行符以避免内容不一致。
summary.en: Coeditor is a real-time collaborative programming plugin for Atom, enabling conflict-free text editing, syntax highlighting sync, file operations, and project awareness across multiple users. It relies on a custom WebSocket server for state synchronization, ideal for remote pair programming, with strict line ending consistency requirements across clients.

metadata.name: github-hans
metadata.description: [废弃] {官方中文马上就来了} GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

summary.zh: GitHub 汉化插件为英文基础薄弱用户提供中文界面支持，通过 Tampermonkey 实现 GitHub 全站翻译，帮助新手快速上手。插件每日自动更新翻译内容，支持 Chrome、Opera 等主流浏览器，并提供手动安装指南。
summary.en: GitHub Hans is a Tampermonkey-based plugin that translates GitHub's full interface into Chinese, aiding users with limited English proficiency. It auto-updates translations daily and supports major browsers like Chrome and Opera, with clear installation instructions.

metadata.name: Flarum
metadata.description: Flarum - 优雅自由的 PHP 轻社区

summary.zh: Flarum 是一款基于 PHP 和 Mithril 框架的自由开源轻量级论坛软件，以简洁、响应式设计和高度可扩展性为核心特色。它提供完整的 API 支持与模块化扩展机制，适合快速搭建现代化社区平台，采用 MIT 许可证确保完全开放。
summary.en: Flarum is a free, open-source forum software built with PHP and the Mithril JavaScript framework, emphasizing simplicity, responsiveness, and extensibility. It offers a modular architecture with comprehensive APIs for customization, ideal for building modern online communities under MIT license.

metadata.name: pyecharts
metadata.description: 🎨 Python Echarts Plotting Library

summary.zh: pyecharts 是一个基于 Apache ECharts 的 Python 数据可视化库，提供简洁流畅的 API 设计，支持 30+ 种常见图表类型，兼容 Jupyter 系列 Notebook 和主流 Web 框架（如 Flask、Django），支持链式调用与高度灵活配置，内置 400+ 地图文件，适用于地理数据可视化，当前主推 V1/V2 版本（Python 3.7+）。
summary.en: pyecharts is a Python data visualization library built on Apache ECharts, offering fluent API design with 30+ chart types, seamless integration with Jupyter notebooks and web frameworks like Flask/Django, chainable syntax, extensive map support (400+), and flexible configuration, targeting Python 3.7+ in V1/V2 versions.

metadata.name: jumpserver
metadata.description: JumpServer is an open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform that provides DevOps and IT teams with on-demand and secure access to SSH, RDP, Kubernetes, Database and RemoteApp endpoints through a web browser.

summary.zh: JumpServer 是一款开源的堡垒机（PAM）平台，为 DevOps 和 IT 团队提供通过浏览器安全访问 SSH、RDP、Kubernetes、数据库及远程应用端点的能力，支持权限管理、会话审计与自动化运维，具备完善的 RBAC 权限控制与多协议支持。
summary.en: JumpServer is an open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform enabling secure, on-demand access to SSH, RDP, Kubernetes, databases, and RemoteApp endpoints via a web browser, featuring comprehensive auditing, RBAC, and multi-protocol support for DevOps and IT teams.

metadata.name: vue-tutorial
metadata.description: vue2.0-tutorial

summary.zh: 本仓库是一个基于 Vue 2.0 的单页应用教程，使用 vue-cli、vue-router、vuex 和 vue-resource 构建完整前端架构，结合 webpack 实现热加载与组件化开发，并集成 Bootstrap UI 框架，适合学习现代 Vue.js 项目工程化实践。
summary.en: This repository is a Vue 2.0 tutorial for building a single-page application using vue-cli, vue-router, vuex, and vue-resource. It demonstrates project scaffolding, component-based development, hot-reload via webpack, and integration with Bootstrap, serving as a practical guide for modern Vue.js engineering practices.

metadata.name: BoostNote-Legacy
metadata.description: This repository is outdated and new Boost Note app is available! We've launched a new Boost Note app which supports real-time collaborative writing. https://github.com/BoostIO/BoostNote-App

summary.zh: BoostNote-Legacy 是一款面向程序员的开源笔记应用，支持多平台（Mac、Windows、Linux）。该仓库已标记为过时，推荐使用支持实时协作的新版 BoostNote 应用，其基于 Electron、React + Redux 构建，提供跨平台桌面与移动端支持。
summary.en: BoostNote-Legacy is an open-source note-taking app designed for programmers, supporting Mac, Windows, and Linux. This repository is deprecated; users are advised to migrate to the new BoostNote app, which features real-time collaborative writing and is built with Electron, React + Redux.

metadata.name: sibi
metadata.description: V2EX 撕逼大战

summary.zh: 该仓库专门收集 V2EX 社区及类似平台上的公开争议事件，涵盖技术争论、价值观冲突、商业纠纷等多元议题，通过存档原始帖子与补充背景资料，系统记录中国互联网技术圈内的公共舆论交锋与社区生态变迁。
summary.en: This repository archives public disputes from V2EX and related platforms, covering technical debates, value conflicts, and business controversies. It systematically documents public discourse and community evolution in China's tech ecosystem through original posts and contextual materials.

metadata.name: cpython
metadata.description: The Python programming language

summary.zh: CPython 3.15.0 alpha 6 是 Python 官方参考实现的源代码仓库，提供完整的构建指南、跨平台编译支持及开发者工具链。项目包含完整的标准库、构建系统（configure/make）、测试套件和性能优化选项（如 PGO 和 LTO），适用于开发、调试及生产环境部署。
summary.en: CPython 3.15.0 alpha 6 is the official reference implementation of the Python programming language, containing source code, build instructions, and developer tools. It supports cross-platform compilation, includes the full standard library, test suite, and performance optimizations like PGO and LTO for production-ready builds.

metadata.name: py-patterns
metadata.description: 设计模式的python实现

summary.zh: 该项目是设计模式在 Python3 中的完整实现，涵盖创建型、结构型与行为型三大类共23种经典模式，提供清晰代码示例与参考链接，适合学习设计模式与提升架构设计能力。
summary.en: This repository implements 23 classic design patterns in Python3, covering Creational, Structural, and Behavioral categories with clear examples and references, ideal for learning design patterns and improving software architecture skills.

metadata.name: django-bleach
metadata.description: Integrate awesome Bleach library into Django

summary.zh: django-bleach 是一个 Django 应用，用于将 Bleach 库集成到项目中，实现对用户提交的 HTML 内容进行安全过滤和净化。它提供模型字段、表单字段和模板过滤器三种使用方式，支持自定义允许的标签、属性和样式，防止 XSS 攻击，适用于需要富文本输入的 Web 应用。
summary.en: django-bleach is a Django app that integrates the Bleach library to sanitize user-submitted HTML content. It offers model fields, form fields, and template filters for safe HTML processing, with customizable allowed tags, attributes, and styles to prevent XSS attacks in web applications requiring rich text input.

metadata.name: python-style-guide
metadata.description: python code style guide book / python 代码、单元测试和项目规范

summary.zh: 本项目是 Python 代码风格、单元测试与项目规范的完整指南，旨在为 Python 项目（尤其是 Web 项目）提供统一的开发标准。涵盖代码风格、测试实践、项目结构等核心内容，支持在线阅读与多种格式下载，采用 CC0 许可，鼓励社区协作完善。
summary.en: This repository provides a comprehensive Python code style guide, unit testing practices, and project standards, particularly for web projects. It covers coding conventions, testing methodologies, and project structure, available for online reading and download in multiple formats. Released under CC0, it encourages community contributions to improve and expand the guide.

metadata.name: wechat-explorer
metadata.description: 微信聊天记录导出、分析工具

summary.zh: Wechat Explorer 是一款专为 iOS 设备设计的微信聊天记录导出与分析工具，通过解析 iTunes 备份中的微信数据，支持导出聊天室记录、统计好友标签及聊天室活跃度，并可生成 HTML 报告转为 PDF，适用于个人数据备份与社交行为分析。
summary.en: Wechat Explorer is an iOS-focused tool for exporting and analyzing WeChat chat records by parsing iTunes backups. It supports exporting chatroom logs, generating friend label statistics, and creating PDF reports from HTML exports, ideal for personal data archiving and social behavior insights.

metadata.name: dingdang-robot
metadata.description: 🤖 叮当是一款可以工作在 Raspberry Pi 上的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目。

summary.zh: 叮当是一款专为树莓派设计的开源中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持模块化插件扩展、微信远程操控、多平台语音识别与合成技术，并集成智能家居控制功能，旨在帮助中国开发者快速构建个性化智能设备。
summary.en: Dingdang is an open-source Chinese voice dialogue robot/smart speaker project designed for Raspberry Pi, featuring modular plugins, WeChat integration, multi-platform STT/TTS support, and smart home control, enabling developers to easily build personalized voice assistants.

metadata.name: django-auditlog
metadata.description: A Django app that keeps a log of changes made to an object.

summary.zh: django-auditlog 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，用于自动记录模型对象的所有变更，包括操作用户、变更摘要及详细 JSON 数据，支持灵活查询与审计追踪，适用于需要完整操作日志的场景。
summary.en: django-auditlog is a lightweight Django app that automatically logs all changes to model objects, capturing the actor, change summary, and detailed JSON data for flexible auditing and traceability.

metadata.name: vue-element-admin
metadata.description: :tada: A magical vue admin                                                                https://panjiachen.github.io/vue-element-admin

summary.zh: vue-element-admin 是一个基于 Vue 2.6+ 和 Element UI 2.7+ 的现代化企业级后台管理系统解决方案，提供国际化支持、权限管理、数据可视化等完整功能，支持快速搭建复杂单页应用，适用于中大型管理后台开发。
summary.en: vue-element-admin is a production-ready front-end solution for admin interfaces built on Vue 2.6+ and Element UI 2.7+. It features i18n support, role-based permissions, dashboard widgets, and enterprise-grade templates to accelerate development of complex single-page applications.

metadata.name: Awesome_APIs
metadata.description: :octocat: A collection of APIs

summary.zh: Awesome APIs 是一个精选的 API 集合库，涵盖动漫、博客、书籍、商业、日历、云服务等 40+ 领域，为开发者提供丰富的第三方接口资源，支持快速集成各类功能，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Awesome APIs is a curated collection of over 40 categories of developer-friendly APIs, including anime, blogging, books, business, cloud services, and more, enabling rapid integration of diverse functionalities and enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: v2ex
metadata.description: The unofficial V2EX app for iOS

summary.zh: darkerk/v2ex 是一款专为 iOS 平台开发的非官方 V2EX 客户端应用，采用 Swift 4.1 编写，支持 iOS 10.0+。该应用提供简洁的界面设计，让用户能够便捷地浏览 V2EX 社区内容，包括节点、主题和评论等核心功能，是 V2EX 用户的移动端优质替代方案。
summary.en: darkerk/v2ex is an unofficial iOS app for V2EX, built with Swift 4.1 and compatible with iOS 10.0+. It offers a clean interface for browsing V2EX content, including nodes, topics, and comments, serving as a convenient mobile alternative to the web version of V2EX.

metadata.name: opensource
metadata.description: 【编程随想】收藏的开源项目清单

summary.zh: 编程随想维护的开源项目收藏清单，涵盖C/C++和Python两大语言的技术库与示例代码，聚焦程序员实用工具与学习资源，便于快速检索与参考。
summary.en: A curated collection of open-source projects by Programthink, featuring code libraries and examples in C/C++ and Python, designed for developers to quickly access practical tools and learning resources.

metadata.name: docsify-cli
metadata.description: 🖌 docsify cli tool - A magical documentation generator.

summary.zh: docsify-cli 是一个强大的文档生成工具，提供快速初始化、本地服务器和实时重载功能，支持自定义主题与插件，适用于快速搭建现代化文档站点。
summary.en: docsify-cli is a powerful documentation generator that offers quick initialization, local server with live reload, and support for custom themes and plugins, ideal for rapidly building modern documentation sites.

metadata.name: docsify
metadata.description: 🃏 A magical documentation site generator.

summary.zh: Docsify 是一个神奇的文档站点生成器，可将 Markdown 文件直接转换为静态网站，无需构建流程。支持全文搜索、多主题切换、插件扩展和 Emoji 渲染，适用于快速搭建技术文档、项目说明等轻量级网站。
summary.en: Docsify is a magical documentation site generator that converts Markdown files into static websites without requiring a build process. It features full-text search, multiple themes, plugin support, and emoji rendering, ideal for rapidly building lightweight technical documentation and project wikis.

metadata.name: vira-theme-support
metadata.description: Vira Theme is the official successor of the popular Material Theme. This premium version is actively maintained, includes hand-curated icons and more features

summary.zh: Vira Theme 是 Material Theme 的官方继任者，为 VS Code 提供现代化主题与图标套件，包含六种精心设计的深色主题（如 Teal、Ocean、Carbon），支持高度定制与持续更新，专为开发者打造视觉沉浸的编码环境。
summary.en: Vira Theme is the premium successor to Material Theme for VS Code, offering six hand-curated dark themes and icons with enhanced customization, modern aesthetics, and continuous updates for an immersive developer experience.

metadata.name: djangotoolbox
metadata.description: Django tools for building nonrel backends

summary.zh: Djangotoolbox 是 Django 的非关系型数据库后端通用工具包，提供标准化接口支持在 NoSQL 数据库上运行 Django。它包含字段类型（如 ListField、DictField）、管理后台适配及权限处理支持，帮助开发者构建兼容 Django ORM 的非关系型数据层。
summary.en: Djangotoolbox is a Django utility library providing a unified API for running Django on non-relational/NoSQL databases. It includes base classes for custom backends, specialized field types (e.g., ListField, DictField), and admin integration to support Django's admin interface without JOINs.

metadata.name: mycli
metadata.description: A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

summary.zh: mycli 是一个专为 MySQL 设计的终端客户端，支持 SQL 关键字、表名、列名的智能自动补全和语法高亮。基于 prompt_toolkit 构建，提供模糊历史搜索、多行查询、查询收藏夹、执行时间统计、SSL 连接支持等功能，并可通过配置文件自定义行为，显著提升数据库交互效率。
summary.en: mycli is a terminal client for MySQL featuring auto-completion for SQL keywords, tables, and columns, along with syntax highlighting. Built with prompt_toolkit, it offers fuzzy history search, multi-line queries, favorite query management, execution timing, SSL support, and customizable config via ~/.myclirc, enhancing database interaction efficiency.

metadata.name: 12306ForMac
metadata.description: An unofficial 12306 Client for Mac

summary.zh: 12306ForMac 是一款非官方的 Mac 版 12306 火车票订票助手，支持自动捡票与下单功能。基于 Swift 开发，依赖 Carthage 管理 CocoaPods 依赖，兼容 OS X 10.11 及以上系统。项目采用 Alamofire、PromiseKit 等主流框架，提供图形化界面替代官方网页购票，适用于 macOS 用户便捷购票。
summary.en: 12306ForMac is an unofficial macOS client for 12306 railway ticket booking, supporting auto-search and purchasing. Built with Swift 3.2 and Xcode 9.0, it uses Carthage for dependency management and integrates Alamofire, PromiseKit, and FMDB. Designed for OS X 10.11+, it offers a native GUI alternative to the official web interface for convenient ticket booking.

metadata.name: django-fsm
metadata.description: Django friendly finite state machine support

summary.zh: viewflow.fsm 是专为 Django 设计的有限状态机（FSM）支持库，提供声明式工作流建模能力。通过 Python 枚举和 Django 枚举类型定义状态与转换规则，确保状态变更的严格控制和数据库无关性，适用于构建持久化业务流程与自动化工作流系统。
summary.en: viewflow.fsm is a Django-friendly finite state machine library enabling declarative workflow modeling. It uses Python enums and Django enumeration types to define states and transitions, enforcing strict state control and database independence for building persistent business processes and automated workflows.

metadata.name: Best-App
metadata.description: 收集&推荐优秀的 Apps/硬件/技巧/周边等

summary.zh: Best App 是一个精选优质应用、硬件及生活技巧的推荐项目，涵盖 macOS、iOS、Android 等平台。聚焦付费与免费精品应用，提供详细功能介绍与横向测评，帮助用户高效选择提升效率与幸福感的工具。项目强调客观推荐，拒绝广告与捐赠，倡导有章可循的产品选择。
summary.en: Best App is a curated collection of excellent apps, hardware, and life-enhancing tips across macOS, iOS, and Android. It features detailed reviews and comparisons of premium and free apps, helping users make informed choices for productivity and lifestyle improvement. The project maintains objectivity, avoids ads, and encourages community contributions via Star or Pull Request.

metadata.name: framework
metadata.description: Simple forum software for building great communities.

summary.zh: Flarum 是一个轻量级、现代化的论坛软件，专为构建高效社区而设计。基于 PHP 开发，采用 Mithril 前端框架，具备简洁界面、快速部署和强大扩展能力，支持插件化定制，适用于各类在线讨论场景。
summary.en: Flarum is a lightweight, modern forum software designed to build great online communities. Built with PHP and powered by the Mithril JavaScript framework, it offers a clean interface, fast deployment, and extensive extensibility through a robust Extension API, ideal for customizable discussion platforms.

metadata.name: django-rules
metadata.description: Awesome Django authorization, without the database

summary.zh: django-rules 是一个轻量级但功能强大的 Django 权限管理库，无需数据库即可实现对象级权限控制。它基于规则系统构建，支持复杂谓词组合、动态权限判断，并深度集成 Django 视图、模板和 Admin，提供高效、灵活的授权解决方案。
summary.en: django-rules is a lightweight yet powerful Django authorization library enabling object-level permissions without requiring a database. Built on a rule-based system, it supports complex predicate logic, dynamic permissions, and seamless integration with Django views, templates, and Admin for efficient access control.

metadata.name: wxpy
metadata.description: 微信机器人 / 可能是最优雅的微信个人号 API ✨✨

summary.zh: wxpy 是基于 itchat 封装的优雅微信个人号 API，提供对象化接口与丰富功能扩展，支持自动回复、消息转发、好友管理、智能家居控制等场景，集成聊天机器人与实用工具组件，兼容 Python 2.7 及 3.4-3.6，适合实现微信自动化操作。
summary.en: wxpy is an elegant WeChat personal account API built on itchat, offering object-oriented interfaces and extensive feature extensions. It supports auto-reply, message forwarding, friend/group management, smart home control, and integrates chatbots and utilities. Compatible with Python 2.7 and 3.4-3.6, ideal for WeChat automation.

metadata.name: fuzzywuzzy
metadata.description: Fuzzy String Matching in Python

summary.zh: FuzzyWuzzy 是一个用于 Python 的模糊字符串匹配库，现已迁移至 TheFuzz。它提供高效的字符串相似度计算功能，适用于数据清洗、文本匹配等场景，支持多种匹配算法和加权评分。
summary.en: FuzzyWuzzy is a Python library for fuzzy string matching, now migrated to TheFuzz. It enables efficient string similarity computation using various algorithms and weighted scoring, ideal for data cleaning and text matching tasks.

metadata.name: gotty
metadata.description: Share your terminal as a web application

summary.zh: GoTTY 是一个将命令行工具转换为 Web 应用的轻量级工具，支持通过浏览器远程访问终端会话。它提供端口监听、TLS 加密、基础认证、随机 URL 生成等安全特性，适用于运维、开发调试和远程协作场景。
summary.en: GoTTY is a lightweight CLI tool that transforms command-line tools into web-based applications, enabling remote terminal access via browsers. It supports secure features like TLS encryption, basic authentication, random URL generation, and dynamic resizing for use in operations, debugging, and remote collaboration.

metadata.name: awesome-python-cn
metadata.description: Python资源大全中文版，包括：Web框架、网络爬虫、模板引擎、数据库、数据可视化、图片处理等，由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」微信公号团队维护更新。

summary.zh: jobbole/awesome-python-cn 是 Python 资源大全的中文镜像仓库，涵盖 Web 框架、网络爬虫、数据库、数据可视化、机器学习等全领域工具链。由开源社区维护，提供分类清晰的资源列表，助力开发者快速定位高质量 Python 生态组件。
summary.en: jobbole/awesome-python-cn is the Chinese mirror of Python's comprehensive resource repository, covering tools across Web frameworks, web scraping, databases, data visualization, machine learning, and more. Maintained by open-source communities, it offers a well-organized catalog of high-quality Python ecosystem components for developers.

metadata.name: hacknical
metadata.description: Hacknical, hacker & technical. A website for GitHub user to make a better resume.

summary.zh: Hacknical 是一个专为 GitHub 用户打造的在线简历生成平台，通过深度分析用户的 GitHub 贡献、代码仓库、技术栈等数据，自动生成可视化分析报告，帮助用户打造专业、数据驱动的编程简历。支持中英文切换、组织账号分析、移动端展示及 PDF 导出，技术栈涵盖 React、Koa2、MongoDB 等。
summary.en: Hacknical is a web platform designed for GitHub users to generate data-driven resumes by analyzing their GitHub contributions, repositories, and tech stacks. It provides visual analytics and exportable reports, supporting English, organizations, mobile viewing, and PDF export with a tech stack including React, Koa2, and MongoDB.

metadata.name: tenant-point
metadata.description: 租房要点，适用于北上广深杭，欢迎补充。

summary.zh: 该仓库整理了中国一线城市（北上广深杭）租房核心要点，聚焦避坑指南与实操策略，涵盖直租识别、中介甄别、合同陷阱防范及合租注意事项，强调实地验房与房东资质核查，旨在帮助租客规避常见纠纷、保障居住安全与权益。
summary.en: This repository compiles essential rental tips for major Chinese cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hangzhou), focusing on avoiding pitfalls and practical strategies. It covers identifying direct landlord rentals, vetting agents, contract traps, and co-living safety, emphasizing on-site inspections and landlord qualification checks to protect tenants from disputes and unsafe housing.

metadata.name: drf-cached-instances
metadata.description: Cached instances for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: 该仓库为 Django REST Framework (DRF) 提供缓存实例功能，通过将序列化后的实例数据存储在缓存中，显著提升 API 读取性能。支持零数据库查询读取实例或仅一次查询获取主键列表，适用于高读负载场景。核心机制包括缓存代理类、JSON 序列化及缓存失效策略。
summary.en: This project enhances Django REST Framework (DRF) by caching serialized instance data, enabling zero or minimal database queries for read-heavy APIs. It uses a cache-aware proxy to store only necessary attributes, including foreign keys and relations, improving performance for APIs with complex object relationships.

metadata.name: drf-extensions
metadata.description: DRF-extensions is a collection of custom extensions for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: DRF-extensions 是 Django REST Framework 的扩展集合，提供 DetailSerializerMixin、缓存、条件请求、嵌套路由和批量操作等核心功能，支持多版本 Django 和 DRF，文档完善，适合企业级 API 开发。
summary.en: DRF-extensions is a collection of custom extensions for Django REST Framework, offering features like DetailSerializerMixin, caching, conditional requests, nested routes, and bulk operations. It supports multiple Django and DRF versions with comprehensive documentation, ideal for enterprise-grade API development.

metadata.name: IPProxyTool
metadata.description: python ip proxy tool  scrapy crawl. 抓取大量免费代理 ip，提取有效 ip 使用

summary.zh: 基于 Scrapy 的 Python 代理 IP 抓取与验证工具，支持多源采集、异步验证、MySQL 存储及 RESTful 数据接口，提供高匿/匿名/透明代理筛选与 HTTPS 支持检测，适用于爬虫反爬、数据采集等场景。
summary.en: A Python-based proxy IP crawler and validator using Scrapy, featuring multi-source scraping, asynchronous validation, MySQL storage, and RESTful API for filtering proxies by anonymity and HTTPS support, ideal for web scraping and anti-bot bypass.

metadata.name: hexo-generator-restful
metadata.description: Generate RESTful json data for Hexo plugins.

summary.zh: hexo-generator-restful 是一个 Hexo 插件，可将博客内容生成 RESTful 风格的 JSON 数据，支持分页、分类、标签和文章详情等 API 接口，便于构建 SPA 应用或前后端分离架构。
summary.en: hexo-generator-restful is a Hexo plugin that generates RESTful JSON data from blog content, supporting pagination, categories, tags, and article details via API endpoints, ideal for building SPA applications or decoupled front-end systems.

metadata.name: mama2
metadata.description: 妈妈计划-众人拾柴火焰高

summary.zh: 妈妈计划2（MAMA2）是一个开源项目，旨在解决MacBook观看在线视频时发热严重的问题，通过将Flash播放器替换为HTML5 Video实现。项目支持哔哩哔哩、优酷、土豆、芒果TV等主流视频网站，采用模块化架构，开发者可编写seeker脚本解析视频源地址。支持本地开发环境搭建，具备跨域请求、日志记录等工具函数，鼓励社区参与扩展支持网站。
summary.en: MAMA2 is an open-source project designed to resolve overheating issues in MacBooks when watching online videos by replacing Flash players with HTML5 Video. It supports major platforms like Bilibili, Youku, Tudou, and more. The project uses a modular architecture where developers can write 'seeker' scripts to extract video URLs. It includes tools for AJAX, logging, and cross-domain requests, with a local development environment using Node.js and Gulp. Community contributions are encouraged to expand site support.

metadata.name: bilibili-mac-client
metadata.description: An unofficial bilibili client for mac

summary.zh: Bilibili Mac Client 是一款非官方哔哩哔哩桌面客户端，基于 mpv 实现硬解播放与 libass 弹幕渲染，支持多视频网站解析、分段视频拼接、弹幕发送与屏蔽、本地视频播放及自定义配置，显著降低 CPU 占用并优化能效表现。
summary.en: An unofficial Bilibili desktop client for macOS, built on mpv with hardware decoding and libass-based danmaku rendering. It supports multi-site video parsing, segmented video stitching, danmaku interaction, local playback, and extensive customization via mpv config, offering superior performance and energy efficiency compared to HTML5 players.

metadata.name: grumpy
metadata.description: Grumpy is a Python to Go source code transcompiler and runtime.

summary.zh: Grumpy 是一个将 Python 源码编译为 Go 源码并生成原生代码的转编译器，旨在作为 CPython 2.7 的近乎即插即用的替代品。其核心优势在于无虚拟机（VM），直接生成高效 Go 代码，通过 Grumpy 运行时库提供类似 Python C API 的功能，适用于高性能 Python 应用部署。
summary.en: Grumpy is a Python-to-Go transcompiler and runtime designed as a near drop-in replacement for CPython 2.7. It compiles Python source to Go code, which is then compiled to native machine code—eliminating the need for a VM. This enables high-performance execution via a Go-based runtime library, offering a viable alternative for deploying Python applications with native speed.

metadata.name: online-markdown-reader
metadata.description: Markdown  在线阅读器

summary.zh: 在线 Markdown 阅读器支持代码高亮、目录自动生成、本地图片显示及导出 HTML，并集成 Todo 列表、MathJax 公式、时序图、Emoji 和 ECharts 图表等扩展语法，提供丰富的富文本阅读体验。
summary.en: An online Markdown reader featuring code highlighting, auto-generated table of contents, local image support, HTML export, and rich extensions including Todo lists, MathJax, sequence diagrams, Emoji, and ECharts visualizations.

metadata.name: china_area_mysql
metadata.description: 中国5级行政区域mysql库

summary.zh: 该仓库提供中国5级行政区域MySQL数据库，涵盖省、市、县、镇、村完整行政层级，包含大陆地区邮政编码及经纬度信息。数据源自国家统计局官网，2023年版本在2020年基础上优化，共758,049条记录，支持高效导入与查询。
summary.en: This repository provides a MySQL database of China's 5-level administrative divisions, including provinces, cities, counties, towns, and villages, with postal codes and coordinates for mainland China. Data sourced from the National Bureau of Statistics, the 2023 version refines the 2020 dataset, totaling 758,049 records, optimized for fast import and querying.

metadata.name: wx_pay_python
metadata.description: weixin pay python 微信支付功能集，前期开发借鉴zwczou https://github.com/zwczou/weixin-python ，后期补充及完善微信支付新功能，处理因微信支付调用规则修改而无法使用的旧代码，升级到最新微信支付接口配套代码

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个已停止维护的微信支付 Python SDK，提供完整的微信支付功能封装，包括 JSAPI 支付下单、订单查询、退款、红包发放、企业付款及刷卡支付等接口。基于 zwczou/weixin-python 开发，后期适配微信支付接口规则变更，支持证书认证和回调通知，适用于需要集成微信支付功能的 Python 后端服务。
summary.en: This is a discontinued Python SDK for WeChat Pay, offering comprehensive API support including JSAPI payments, order queries, refunds, red packet distribution, enterprise transfers, and swipe-card payments. Built upon zwczou/weixin-python with updates to comply with WeChat Pay's evolving API standards, it supports certificate authentication and webhook notifications for secure payment processing in Python backends.

metadata.name: GADownloading
metadata.description: A Gorgeous LoadingView (一个绚丽的LoadingView )

summary.zh: GADownloading 是一个绚丽的自定义 Android LoadingView，无需图片资源，通过代码实现动态加载动画。支持成功/失败状态切换，提供丰富的自定义属性（颜色、线条、文本等），可自动调整尺寸。适用于下载进度展示，兼容 JitPack 集成与源码复制两种接入方式，强调纯代码实现与高度可定制性。
summary.en: GADownloading is a visually stunning custom Android LoadingView that renders animations purely through code without image resources. It supports dynamic progress updates, success/failure states, and extensive customization via XML attributes. Designed for download progress indication, it offers JitPack integration or direct source copying, emphasizing code-only implementation and high configurability.

summary.zh: 该仓库是阿里无线前端团队2015年的技术文章合集，涵盖性能优化、H5适配、动态化方案、图标与字体处理等核心议题，包含双11项目总结与Flexible适配实践，体现了手淘前端在电商场景下的深度技术探索与工程实践。
summary.en: This repository contains technical articles from Alibaba's mobile front-end team in 2015, covering performance optimization, H5 adaptation, dynamic solutions, icon/font handling, and e-commerce-specific challenges, including insights from Double 11 projects and Flexible layout practices.

metadata.name: iview
metadata.description: A high quality UI Toolkit built on Vue.js 2.0

summary.zh: iView 是基于 Vue.js 2.0 开发的高质量 UI 组件库，提供数十个美观实用的组件，支持 Vue 1.x 和 2.x、SSR、TypeScript、Electron 等，适用于企业级应用开发，文档详尽且提供丰富示例。
summary.en: iView is a high-quality UI toolkit built on Vue.js 2.0, offering dozens of beautiful and practical components. It supports Vue 1.x/2.x, SSR, TypeScript, Electron, and provides extensive documentation with demos for enterprise-level applications.

metadata.name: algoliasearch-django
metadata.description: Seamless integration of Algolia into your Django project.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Django 项目与 Algolia 搜索服务的无缝集成，支持自动索引同步、自定义索引命名、字段预处理等功能，适用于实现高性能实时搜索与自动补全。兼容 Python 3.8+ 和 Django 4.x/5.x，提供完整的搜索、地理搜索、标签及多索引支持。
summary.en: This repository enables seamless integration of Algolia Search API into Django projects, offering features like automatic indexing, custom index naming, field preprocessing, and support for geo-search and tagging. Compatible with Python 3.8+ and Django 4.x/5.x, it simplifies building high-performance real-time search and autocomplete experiences.

metadata.name: fonts
metadata.description: Patched fonts for Powerline users.

summary.zh: Powerline 字体仓库提供专为 Powerline 状态栏插件优化的预配置字体，支持多种流行编程字体（如 Hack、Fira Mono、Meslo 等），涵盖 BSD、Apache、SIL 等开源许可证，适用于 Linux、macOS 和 Windows 终端环境，提升终端显示美观性与可读性。
summary.en: This repository provides pre-patched fonts optimized for the Powerline statusline plugin, featuring popular programming fonts like Hack, Fira Mono, and Meslo under open licenses such as BSD, Apache, and SIL. It supports quick installation via script or package manager across Linux, macOS, and Windows terminals, enhancing visual appeal and readability.

metadata.name: code_news
metadata.description: Diycode每日文章精选

summary.zh: Diycode每日精选是一个技术文章聚合项目，专注于每日精选高质量技术文章并附带点评，覆盖Android开发、React Native、性能优化、架构设计等领域，内容由社区维护并归档，旨在为开发者提供有价值的知识分享与学习资源。
summary.en: Diycode Daily Selection is a curated tech article aggregation project that collects and reviews high-quality technical articles daily, covering Android development, React Native, performance optimization, and architecture. Maintained by the community, it archives content for developers to access valuable knowledge and learning resources.

metadata.name: proxychains-ng
metadata.description: proxychains ng (new generation) - a preloader which hooks calls to sockets in dynamically linked programs and redirects it through one or more socks/http proxies. continuation of the unmaintained proxychains project. the sf.net page is currently not updated, use releases from github release page instead.

summary.zh: ProxyChains-NG 是原 proxychains 项目的现代化延续，通过 LD_PRELOAD 技术劫持动态链接程序的 socket 调用，强制流量经 SOCKS4/5 或 HTTP 代理转发。支持 Linux、BSD、macOS 等主流平台，具备 IPv6、DNAT、多线程优化等特性，适用于绕过网络限制的场景，但需谨慎使用以避免法律风险。
summary.en: ProxyChains-NG is a modern successor to the original proxychains project, intercepting socket calls in dynamically linked programs via LD_PRELOAD to route traffic through SOCKS4/5 or HTTP proxies. It supports Linux, BSD, macOS, and other platforms, featuring IPv6, DNAT, and multithreading optimizations. Designed for bypassing network restrictions, it requires careful configuration and legal awareness.

metadata.name: django-materializecss-form
metadata.description: Materializecss for Django Form

summary.zh: 这是一个为 Django 表单集成 MaterializeCSS 样式的轻量级模板标签库，支持自动渲染表单字段并应用 Material Design 风格，提供图标、自定义尺寸和日期时间选择器等功能，简化了响应式表单的开发流程。
summary.en: A lightweight Django template tag library that integrates MaterializeCSS styling into forms, enabling automatic rendering with Material Design aesthetics, including icons, custom grid sizes, and datetime pickers for streamlined responsive form development.

metadata.name: django-material
metadata.description: Material Design for Django

summary.zh: Django Material 是一个为 Django 框架打造的 Material Design 3 组件库，提供完整的 CRUD 和管理界面。它基于 TailwindCSS 和 django-cotton，无需构建步骤即可使用预编译的 CSS/JS，支持响应式、无障碍访问及 SPA 式导航，专为 AI 辅助开发优化，实现快速、现代化的 Django 前端开发。
summary.en: Django Material brings Google's Material Design 3 to Django with full-featured CRUD and admin interfaces. Built on TailwindCSS and django-cotton, it offers zero-build, responsive, accessible components powered by Unpoly.js for seamless navigation. Designed for AI-assisted development, it enables rapid, modern frontend development in Django without React, Vue, or Angular.

metadata.name: httpstat
metadata.description: curl statistics made simple

summary.zh: httpstat 是一个简洁高效的命令行工具，用于可视化 curl 请求的详细统计信息，包括 DNS 解析、TCP 连接、TLS 握手、HTTP 请求和响应等关键阶段耗时。它用 Python 编写，单文件无依赖，支持丰富的环境变量配置，适用于网络调试和性能分析。
summary.en: httpstat is a simple yet powerful command-line tool that visualizes detailed curl request statistics, including DNS lookup, TCP handshake, TLS negotiation, and HTTP request/response timings. Written in single-file Python with zero dependencies, it offers rich customization via environment variables for network debugging and performance analysis.

metadata.name: awesome-programming-books
metadata.description: 经典编程书籍大全，涵盖：计算机系统与网络、系统架构、算法与数据结构、前端开发、后端开发、移动开发、数据库、测试、项目与团队、程序员职业修炼、求职面试等

summary.zh: 该仓库收录100+经典编程书籍，全面覆盖计算机系统与网络、算法与数据结构、前后端开发、数据库、测试、职业修炼等核心领域，精选伯乐在线及社区广泛推荐的权威技术读物，是程序员系统提升技能的理想资源库。
summary.en: This repository curates 100+ essential programming books across core domains including computer systems, algorithms, web/mobile development, databases, testing, and career growth. It aggregates highly recommended technical reads from Jobbole and the developer community, serving as a comprehensive learning resource for programmers.

metadata.name: DjangoUeditor
metadata.description: DjangoUeditor

summary.zh: DjangoUeditor 是一个用于在 Django 项目中集成百度 UEditor 富文本编辑器的 Python 模块，支持强大的 HTML 编辑功能（如拖拽调整表格单元格），提供灵活的上传路径配置和自定义按钮扩展，适用于内容管理系统、博客等富文本编辑场景。
summary.en: DjangoUeditor is a Python module that integrates Baidu UEditor, a powerful online HTML editor, into Django applications. It supports advanced editing features like drag-and-drop table cells and offers flexible image/file upload configurations, custom buttons, and admin integration, ideal for CMS and blog platforms.

metadata.name: flow.ci
metadata.description: Public docs & issues for flow.ci

summary.zh: flow.ci 是一个开源的持续集成与部署平台，提供中英文双语文档和公开的问题追踪系统，旨在帮助开发者高效管理 CI/CD 流程，支持自动化构建、测试与部署。
summary.en: flow.ci is an open-source continuous integration and deployment platform offering bilingual documentation (English and Chinese) and a public issue tracker to help developers streamline CI/CD workflows with automation.

metadata.name: IPProxyPool
metadata.description: IPProxyPool代理池项目，提供代理ip

summary.zh: IPProxyPool是一个开源代理IP池项目，支持Python 2/3，提供高匿、匿名和透明代理IP抓取与验证服务。通过多线程爬虫自动采集代理源，结合评分机制筛选可用IP，支持HTTP/HTTPS协议及国内外地域过滤。项目采用SQLite默认数据库，可扩展至MySQL、MongoDB等，并提供RESTful API供外部调用，适用于爬虫、数据采集等场景。
summary.en: IPProxyPool is an open-source proxy IP pool project supporting Python 2/3, offering automated collection and validation of anonymous, high-anonymity, and transparent proxy IPs. It uses multi-threaded crawlers to gather proxies from multiple sources, filters them via a scoring system, and supports HTTP/HTTPS protocols with geographic filtering. Built on SQLAlchemy ORM, it defaults to SQLite but can be extended to MySQL or MongoDB. A RESTful API enables external access for use in web scraping and data collection applications.

metadata.name: AlloyFinger
metadata.description: Super tiny size multi-touch gestures library for the web. 　　　You can touch this →

summary.zh: AlloyFinger 是一个超轻量级的多点触控手势库，专为网页设计，支持触摸、滑动、缩放、旋转等手势识别。采用模块化设计，体积小巧，API 简洁易用，兼容主流框架（如 Omi），适用于移动端和桌面端交互场景。
summary.en: AlloyFinger is a super lightweight multi-touch gesture library for the web, supporting gestures like touch, swipe, pinch, and rotate. It features a modular design, small size, simple API, and compatibility with frameworks like Omi, ideal for mobile and desktop interactive applications.

metadata.name: git-commit-emoji-cn
metadata.description: 😁 git commit message emoji 使用指南

summary.zh: 本项目提供了一套中文化的 Git Commit Emoji 使用指南，涵盖 30+ 个常用 emoji 及其对应代码，用于规范提交信息格式，提升代码历史可读性与团队协作效率。支持命令行显示 emoji，适用于多平台开发场景。
summary.en: This repo provides a comprehensive guide for using Git commit emojis in Chinese, including 30+ emoji codes and their meanings to standardize commit messages, enhance code history clarity, and improve team collaboration. It supports emoji display in terminals and is suitable for cross-platform development.

metadata.name: SMValidator
metadata.description: a simple but powerful tool for validating form fields.  support bootstrap and your own styles.

summary.zh: SMValidator 是一个轻量、无依赖的前端表单验证工具，支持通过 HTML 属性或 JavaScript 配置验证规则，兼容 Bootstrap 和 Semantic UI 样式，支持正则表达式和自定义函数验证，兼容 IE8+，提供灵活的错误提示与样式定制能力。
summary.en: SMValidator is a lightweight, dependency-free form validation tool that supports rule configuration via HTML attributes or JavaScript. It integrates with Bootstrap and Semantic UI, supports RegExp and custom function validation, and is compatible with IE8+, offering flexible error messaging and styling options.

metadata.name: jstraining
metadata.description: 全栈工程师培训材料

summary.zh: 全栈工程师培训材料，系统讲解JavaScript全栈开发技术，涵盖前端React、Node.js后端及工程化实践，适合有HTML/CSS/JS基础的学习者，通过四讲课程帮助掌握Web应用前后端开发技能。
summary.en: Comprehensive full-stack JavaScript training material covering frontend React, Node.js backend development, and engineering practices. Designed for learners with basic HTML/CSS/JS knowledge, featuring four lectures for a two-day bootcamp on building complete web applications.

metadata.name: material-ui-vue
metadata.description: It is a materializecss.com implementation with Vue.js.

summary.zh: material-ui-vue 是一个基于 Vue.js 的 MaterializeCSS 组件库实现，提供 Material Design 风格的 UI 组件封装。支持通过 npm 安装，需配合 MaterializeCSS 资源文件使用，适用于快速构建现代化前端界面，但当前版本为试验性质，稳定性未经验证。
summary.en: material-ui-vue is a Vue.js implementation of MaterializeCSS, offering Material Design UI components. It can be installed via npm and requires MaterializeCSS assets including CSS, JS, and jQuery. Designed for rapid development of modern web interfaces, though marked as unstable and not recommended for production use.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-material
metadata.description: Material Design theme for hexo.

summary.zh: Material Theme 是一款专为 Hexo 博客框架设计的纯净 Material Design 风格主题，支持响应式布局和现代化 UI 交互。提供多版本下载（稳定版/开发版/历史版），集成 BrowserStack 浏览器兼容测试与 jsDelivr CDN 加速服务，具备完善的文档与社区支持。
summary.en: Material Theme is a pure Material Design theme for Hexo, featuring responsive layouts and modern UI interactions. It offers multiple download versions (stable/canary/historical), integrates BrowserStack for cross-browser testing, and uses jsDelivr CDN for fast asset delivery, backed by comprehensive documentation and community support.

metadata.name: vue
metadata.description: This is the repo for Vue 2. For Vue 3, go to https://github.com/vuejs/core

summary.zh: Vue 2 已于2023年12月31日终止维护，不再接收新功能、更新或修复。该仓库为 Vue 2 的归档版本，官方推荐新项目使用 Vue 3.x。Vue 是一个渐进式前端框架，核心库专注视图层，支持逐步采用，并拥有完善的生态系统（如 vue-router、vuex、vue-cli）。
summary.en: Vue 2 reached End of Life on December 31st, 2023 and no longer receives updates. This repository is archived for Vue 2. The actively maintained version is vuejs/core. Vue is a progressive framework for building user interfaces, designed to be incrementally adoptable with a core library focused on the view layer and a rich ecosystem for large-scale applications.

metadata.name: awesome-vue
metadata.description: 🎉 A curated list of awesome things related to Vue.js

summary.zh: Vue.js 生态精选资源库，涵盖官方文档、实战教程、UI组件库、企业级应用案例及开发工具，为开发者提供从入门到进阶的完整学习路径与生产级解决方案。
summary.en: A meticulously curated collection of Vue.js resources including official docs, tutorials, UI component libraries, enterprise case studies, and development tools, offering a complete learning path from beginner to production-ready solutions.

metadata.name: intercooler-js
metadata.description: Making AJAX as easy as anchor tags

summary.zh: Intercooler 是一个轻量级（6.74KB gzipped）的 AJAX 增强库，通过 HTML 属性即可实现类似锚标签的异步交互。它支持事件触发、进度指示、RESTful 依赖、AJAX 历史记录等功能，无需编写 JavaScript 即可构建现代 Web 应用，适用于渐进式增强现有项目。
summary.en: Intercooler is a lightweight (6.74KB gzipped) library that enables AJAX functionality using HTML attributes, similar to anchor tags. It supports event triggers, progress indicators, RESTful dependencies, AJAX history, and more, allowing developers to build modern web apps with minimal JavaScript, ideal for incremental enhancement of existing applications.

metadata.name: pageResponse
metadata.description: 移动端响应式插件

summary.zh: 移动端响应式插件通过transform:scale实现页面缩放适配，支持contain/cover/auto三种模式，兼容iOS4+与Android2.3+等老旧系统。采用视觉稿px单位直接适配，无需rem或媒体查询，零依赖仅1KB，适合单屏滑屏H5页面开发。
summary.en: A lightweight mobile responsive plugin using transform:scale for device adaptation. Supports contain/cover/auto modes with excellent legacy browser support (iOS4+/Android2.3+). Uses visual design px units directly without rem or media queries, ideal for single-screen H5 apps.

metadata.name: CSSgram
metadata.description: CSS library for Instagram filters

summary.zh: CSSgram 是一个基于 Sass 和 CSS 的 Instagram 滤镜库，通过 CSS 伪元素和混合模式为网页图片添加 Instagram 风格滤镜效果，支持 24 种经典滤镜（如 Aden、1977、Brooklyn 等），无需图像处理工具即可实现丰富的视觉风格，适用于现代浏览器（Chrome 43+、Firefox 38+ 等）。
summary.en: CSSgram is a Sass and CSS library that applies Instagram-like filters to images using CSS filters and blend modes via pseudo-elements. It offers 24 presets (e.g., Aden, 1977, Brooklyn) for web-based image styling without manual editing, compatible with modern browsers (Chrome 43+, Firefox 38+, etc.).

metadata.name: odoo
metadata.description: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.

summary.zh: Odoo 是一套基于开源技术的企业级业务应用套件，涵盖 CRM、电商、仓储、财务、项目管理等核心模块，支持模块化部署与无缝集成，提供完整的开源 ERP 解决方案。其低代码平台与 Python 技术栈便于二次开发，适用于中小企业数字化转型。
summary.en: Odoo is an open-source business application suite featuring integrated modules like CRM, eCommerce, accounting, and inventory management. Built on Python, it offers modular, scalable ERP solutions with seamless integration and extensive customization capabilities for growing businesses.

metadata.name: vue-beauty
metadata.description: Beautiful  UI components build with vue and ant design

summary.zh: vue-beauty 是一个基于 Vue 和 Ant Design 构建的精美 UI 组件库，提供丰富的常用场景组件，采用组件化开发模式，封装复杂逻辑并提供简洁 API，内置样式优化与 ES 新特性垫片，支持现代浏览器，助力开发者快速构建美观的 Vue 应用。
summary.en: vue-beauty is a beautiful UI component library built with Vue and Ant Design, offering a rich set of components for common scenarios. It follows Vue's component-driven architecture, encapsulates complexity with simple APIs, includes optimized Ant Design styling and ES polyfills, and supports modern browsers to accelerate Vue app development.

metadata.name: vue-carbon
metadata.description: 此项目已停止维护，建议迁移到  https://github.com/museui/muse-ui/

summary.zh: vue-carbon 是基于 Vue.js 1.0 开发的 Material Design 风格移动端 Web UI 库，提供丰富的组件如 Refresh Control、HeaderBar 等，支持 npm 安装与 webpack 集成，现已停止维护，推荐迁移至 Muse UI。
summary.en: Vue-carbon is a Material Design style mobile web UI library built with Vue.js 1.0, featuring components like Refresh Control and HeaderBar. It supports npm installation and webpack integration but is no longer maintained; migration to Muse UI is recommended.

metadata.name: Keen-UI
metadata.description: A lightweight Vue.js UI library with a simple API, inspired by Google's Material Design.

summary.zh: Keen UI 是一个轻量级 Vue.js 3 UI 组件库，采用简洁 API 设计，灵感来自 Google Material Design。它专注于交互式 JavaScript 组件，不依赖 CSS 框架，支持自定义主题与尺寸，并提供独立组件打包方案以优化体积。
summary.en: Keen UI is a lightweight Vue.js 3 UI library featuring a simple API inspired by Google's Material Design. It focuses on interactive JavaScript-driven components without bundling CSS frameworks, supports theme and sizing customization, and offers standalone component builds for bundle optimization.

metadata.name: element
metadata.description: A Vue.js 2.0 UI Toolkit for Web

summary.zh: Element 是一个基于 Vue.js 2.0 的企业级 UI 组件库，提供丰富的组件和完善的文档支持，适用于中后台管理系统开发。采用模块化设计，支持主题定制，具备完善的国际化方案，并拥有活跃的社区生态。
summary.en: Element is a Vue.js 2.0 UI toolkit for web development, offering a comprehensive set of components and documentation for enterprise-level applications. It features modular architecture, theme customization, full internationalization, and an active community ecosystem.

metadata.name: vue-strap
metadata.description: Bootstrap components built with Vue.js

summary.zh: VueStrap 是一个基于 Vue.js 和 Bootstrap 3 构建的原生组件库，提供无需 jQuery 依赖的轻量级 UI 解决方案。现已停止维护，推荐使用功能更完善的替代方案 BootstrapVue 或 uiv。
summary.en: VueStrap is a native Vue.js component library built on Bootstrap 3, offering jQuery-free UI components. It is no longer maintained; users are advised to migrate to BootstrapVue or uiv for enhanced features and accessibility.

metadata.name: vux
metadata.description: Mobile UI Components based on Vue & WeUI

summary.zh: Vux 是基于 Vue 2.3+ 和 WeUI 构建的移动端 UI 组件库，提供丰富的微信风格组件与交互效果。支持 webpack 构建，集成数据绑定与事件处理，适用于快速开发移动端 Web 应用，兼容主流移动浏览器。
summary.en: Vux is a mobile UI component library built on Vue 2.3+ and WeUI, offering rich WeChat-style components and interactions. It supports webpack build, data binding, and event handling, ideal for rapid mobile web app development with broad browser compatibility.

metadata.name: django-cors-headers
metadata.description: Django app for handling the server headers required for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)

summary.zh: django-cors-headers 是一个 Django 应用，用于自动为响应添加跨域资源共享（CORS）头，支持灵活配置允许的源、方法和头部，适用于前后端分离架构中安全地允许跨域请求。
summary.en: django-cors-headers is a Django app that automatically adds Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) headers to responses, enabling secure cross-origin requests from browsers with configurable origins, methods, and headers.

metadata.name: tabula
metadata.description: Tabula is a tool for liberating data tables trapped inside PDF files

summary.zh: Tabula 是一款开源工具，专用于从 PDF 文件中提取结构化表格数据，支持 CSV 格式输出。其核心优势在于本地化处理，确保数据安全，仅适用于文本型 PDF（非扫描件）。项目虽非活跃维护，但底层 Java 库 tabula-java 持续更新，适合数据分析师、记者等处理 PDF 表格的场景。
summary.en: Tabula is an open-source tool designed to extract structured table data from PDF files into CSV format. It emphasizes local processing for data security and works only with text-based PDFs (not scanned documents). While the main app is no longer actively maintained, the underlying tabula-java library continues to receive updates, making it suitable for data analysts and journalists handling PDF tables.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-diaspora
metadata.description: Hexo theme, Blog theme, Clean, Responsive theme

summary.zh: Hexo主题diaspora是一款简洁清新的响应式博客主题，支持Ajax加载、音乐播放、分类标签页和本地搜索功能，适合摄影、影评、乐评等文艺类博客，提供丰富的自定义配置选项。
summary.en: Hexo-theme-diaspora is a clean, responsive blog theme featuring Ajax loading, music playback, category/tag pages, and local search. Ideal for photography, film, and music reviews, it offers extensive customization via configuration options.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-Daily
metadata.description: A simple theme for Hexo

summary.zh: hexo-theme-Daily 是一个简洁优雅的 Hexo 主题，专为版本 4.x 设计，提供现代化的博客展示体验。支持 SASS 渲染，兼容 IE9+，内置完整文档和演示站点，适合个人或团队快速搭建美观静态博客。
summary.en: hexo-theme-Daily is a clean and modern theme for Hexo (v4.x), featuring simple design and full compatibility with IE9+. It supports SASS rendering, includes demo sites, documentation, and is ideal for building elegant static blogs quickly.

metadata.name: markcook
metadata.description: A smart and beautiful markdown editor.

summary.zh: Markcook 是一款基于 Vue 2.0 和 Vuex 2.0 开发的智能美观 Markdown 编辑器，采用 Google Material Design 风格。支持多文件切换、拖拽加载、自动保存至本地存储、一键插入 Markdown 语法及导出为 Markdown 或 HTML 文件，提供流畅的动画交互与护眼配色，兼具在线便捷性与本地应用体验。
