metadata.description: A high performance open-source forum software written in PHP. Discussions Tags based with Quora/StackOverflow style.

summary.zh: Carbon-Forum 是一款高性能开源 PHP 论坛系统，采用 Quora/StackOverflow 式标签讨论机制，支持移动端适配、实时推送、异步设计和完整 SEO 优化，具备现代通知中心与草稿保存功能，适用于构建高效知识分享社区。
summary.en: Carbon-Forum is a high-performance open-source PHP forum software featuring Quora/StackOverflow-style discussion tags, mobile support, real-time notifications, asynchronous architecture, and full SEO optimization, ideal for building efficient knowledge-sharing communities.

metadata.name: Carbon-Forum-API-Documentation
metadata.description: Carbon Forum HTTP API Documentation.

summary.zh: Carbon Forum HTTP API 文档为开发者提供完整的论坛接口规范，涵盖用户认证、帖子管理、通知系统等核心功能，支持分页浏览、安全验证码及头像上传，适用于构建第三方论坛客户端或集成自动化工具。
summary.en: Carbon Forum HTTP API Documentation provides comprehensive interface specifications for forum operations, including user authentication, topic management, notifications, and avatar handling. It supports pagination, security codes, and is designed for building third-party clients or integrating automation tools.

metadata.name: Android-Carbon-Forum
metadata.description: Android Client for Carbon Forum with Material Design.

summary.zh: Android-Carbon-Forum 是一个基于 Material Design 的 Carbon Forum 论坛 Android 客户端，提供流畅的移动端浏览体验，支持主题查看、发帖、登录、通知推送等功能，采用模块化架构便于二次开发和定制部署。
summary.en: Android-Carbon-Forum is an Android client for Carbon Forum built with Material Design, offering seamless mobile browsing, topic viewing, posting, login, and push notifications. It features a modular architecture for easy customization and deployment.

metadata.name: django-admin-bootstrapped
metadata.description: A Django admin theme using Twitter Bootstrap. It doesn't need any kind of modification on your side, just add it to the installed apps.

summary.zh: django-admin-bootstrapped 是一个为 Django 管理后台提供 Twitter Bootstrap 主题的插件，无需修改现有代码即可集成。它支持 Bootstrap 3 样式渲染、可拖拽排序内联表单、自定义 HTML 注入及 XHTML 兼容，显著提升管理界面的视觉体验与交互性。
summary.en: django-admin-bootstrapped is a Django admin theme powered by Twitter Bootstrap, requiring no code changes—just add it to INSTALLED_APPS. It offers Bootstrap 3 styling, drag-and-drop sortable inlines, custom HTML injection, XHTML compatibility, and enhanced message alerts for a modern admin interface.

metadata.name: WGestures
metadata.description: Modern mouse gestures for Windows. (C#)

summary.zh: WGestures 是一款现代化的 Windows 全局鼠标手势工具，支持 Win7/8/10，提供直观的手势操作以提升效率。采用 C# 开发，集成数字签名与安装程序，适用于快速执行系统命令或应用操作。
summary.en: WGestures is a modern global mouse gesture tool for Windows (Win7/8/10), enabling efficient navigation via intuitive gestures. Built in C# with digital signing and MSI installer support, it streamlines workflow automation through customizable gesture actions.

metadata.name: material-framework
metadata.description: [Unmaintained] An easy to use material design based framework.

summary.zh: Material Framework 是一个轻量级、纯 CSS 实现的 Material Design 前端框架，提供完整的组件样式与响应式布局支持，适用于快速构建现代化网页应用，依赖 Google Material Design 图标与自定义配色方案。
summary.en: Material Framework is a lightweight, CSS-only implementation of Material Design, offering complete component styling and responsive layouts for rapid development of modern web applications, leveraging Google's Material Design Icons and custom color schemes.

metadata.name: django-mysqlpool
metadata.description: Django database backend for MySQL that provides pooling ala SQLAlchemy.

summary.zh: django-mysqlpool 是一个基于 SQLAlchemy 的 Django MySQL 数据库后端，提供连接池功能，通过 Monkey-patch 方式无缝集成，避免冻结 Django 核心代码。支持自定义连接池实现与参数配置，有效限制进程级连接数，提升高并发场景下的数据库资源利用率。
summary.en: django-mysqlpool is a Django MySQL database backend leveraging SQLAlchemy for connection pooling. It uses monkey-patching to integrate seamlessly without freezing Django's core, supporting customizable pool implementations and arguments. It helps limit per-process connections, improving resource efficiency in high-concurrency environments.

metadata.name: XX-Net
metadata.description: A proxy tool to bypass GFW.

summary.zh: XX-Net 是一款运行9年的成熟翻墙工具，支持全平台多设备同时使用。其核心优势在于独创的流量混淆技术，能完美模拟Chrome浏览器行为，实现隐身级网络穿透。软件内置ChatGPT服务，提供百万级token额度，兼具隐私保护与AI生产力工具属性。
summary.en: XX-Net is a mature 9-year-old circumvention tool supporting multi-platform simultaneous connections. Its core strength lies in proprietary traffic obfuscation that mimics Chrome browser behavior for stealthy network bypass. The software integrates built-in ChatGPT with one million free tokens per plan, combining privacy protection with AI productivity features.

metadata.name: Django-ERP
metadata.description: Django-ERP是一款基于Django开发的ERP管理软件，包含常用的销售管理、采购管理、库存管理、组织管理等，支持按项目归集费用，支持工作流审批，支持采购单、报价单的批量导入。

summary.zh: Django-ERP是基于Django框架开发的开源企业资源管理系统，涵盖销售、采购、库存及组织管理模块，支持项目费用归集、工作流审批及单据批量导入，适用于中小企业内部管理需求。
summary.en: Django-ERP is an open-source ERP management system built on Django, featuring modules for sales, procurement, inventory, and organizational management. It supports project-based cost allocation, workflow approvals, and bulk import of purchase orders and quotations, ideal for SMEs seeking streamlined internal operations.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-next
metadata.description: Elegant theme for Hexo.

summary.zh: NexT 是一个高质量、优雅的 Hexo 主题，提供 Muse、Mist、Pisces 和 Gemini 四种精美配色方案，支持高度自定义配置，适用于个人博客与静态网站搭建。
summary.en: NexT is a high-quality, elegant Hexo theme featuring four distinct color schemes (Muse, Mist, Pisces, Gemini) with extensive customization options, ideal for personal blogs and static site generation.

metadata.name: material_design_zh_2
metadata.description: Material Design 中文版 ( 2015 年 8 月更新)

summary.zh: Material Design 中文版是 Google 官方设计规范的首个完整中文翻译项目，由 1sters 团队联合极客学院于 2015 年 8 月完成全面更新。该项目系统性地将 Material Design 核心理念、组件规范与交互原则转化为高质量中文文档，覆盖 60+ 章节，极大推动了中国开发者对现代移动 UI 设计的理解与实践。
summary.en: Material Design 中文版 is the first complete Chinese translation of Google's official design specification, collaboratively completed by the 1sters team and Geekbang Academy in August 2015. This project systematically translates core concepts, component specifications, and interaction principles of Material Design into high-quality documentation, covering over 60 chapters, significantly advancing the understanding and practice of modern mobile UI design among Chinese developers.

metadata.name: material_design_zh
metadata.description: Material Design 中文协同翻译 - design.1sters.com

summary.zh: Material Design 中文协同翻译项目致力于将 Google 官方 Material Design 规范完整翻译为中文，覆盖动画、样式、布局等核心模块，采用 GitHub 协作模式，支持多人参与翻译与校对，最终生成网页和 PDF 文档，助力国内设计师与开发者掌握统一设计语言。
summary.en: This project translates Google's Material Design specification into Chinese collaboratively, covering animation, style, layout, and more. It uses GitHub for open collaboration, enabling translators and reviewers to contribute, with final outputs published as web pages and PDFs to support designers and developers in adopting a unified design language.

metadata.name: Awesome-MaterialDesign
metadata.description: Collection of material design libs and res.

summary.zh: Awesome-MaterialDesign 是一个精选的 Android Material Design 资源与库集合，涵盖官方文档、Google 示例项目、设计资源及第三方开源库，为开发者提供从设计规范到 UI 组件实现的完整解决方案，助力快速构建符合 Material Design 标准的 Android 应用。
summary.en: Awesome-MaterialDesign is a curated collection of Android Material Design resources and libraries, including official docs, Google sample projects, design assets, and third-party open-source libraries, providing a complete solution for developers to build Material Design-compliant Android apps efficiently.

metadata.name: essay
metadata.description: Python项目自动化多服务器部署的工具

summary.zh: essay 是一个基于 Fabric 的 Python 项目自动化部署工具，支持多服务器打包与部署。它通过标准化流程简化开发到生产环境的交付，集成 PyPI 服务器和 Git 仓库，提供快速构建、版本化打包、虚拟环境管理及 Supervisord 进程控制，适用于需高效扩展的 Python 服务场景。
summary.en: Essay is a Python project automation deployment tool based on Fabric, supporting multi-server packaging and deployment. It streamlines the development-to-production pipeline with standardized workflows, integrating PyPI servers and Git repositories. It enables rapid builds, versioned packaging, virtual environment management, and Supervisord process control, ideal for scalable Python service deployments.

metadata.name: android-dev-com
metadata.description: Some Famous Android Developers Information, 微信公众号:codekk, 网站:

summary.zh: 该仓库整理了全球知名 Android 开发者及其公司信息，涵盖 Google、Square 等核心贡献者的 GitHub 和博客链接，重点展示 Picasso、okhttp、EventBus 等经典开源项目作者，提供开发者影响力与项目关联的权威参考。
summary.en: This repository compiles information about renowned Android developers and their companies, featuring core contributors from Google, Square, and others. It highlights authors of iconic open-source projects like Picasso, okhttp, and EventBus, serving as a reference for developer influence and project affiliations.

metadata.name: android-dev-cn
metadata.description: Some Chinese Android Developers Information, 微信公众号:codekk, 网站:

summary.zh: 该仓库整理了中国知名 Android 开发者信息，包含 GitHub 账号、博客链接及个人简介，涵盖源码分析、性能优化、动画开发、开源项目等多个方向，是中文 Android 开发者社区的重要资源集合。
summary.en: This repository compiles information about prominent Chinese Android developers, including GitHub profiles, blog links, and professional introductions, covering areas such as source code analysis, performance optimization, animation development, and open-source projects, serving as a key resource for the Chinese Android developer community.

metadata.name: Photo-Sphere-Viewer
metadata.description: A JavaScript library to display Photo Sphere panoramas.

summary.zh: Photo Sphere Viewer 是一个基于 Three.js 的 JavaScript 库，用于在网页上展示 360×180 度全景图。支持 equirectangular 投影格式，兼容 Android 4.2+ 拍摄的照片球，提供丰富的交互控制与自定义选项，适用于虚拟旅游、房地产展示等场景。
summary.en: Photo Sphere Viewer is a JavaScript library built on Three.js for displaying 360×180 degree panoramas on web pages. It supports equirectangular projection, integrates with Android Photo Sphere, and offers extensive customization and interaction features for immersive experiences.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: 没事写写文章，喜欢的话请点star，想订阅点watch，千万别fork！

summary.zh: 该仓库是作者个人技术博客，专注于前端工程化实践与性能优化，涵盖前端集成、模块化开发、自动化测试、部署流程等核心议题，并收录业界最佳实践与经典技术文章，适合前端工程师系统性提升工程能力。
summary.en: This repository hosts a personal technical blog focused on front-end engineering, covering topics like integration, modular development, automated testing, and deployment. It includes industry best practices and classic articles to help front-end engineers enhance their engineering capabilities.

metadata.name: qiandao
metadata.description: 签到

summary.zh: qiandao 是一个基于 HAR 编辑器的自动化签到框架，支持多平台自动签到任务管理。核心功能包括通过 HAR 文件录制与编辑浏览器操作，结合 Python 脚本实现定时自动签到，支持邮件通知与数据库存储。提供 Web 管理界面与 Docker 部署方案，适用于各类周期性签到场景，如论坛、学习平台等。
summary.en: Qiandao is an automated check-in framework based on HAR editor, enabling scheduled check-ins across multiple platforms. It records and edits browser actions via HAR files, executes tasks using Python scripts, and supports email notifications and database storage. Features include a web admin interface and Docker deployment, ideal for recurring check-in scenarios such as forums and learning platforms.

metadata.name: GetCookies
metadata.description: Assistant for get HTTP ONLY Cookies.

summary.zh: GetCookies 是一款 Chrome 扩展插件，专为突破 HTTP ONLY 限制而设计，可安全获取指定域下的 Cookie 数据。通过自定义 DOM 属性触发 Cookie 提取，支持跨域、指定名称与域名，并通过 postMessage 机制实现安全的跨页面通信，适用于自动化登录与数据抓取场景。
summary.en: GetCookies is a Chrome extension that bypasses HTTP ONLY restrictions to securely extract cookies from specified domains. It triggers cookie retrieval via custom DOM attributes, supports cross-domain access, allows naming and domain filtering, and uses postMessage for safe cross-page communication, ideal for automation and login workflows.

metadata.name: hexo
metadata.description: A fast, simple & powerful blog framework, powered by Node.js.

summary.zh: Hexo 是一个基于 Node.js 的快速、简洁且强大的博客框架，支持 GitHub Flavored Markdown 和 Octopress 插件，提供一键部署到 GitHub Pages 等功能，拥有强大的 API 和丰富的主题插件生态。
summary.en: Hexo is a fast, simple & powerful blog framework powered by Node.js, supporting GitHub Flavored Markdown and Octopress plugins, with one-command deployment to platforms like GitHub Pages, a robust API, and extensive themes and plugins.

metadata.name: django
metadata.description: The Web framework for perfectionists with deadlines.

summary.zh: Django 是一个高级 Python Web 框架，专为追求高效开发流程的务实开发者设计。它提供开箱即用的功能，支持快速构建安全、可维护的 Web 应用，内置 ORM、管理后台、认证系统和 URL 路由等核心组件，极大提升开发效率。
summary.en: Django is a high-level Python web framework designed for developers who value rapid development and clean, pragmatic design. It provides built-in features like ORM, admin interface, authentication, and URL routing, enabling secure and maintainable web application development with minimal boilerplate code.

metadata.name: GeekBlog
metadata.description: A full blog system based on Django

summary.zh: GeekBlog是一个基于Django 1.6.5构建的全功能博客系统，集成MySQL和MongoDB双数据库，支持UEditor富文本编辑、多说评论、移动端适配及静态资源优化。通过django-admin-tools深度定制后台管理界面，具备完整的Feed和Sitemap功能，适合技术博主部署个人站点。
summary.en: GeekBlog is a full-featured blog system built on Django 1.6.5, utilizing MySQL and MongoDB for data storage. It features UEditor rich text editing, Duoshuo comments, mobile responsiveness, and static asset optimization via Django Pipeline. The backend is enhanced with django-admin-tools for improved admin experience, supporting feeds and sitemaps for SEO.

metadata.name: django-guardian
metadata.description: Per object permissions for Django

summary.zh: django-guardian 是 Django 的细粒度对象权限管理库，通过扩展 Django 的授权后端实现基于对象的权限控制。支持为单个模型实例分配权限，适用于需要复杂权限模型的应用场景，如多租户系统或内容协作平台。
summary.en: django-guardian is a Django library implementing per-object permissions by extending Django's authorization backend. It enables fine-grained access control at the object level, allowing assignment of permissions to individual model instances—ideal for multi-tenant or collaborative applications requiring complex permission models.

metadata.name: mayblog
metadata.description: Yet another django based blog created in May 2015

summary.zh: MayBlog 是一个基于 Django 和 Bootstrap 开发的博客系统，于2015年5月创建。支持多用户、多角色、Markdown 写作、SEO 优化，并通过 Docker 实现容器化部署。提供 RESTful API（开发中）和后台管理界面，采用微服务架构设计，适合个人或团队搭建内容管理平台。
summary.en: MayBlog is a Django and Bootstrap-based blog system created in May 2015. It supports multi-user, multi-role access, Markdown writing, SEO optimization, and containerized deployment via Docker. Features include RESTful API (in development), admin interface, and modular deployment configurations, ideal for personal or team content management.

metadata.name: django-pagination
metadata.description: A set of utilities for creating robust pagination tools throughout a django application.

summary.zh: django-pagination 提供了一套用于在 Django 应用中构建健壮分页工具的实用程序，现已停止维护。其维护分支可在 pydanny/dj-pagination 获取，适用于需要高效处理大量数据展示的 Web 项目。
summary.en: django-pagination offers utilities for building robust pagination tools in Django applications. This project is no longer maintained; a supported fork is available at pydanny/dj-pagination, ideal for web apps requiring efficient data pagination.

metadata.name: django-bootstrap-pagination
metadata.description: Django template tag for rendering Page objects as Bootstrap pagination HTML

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Django 模板标签，用于将 Django 的 Page 对象渲染为兼容 Bootstrap 的分页 HTML。支持 Bootstrap 2.x/3.x/4.x 版本，提供灵活的配置选项如页码范围、前后跳转链接等，适用于 Django 1.2+ 项目，现已归档不再维护。
summary.en: This Django template tag renders Page objects into Bootstrap-compatible pagination HTML. It supports Bootstrap 2.x/3.x/4.x, offers configurable options like page ranges and prev/next links, and is compatible with Django 1.2+. The project is now archived and no longer maintained.

metadata.name: python_sdk
metadata.description: python_sdk for TencentYoutuyun-person-face-service

summary.zh: 腾讯云优图人脸服务Python SDK，提供人脸检测、比对、识别、验证及人脸库管理功能，支持本地图片与URL输入，集成API签名鉴权，适用于身份认证、安防监控等场景。
summary.en: Tencent YouTu Face Service Python SDK enables face detection, comparison, recognition, and verification, with support for local images and URLs. It includes API authentication and person/group management, ideal for identity verification and security applications.

metadata.name: django-socketio
metadata.description: WebSockets for Django

summary.zh: django-socketio 是一个 BSD 许可的 Django 应用，通过集成 gevent-socketio 实现 WebSocket 支持，提供频道订阅、事件广播和信号式事件系统，支持实时通信与自动重载服务器，适用于需要实时交互的 Django 项目。
summary.en: django-socketio is a BSD-licensed Django application that enables WebSocket support via gevent-socketio, offering channel-based subscriptions, event broadcasting, and a signals-like event system for real-time communication in Django projects.

metadata.name: DroidPlugin
metadata.description: A plugin framework on android,Run any third-party apk without installation, modification or repackage

summary.zh: DroidPlugin 是一个 Android 插件框架，支持在不安装、不修改、不重打包第三方 APK 的前提下运行插件应用。它通过代码隔离、资源管理和进程回收机制，实现宿主应用与插件应用的完全解耦，兼容 Android 2.3+，仅需一行代码即可集成，适用于协作开发和动态插件化场景。
summary.en: DroidPlugin is an Android plugin framework enabling the host app to run any third-party APK without installation, modification, or repackaging. It provides complete code and resource isolation, process management, and system API support, requiring only one line of code integration and compatible with Android 2.3+. Ideal for dynamic pluginization and collaborative development.

metadata.name: weixin_sogou
metadata.description: 爬取微信公众号文章

summary.zh: 该仓库通过搜狗微信接口爬取微信公众号文章，支持获取账号信息、文章列表及全文内容，集成反爬虫机制与动态渲染技术，适用于内容聚合与数据分析场景。
summary.en: This repository scrapes WeChat Official Account articles via Sogou's WeChat search platform, supporting account info retrieval, article list parsing, and full content extraction. It includes anti-scraping measures and dynamic rendering support for content aggregation and data analysis.

metadata.name: leanote
metadata.description: Not Just A Notepad! (golang + mongodb) http://leanote.org

summary.zh: Leanote 是一款功能强大的开源笔记应用，采用 Go 语言和 MongoDB 构建，提供富文本和 Markdown 编辑器，支持 Vim/Emacs 编辑模式、知识管理、协作分享及博客发布。它弥补了 Evernote 在代码高亮、实时渲染、跨平台支持等方面的不足，适合个人与团队知识管理。
summary.en: Leanote is a powerful open-source note-taking app built with Go and MongoDB, featuring rich-text and Markdown editors, Vim/Emacs modes, knowledge management, collaboration, and blogging. It addresses Evernote's limitations in code syntax highlighting, real-time rendering, and cross-platform support, ideal for personal and team knowledge management.

metadata.name: hug
metadata.description: Embrace the APIs of the future. Hug aims to make developing APIs as simple as possible, but no simpler.

summary.zh: Hug 是一个极简且高性能的 Python API 框架，基于 Falcon 构建，大幅简化 API 开发流程。支持自动文档生成、参数类型转换、路由装饰器等功能，强调自文档化、快速开发和测试友好，适用于现代 Python 后端服务开发。
summary.en: Hug is a minimalist, high-performance Python API framework built on Falcon that simplifies API development. It features automatic documentation, type conversion, decorators for routing, and emphasizes self-documenting code, fast development, and easy testing for modern Python backend services.

metadata.name: uliweb
metadata.description: Simple and easy use python web framework

summary.zh: Uliweb 是一个基于 Python 的全栈 Web 框架，核心设计目标是可重用性、可配置性和可替换性。采用 MVT 架构，支持模块化应用开发，集成 Werkzeug 路由、SQLAlchemy ORM 和 Alembic 数据库迁移，内置表单处理、国际化、缓存与会话管理，模板支持原生 Python 代码，提升开发效率与代码复用。
summary.en: Uliweb is a full-stack Python web framework emphasizing reusability, configurability, and replaceability. It uses the MVT pattern, modular apps, Werkzeug routing, SQLAlchemy ORM with Alembic migrations, built-in form handling, i18n, caching, and session management. Templates support native Python code, enabling efficient and DRY development.

metadata.name: splinter
metadata.description: splinter - python test framework for web applications

summary.zh: Splinter 是一个简洁易用的 Python Web 应用自动化测试框架，提供直观的 API 支持浏览器交互自动化。它基于 Selenium 构建，支持多浏览器驱动，具备快速开发、灵活扩展和真实场景适配能力，适用于 Web 测试、爬虫及自动化任务。
summary.en: Splinter is a simple and consistent Python framework for automating web applications. Built on Selenium, it offers an intuitive API for browser automation, supporting multiple drivers and real-world use cases. Ideal for testing, scraping, and UI automation with robust and flexible capabilities.

metadata.name: markyun
metadata.description: 在Github的学习片段

summary.zh: MarkYun Bolg 是一个 GitHub 托管的个人技术博客，涵盖前端开发、摄影等内容。作者为南京 Web 开发者，定期更新前端面试题与 Web 技术周刊，提供学习记录与技术见解，支持 Star 与 Issue 互动。
summary.en: MarkYun Bolg is a GitHub-hosted personal blog by a Nanjing-based Web Developer, covering front-end development, photography, and technical insights. It features updated front-end interview questions and a weekly Web intelligence newsletter, encouraging community engagement via Star and Issue submissions.

metadata.name: scrapy-redis
metadata.description: Redis-based components for Scrapy.

summary.zh: Scrapy-Redis 是基于 Redis 的分布式爬虫组件，支持多实例共享任务队列与去重，实现高效分布式网页抓取与后处理。提供 Scrapy 即插即用调度器、去重过滤器、Item Pipeline 及基础 Spider，增强爬虫扩展性与并发能力。
summary.en: Scrapy-Redis provides Redis-based distributed components for Scrapy, enabling shared task queues and deduplication across multiple spider instances. It supports distributed crawling, post-processing, and plug-and-play architecture with scheduler, filter, and pipeline components for scalable web scraping.

metadata.name: casecode
metadata.description: DCloud开源项目集锦

summary.zh: DCloud开源项目合集，涵盖uni-app、uni-app x、uniCloud、UTS等全栈开发框架的示例工程，提供uni-ai x全平台AI聊天套件及uVue语法测试项目，助力开发者快速构建跨平台移动应用与云端一体化解决方案。
summary.en: DCloud's open-source project collection featuring example projects for uni-app, uni-app x, uniCloud, UTS, and more, including the open-source cross-platform AI chat suite uni-ai-x and uVue syntax test project, enabling rapid development of mobile and cloud-integrated applications.

metadata.name: django-simple-avatar
metadata.description: A reusable django application for handling Avatars.

summary.zh: django-simple-avatar 是一个可复用的 Django 应用，用于处理用户头像。支持默认使用 Gravatar 作为头像，自动生缩略图并存储至默认文件存储后端，简化头像管理流程。
summary.en: django-simple-avatar is a reusable Django app for handling user avatars. It supports default Gravatar fallback, automatically generates thumbnails, and stores them in the default file storage backend for efficient retrieval.

metadata.name: django-avatar
metadata.description: MOVED TO https://github.com/jezdez/django-avatar

summary.zh: 该仓库已迁移至新地址，原项目不再维护。新的 django-avatar 项目由 jezdez 维护，提供 Django 应用的用户头像管理功能，支持图片上传、裁剪和显示，适用于需要用户头像功能的 Web 应用。
summary.en: This repository is outdated - the new one is at https://github.com/jezdez/django-avatar. The new django-avatar project by jezdez provides user avatar management for Django apps, supporting image upload, cropping, and display for web applications requiring user profile pictures.

metadata.name: django-userena
metadata.description: Accounts for Django made beautifully simple

summary.zh: Django Userena 是一个为 Django 项目提供完整账户管理的开源应用，涵盖用户注册、激活、消息通知等功能，采用 BSD 许可可免费商用。其核心优势在于高度可定制性与开箱即用的用户体验，显著简化 Django 用户认证系统的开发流程。
summary.en: Django Userena is an open-source Django application that provides complete account management including signup, activation, and messaging. It features full customization, BSD licensing for free commercial use, and streamlines user authentication development with a polished, production-ready interface.

metadata.name: materialize
metadata.description: Materialize, a CSS Framework based on Material Design

summary.zh: MaterializeCSS 是基于 Material Design 原则构建的现代化 CSS 框架，提供丰富的预构建组件（如导航栏、卡片、表单）和流畅的动画效果，支持响应式布局与主流浏览器兼容，适用于快速开发美观且用户友好的 Web 应用。
summary.en: MaterializeCSS is a modern CSS framework based on Material Design principles, offering a rich set of pre-built components (e.g., navigation, cards, forms) with smooth animations and responsive layouts, compatible with major browsers for rapid development of visually appealing and user-friendly web applications.

metadata.name: mui
metadata.description: Lightweight CSS framework

summary.zh: MUI 是一个轻量级 CSS 框架，严格遵循 Google 的 Material Design 设计规范，提供响应式网格系统、无依赖组件和邮件样式支持，核心优势在于极小的体积（CSS 6.6KB，JS 5.4KB）和高度可定制性，适合快速构建现代化网页界面。
summary.en: MUI is a lightweight CSS framework adhering to Google's Material Design guidelines, offering a responsive grid, zero dependencies, customizable styling, and email support. Key strengths include minimal footprint (6.6KB CSS, 5.4KB JS gzipped) and async JS loading for fast, modern web development.

metadata.name: python3-cookbook
metadata.description: 《Python Cookbook》 3rd Edition Translation

summary.zh: 《Python Cookbook》3rd Edition 中文翻译项目，由David Beazley原著，完整覆盖Python 3.6特性，提供100+实用代码示例，涵盖数据结构、并发编程、网络开发等核心领域，是中文开发者掌握Python 3的权威实践指南。
summary.en: This is the Chinese translation of 'Python Cookbook' 3rd Edition by David Beazley, featuring 100+ practical Python 3.6 code examples across core domains like data structures, concurrency, and network programming, serving as an authoritative hands-on guide for Chinese developers mastering Python 3.

metadata.name: rsted
metadata.description: [UNMAINTAINED] Online reStructuredText editor

summary.zh: rsted 是一个基于 Flask 的在线 reStructuredText 编辑器，提供实时预览功能，支持通过 Docker 快速部署。虽然项目已停止维护，但可作为轻量级 RST 文档编辑工具使用，适合快速编写和预览技术文档。
summary.en: rsted is a simple online reStructuredText editor built with Flask, offering real-time preview. Though unmaintained, it provides a lightweight solution for editing and previewing RST documents, deployable via Docker or local server on port 5000.

metadata.name: django-celery
metadata.description: Old Celery integration project for Django

summary.zh: django-celery 是 Celery 与 Django 的集成项目，专为 Celery v3.x 至 v4.x 设计，提供基于 Django ORM 和缓存的结果存储、任务模块自动发现及后台管理功能。现已停止维护，推荐使用新版 Celery 教程替代。
summary.en: django-celery is a legacy integration project for Celery with Django, supporting Celery v3.x to v4.x only. It enables Django ORM-based result storage, automatic task discovery, and admin integration. The project is no longer actively maintained; users are advised to follow the updated Celery Django tutorial.

summary.zh: 本仓库提供 Android Design Support Library 的完整教程，包含60分钟实战项目，涵盖 Snackbar、FloatingActionButton、NavigationView 等核心组件的集成与交互实现，适合 Android 开发者学习现代 UI 设计模式。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive 60-minute codelab tutorial on the Android Design Support Library, demonstrating integration of key UI components like Snackbar, FloatingActionButton, and NavigationView to build modern Android interfaces with Material Design principles.

metadata.name: SwiftGuide
metadata.description: Swift Featured Projects in brain Mapping

summary.zh: 本项目精选 Swift 开源项目，聚焦应用架构与思维导图形式呈现，涵盖主流开发工具、框架及实践案例，助力开发者快速掌握 Swift 生态。内容持续更新，强调项目影响力、可持续性与实用性，适合中高级开发者参考。
summary.en: This project curates high-quality Swift open-source projects with a focus on application architecture and mind maps. It covers frameworks, tools, and best practices, providing a structured reference for Swift developers. Content emphasizes influence, sustainability, and practicality, targeting intermediate to advanced developers.

metadata.name: echarts
metadata.description: Apache ECharts is a powerful, interactive charting and data visualization library for browser

summary.zh: Apache ECharts 是一个强大的开源数据可视化库，基于纯 JavaScript 和 zrender 构建，支持丰富的交互式图表（如折线图、柱状图、热力图等），提供高度可定制的配置选项，适用于商业产品中的数据可视化需求，支持 npm 安装、CDN 引入及多语言文档。
summary.en: Apache ECharts is a free, powerful charting and visualization library for browsers, built with pure JavaScript and zrender. It offers intuitive, interactive, and highly customizable charts for commercial products, with support for npm, CDN, and comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: django-brake
metadata.description: Django Brake - a versatile ratelimiting app for Django.

summary.zh: Django Brake 是一个为 Django 框架设计的速率限制应用，支持基于 IP 地址或请求字段（GET/POST）的灵活限流策略。它提供装饰器接口，可阻止超限请求或标记请求状态，适用于登录防护、API 保护等场景，兼容 Django 1.3+ 并支持多时间阈值与路径级限流。
summary.en: Django Brake is a versatile rate-limiting app for Django that uses decorators to limit views based on IP or request fields (GET/POST). It supports blocking or annotating exceeded requests, with configurable time thresholds and path-based buckets. Designed as a maintained fork of Django Ratelimit, it enhances flexibility for login protection and API security.

metadata.name: django-ratelimit
metadata.description: Cache-based rate-limiting for Django

summary.zh: Django Ratelimit 是一个基于缓存的 Django 速率限制中间件，通过装饰器为视图提供灵活的限流功能，支持基于 IP 地址或请求参数（GET/POST）进行访问控制，适用于防止滥用和保障 API 安全。
summary.en: Django Ratelimit is a cache-based rate-limiting library for Django that uses decorators to limit view access, configurable by IP address or request parameters (GET/POST), ideal for preventing abuse and securing APIs.

metadata.name: typo.css
metadata.description: 中文网页重设与排版：一致化浏览器排版效果，构建最适合中文阅读的网页排版

summary.zh: typo.css 是一个专为中文网页设计的样式重置与排版工具，旨在统一浏览器渲染差异，优化中文阅读体验。它提供完整的 reset 样式、阅读内容排版类 `.typo` 及专名号、着重号等中文排版增强功能，支持桌面与移动端，适用于文章、文档等长文本场景。
summary.en: typo.css is a CSS framework designed for Chinese web typography, aiming to standardize browser rendering and optimize readability. It offers a complete reset, a `.typo` class for article layouts, and enhancements like underlines for proper nouns and emphasis marks, supporting both desktop and mobile platforms.

metadata.name: github-cheat-sheet
metadata.description: A list of cool features of Git and GitHub.

summary.zh: 本项目是 GitHub 和 Git 的高级功能速查表，涵盖隐藏特性如忽略空白符、分支对比、行号高亮、任务列表、Emoji 支持、Gist 使用、Hub 工具等，帮助开发者提升工作效率，适用于日常开发协作与代码审查场景。
summary.en: This repository provides a comprehensive cheat sheet of advanced Git and GitHub features, including whitespace ignoring, branch comparisons, line highlighting, task lists, emoji support, Gists, Hub CLI, and more—designed to boost developer productivity in collaborative coding and code review workflows.

metadata.name: DeerResume
metadata.description: MarkDown在线简历工具，可在线预览、编辑和生成PDF。[此项目已不再维护，建议使用 cv.ftqq.com 替代 ]

summary.zh: DeerResume 是一款功能强大的 Markdown 在线简历工具，支持实时编辑、预览、密码保护和一键生成 PDF。用户可自主部署，自由定制样式，适用于技术岗位简历制作，尤其适合开发者使用。
summary.en: DeerResume is a powerful Markdown-based online resume tool that supports real-time editing, preview, password protection, and PDF generation. It allows self-hosting with customizable styles, making it ideal for developers creating professional tech resumes.

metadata.name: ResumeSample
metadata.description: Resume template for Chinese programmers . 程序员简历模板系列。包括PHP程序员简历模板、iOS程序员简历模板、Android程序员简历模板、Web前端程序员简历模板、Java程序员简历模板、C/C++程序员简历模板、NodeJS程序员简历模板、架构师简历模板以及通用程序员简历模板

summary.zh: 本项目提供涵盖PHP、iOS、Android、Web前端、Java、C/C++、NodeJS、架构师等9类程序员岗位的中文简历模板，支持Markdown格式，由AI职业顾问职小兔®优化设计。配套提供在线简历工具冷熊简历与自建版DeerResume，并附《如何写好技术简历》教学资源，助力程序员高效打造专业简历。
summary.en: This repo offers 9 resume templates for Chinese programmers, covering PHP, iOS, Android, Web Frontend, Java, C/C++, NodeJS, and Architect roles in Markdown format, optimized by AI career advisor 职小兔®. It includes tools like Cold Bear Resume and DeerResume, plus teaching resources on writing effective tech resumes to help developers build professional profiles.

metadata.name: free-programming-books-zh_CN
metadata.description: :books: 免费的计算机编程类中文书籍，欢迎投稿

summary.zh: 本项目是免费的中文编程书籍索引库，涵盖操作系统、Web开发、算法、大数据等语言无关和语言相关的计算机技术书籍，提供高质量的学习资源集合，支持社区投稿与更新，助力程序员技能提升。
summary.en: This repository provides a curated collection of free Chinese programming books covering computer science fundamentals, web development, algorithms, and major programming languages, serving as a valuable learning resource for developers with community-driven contributions.

metadata.name: jquery-mobile-flat-ui-theme
metadata.description: jQuery Mobile Flat UI Theme

summary.zh: jQuery Mobile Flat UI Theme 是一款基于 Flat-UI 设计风格的移动端主题，提供现代化扁平化界面，支持 jQuery Mobile 1.3.0 至 1.4 版本，通过 Stylus 和 Grunt 实现自定义配色与样式扩展，适用于快速构建美观的移动端 Web 应用。
summary.en: jQuery Mobile Flat UI Theme is a modern, flat design theme for jQuery Mobile inspired by Flat-UI. It supports versions 1.3.0 to 1.4, allows custom swatches via Stylus and Grunt, and enables rapid development of visually appealing mobile web applications.

metadata.name: Jndroid.js
metadata.description: Building WebApp in Android way.

summary.zh: Jndroid 是一个 JavaScript 框架，允许开发者以 Android 原生应用的方式构建 WebApp。它通过提供类似 Android 的 UI 组件（如 TextView）和 setContentView 等 API，简化了 Web 应用的开发流程，适用于需要跨平台或移动端体验优化的场景。
summary.en: Jndroid is a JavaScript framework enabling WebApp development in an Android-like manner. It provides Android-style UI components (e.g., TextView) and APIs like setContentView, simplifying cross-platform mobile web app development with native-like structure.

metadata.name: jQuery-rwdImageMaps
metadata.description: Responsive Image Maps jQuery Plugin

summary.zh: jQuery RWD Image Maps 是一个响应式图像地图插件，通过动态重计算坐标，使 HTML 图像映射在窗口缩放或图像尺寸变化时保持精准定位，适用于响应式网页设计中的交互式图像区域。
summary.en: jQuery RWD Image Maps is a responsive image maps plugin that recalculates area coordinates dynamically to maintain accurate clickable regions when images resize, ideal for interactive responsive web designs using HTML image maps.

metadata.name: gollum
metadata.description: A simple, Git-powered wiki with a local frontend and support for many kinds of markup and content.

summary.zh: Gollum 是一个基于 Git 的轻量级 Wiki 系统，支持多种标记语言（如 Markdown、AsciiDoc 等），提供本地前端界面和版本控制功能。它允许用户通过 Git 仓库管理 Wiki 页面，支持实时编辑、历史回溯、数学公式、图表（Mermaid/PlantUML）、BibTeX 引用等高级功能，兼容 GitHub/GitLab Wiki，适合团队协作与知识管理。
summary.en: Gollum is a Git-powered wiki system that enables version-controlled, human-editable text files organized in a Git repository. It supports multiple markup languages, real-time editing, page history, diagrams (Mermaid/PlantUML), math rendering, citations, and integrates seamlessly with GitHub/GitLab wikis for collaborative documentation.

metadata.name: jieba
metadata.description: 结巴中文分词

summary.zh: 结巴（jieba）是Python最优秀的中文分词组件，支持精确、全模式、搜索引擎及Paddle深度学习模式四种分词方式，具备新词发现、自定义词典和词性标注能力，采用前缀词典与HMM模型结合的高效算法，适用于文本分析、搜索引擎等场景。
summary.en: Jieba is the best Python-based Chinese text segmentation module, supporting four modes: precise, full, search engine, and Paddle deep learning. It features new word discovery, custom dictionaries, and part-of-speech tagging, using efficient algorithms like prefix dictionaries and HMM models for text analysis and search engines.

metadata.name: python-qrcode
metadata.description: Python QR Code image generator

summary.zh: 纯 Python 编写的 QR 码生成库，支持生成 PNG、SVG 等格式图像，提供命令行工具和 Python API。可自定义尺寸、颜色、纠错等级等参数，适用于快速生成二维码并集成到自动化流程中。
summary.en: A pure Python library for generating QR codes, supporting PNG, SVG, and console output. Offers command-line interface and Python API with customizable parameters like size, colors, and error correction levels, ideal for automation and integration.

metadata.name: cow
metadata.description: HTTP proxy written in Go. COW can automatically identify blocked sites and use parent proxies to access.

summary.zh: COW 是一个基于 Go 编写的智能 HTTP 代理工具，专为简化科学上网设计。它能自动识别被墙网站并仅对这些网站启用二级代理（如 Shadowsocks、SOCKS5 等），直连网站则绕过代理以提升访问速度。支持多类型二级代理、负载均衡、PAC 自动配置及访问行为学习，适用于移动设备或 APN 代理场景。
summary.en: COW (Climb Over the Wall) is an intelligent HTTP proxy written in Go, designed to simplify bypassing internet restrictions. It automatically detects blocked websites and routes only those through secondary proxies (e.g., Shadowsocks, SOCKS5), while allowing direct access to uncensored sites for optimal speed. Features include multi-proxy support, load balancing, PAC generation, and adaptive learning of site accessibility patterns.

metadata.name: MPAndroidChart
metadata.description: A powerful 🚀 Android chart view / graph view library, supporting line- bar- pie- radar- bubble- and candlestick charts as well as scaling, panning and animations.

summary.zh: MPAndroidChart 是一个功能强大且易于使用的 Android 图表库，支持折线图、柱状图、饼图、雷达图、气泡图和 K 线图等多种图表类型，具备缩放、平移和动画功能，适用于数据可视化场景。
summary.en: MPAndroidChart is a powerful and easy-to-use Android chart library supporting line, bar, pie, radar, bubble, and candlestick charts with scaling, panning, and animations for data visualization.

metadata.name: bootstrap-star-rating
metadata.description: A simple yet powerful JQuery star rating plugin with fractional rating support.

summary.zh: bootstrap-star-rating 是一款基于 jQuery 的 Bootstrap 星级评分插件，支持分数评级、RTL 方向及纯 CSS3 矢量图标渲染。它可自动将输入框转换为评分控件，兼容 Bootstrap 3/4/5，并支持 FontAwesome 等字体图标库，适用于需要灵活星级评分功能的 Web 应用。
summary.en: bootstrap-star-rating is a jQuery plugin for Bootstrap that enables star rating controls with fractional support, RTL compatibility, and pure CSS3 styling. It auto-converts inputs marked with class 'rating', supports Bootstrap 3/4/5, and integrates with font icon libraries like FontAwesome for scalable vector star symbols.

metadata.name: v2ex-android
metadata.description: 爱V2EX（原掌上V2EX）

summary.zh: 爱V2EX是一款非官方的V2EX社区Android客户端，提供话题浏览、节点搜索、用户资料查看、话题创建与回复、未读提醒等功能，支持滑动手势操作，界面简洁易用，完全开源并遵循GPL协议。
summary.en: V2EX-android is a non-official Android client for the V2EX community, offering features like topic browsing, node search, user profiles, topic creation/replies, and unread notifications. It supports gesture navigation and is fully open-source under the GPL license.

metadata.name: AndroidAssetStudio
metadata.description: A set of web-based tools for generating graphics and other assets that would eventually be in an Android application's res/ directory.

summary.zh: Android Asset Studio 是一个已停止维护的网页工具集，用于生成 Android 应用资源文件（如图标、通知图、九宫格等），现推荐使用 icon.kitchen 或 Android Studio 内置工具替代。
summary.en: The Android Asset Studio was a web-based toolset for generating Android app assets (e.g., icons, notifications, nine-patches). It is no longer maintained; users are advised to switch to icon.kitchen or Android Studio's built-in tools.

metadata.name: PyTime
metadata.description: PyTime is an easy-use Python module which aims to operate date/time/datetime by string.

summary.zh: PyTime 是一个简洁易用的 Python 模块，专注于通过字符串操作日期、时间和 datetime 对象。它支持解析非标准格式的日期字符串（如 '2015.5.17'、'April 3rd 2015'），并允许通过自然语言式字符串进行时间加减运算（如 '2years 3mon'）。同时提供周、月时间区间计算及节日生成功能，适用于脚本自动化与数据处理场景。
summary.en: PyTime is a user-friendly Python module designed to handle date/time/datetime operations via string input. It parses irregular date formats (e.g., '2015.5.17', 'NOV21th2015') and supports natural-language-like timedelta calculations (e.g., '2years 3mon'). Features include week/month interval generation, holiday computation, and datetime arithmetic, making it ideal for automation and data processing tasks.

metadata.name: layer
metadata.description: 丰富多样的 Web 弹出层组件，可轻松实现 Alert/Confirm/Prompt/ 普通提示/页面区块/iframe/tips等等几乎所有的弹出交互。目前已成为最多人使用的弹层解决方案

summary.zh: layer 是一款功能全面的 Web 弹出层组件，支持 Alert、Confirm、Prompt、提示框、页面区块、iframe 等多种交互模式，兼容 IE6+ 及主流浏览器。现已集成至 Layui 框架，提供高性能、易定制的弹层解决方案，广泛应用于企业级 Web 项目，是开发者首选的轻量级交互组件。
summary.en: Layer is a comprehensive web modal component supporting Alert, Confirm, Prompt, tips, iframe, and more. It offers high performance, cross-browser compatibility (including IE6), and extensive customization. Now fully integrated into Layui, it serves as a lightweight, developer-friendly solution for rich user interactions across millions of web platforms.

metadata.name: lUpload
metadata.description: :zap: :rocket:This is a upload plug-ins

summary.zh: lUpload 是一个基于 jQuery 开发的轻量级文件上传插件，支持拖拽、粘贴、选择三种上传方式，具备实时进度显示、速度监控、多文件队列/并发上传控制，并可自定义文件类型缩略图与模板。适用于需要快速集成多模式上传功能的 Web 项目。
summary.en: lUpload is a lightweight jQuery-based file upload plugin supporting drag-and-drop, paste, and file selection uploads. It features real-time progress tracking, upload speed monitoring, concurrent/sequential upload modes, custom thumbnails per file type, and flexible templating. Ideal for rapid integration of multi-mode uploads in web applications.

summary.zh: 该仓库为 Django 项目提供基于 Bootstrap 3 的日期时间选择器组件，集成 Eonasdan 的 bootstrap-datetimepicker 插件，支持通过 moment.js 进行灵活的时间格式化，适用于表单中的日期和 datetime 字段输入，自动适配当前语言环境。
summary.en: This Django package integrates the Bootstrap 3 datetimepicker widget (v2) by Eonasdan, enabling date and datetime field inputs in forms with moment.js-based formatting. It auto-detects the current language and requires Bootstrap 3 and jQuery. Compatible with Django 1.3+ and Python 2.4+.

metadata.name: django-taggit
metadata.description: Simple tagging for django

summary.zh: django-taggit 是一个为 Django 框架提供的简洁高效的标签管理库，支持通过 TaggableManager 轻松为模型添加标签功能，兼容 Django 3.2+，提供 API 操作、表单集成和后台管理支持，适用于内容分类与检索场景。
summary.en: django-taggit is a simple and efficient tagging library for Django, enabling easy tag management via TaggableManager. It supports Django 3.2+, offers API-driven tag operations, form integration, and admin support, ideal for content categorization and retrieval.

metadata.name: python-user-agents
metadata.description: A Python library that provides an easy way to identify devices like mobile phones, tablets and their capabilities by parsing (browser) user agent strings.

summary.zh: user_agents 是一个 Python 库，用于解析浏览器 User-Agent 字符串，精准识别设备类型（手机、平板、PC）及其功能特性（如触屏能力），支持主流移动平台与爬虫检测，依赖 ua-parser 实现高效解析。
summary.en: user_agents is a Python library that parses browser User-Agent strings to accurately identify device types (mobile, tablet, PC) and capabilities (e.g., touch support), supporting major platforms and bot detection via the ua-parser engine.

metadata.name: Startup-Game
metadata.description: 创业者的游戏： 中关村启示录

summary.zh: 《创业游戏：中关村启示录》是一款基于Ruby CLI的模拟经营类游戏，玩家通过雇佣程序员、管理资金与项目进度，体验创业公司从0到1的成长过程。支持自定义程序员角色、随机事件与动态交互，社区可提交Pull Request参与开发，具有高度开放性与趣味性。
summary.en: Startup-Game is a CLI-based simulation game written in Ruby, simulating the journey of building a startup from scratch. Players hire coders, manage funds and project progress, and experience the challenges of entrepreneurship. It supports custom coders via Pull Requests, random events, and dynamic gameplay, fostering community-driven development.

metadata.name: useragent.js
metadata.description: A User-agent analyze project.

summary.zh: useragent.js 是一个轻量级用户代理解析库，支持 Node.js、浏览器及经典 ASP 环境，可精准识别浏览器、操作系统和设备类型。提供结构化输出，包含名称、版本、平台及图标信息，兼容主流浏览器及 IE8+，适用于流量分析、设备适配等场景。
summary.en: useragent.js is a lightweight user-agent parsing library supporting Node.js, browsers, and classic ASP environments. It accurately identifies browsers, operating systems, and device types, providing structured output with name, version, platform, and icon data. Compatible with major browsers and IE8+, ideal for traffic analysis and device adaptation.

metadata.name: xadmin
metadata.description: Drop-in replacement of Django admin comes with lots of goodies, fully extensible with plugin support, pretty UI based on Twitter Bootstrap.

summary.zh: xadmin 是 Django 管理后台的现代化替代方案，基于 Twitter Bootstrap 提供美观 UI，支持插件扩展、数据导出（XLS/CSV/XML/JSON）、仪表盘、书签等功能，兼容 Django 1.9+，适合快速构建企业级后台管理系统。
summary.en: xadmin is a modern drop-in replacement for Django admin with a Bootstrap-based UI, extensible plugin system, data export (XLS/CSV/XML/JSON), dashboard widgets, and bookmarking. Compatible with Django 1.9+, ideal for building enterprise-grade admin interfaces.

metadata.name: django_selfblog
metadata.description: Another opensource blog system  based on Django1.6

summary.zh: 基于Django1.6开发的开源个人博客系统，支持文章、分类管理，支持RST/HTML/Markdown格式写作，集成多说评论、RSS和微信自动回复，采用xadmin后台，提供Ansible一键部署方案，适合学习Django开发实践与博客搭建。
summary.en: An open-source personal blog system built with Django 1.6, featuring article management, support for RST/HTML/Markdown content, integration with Duoshuo comments, RSS, and WeChat auto-reply. Includes xadmin backend and Ansible deployment script for easy setup and learning.

metadata.name: wechat-bot
metadata.description: A robot of wechat based on python (Not maintained)

summary.zh: wechat-bot 是一个基于 Python 开发的微信机器人项目，支持通过配置文件自定义端口、令牌、用户名等参数，集成 simsimi 等对话接口，提供基础的消息处理与自动回复功能，适用于简单的微信自动化场景。
summary.en: wechat-bot is a Python-based WeChat robot that supports configuration via a text file for port, token, username, and simsimi integration, enabling basic message handling and automated replies for simple WeChat automation use cases.

metadata.name: WeRoBot
metadata.description: WeRoBot 是一个微信公众号开发框架

summary.zh: WeRoBot 是一个基于 Python 的微信公众号开发框架，采用 MIT 协议开源。它提供简洁的装饰器语法处理消息事件，支持文本、图片、事件等交互类型，内置消息解析、签名校验和自动回复功能，极大简化微信公众号后端开发流程。
summary.en: WeRoBot is a Python-based WeChat Official Account development framework licensed under MIT. It offers a clean decorator syntax for handling message events like text, images, and events, with built-in message parsing, signature verification, and auto-reply capabilities, streamlining backend development for WeChat Official Accounts.

metadata.name: v2ex-material-theme
metadata.description: v2ex 的 Material design 风格 CSS

summary.zh: 该仓库为 V2EX 论坛提供 Material Design 风格的自定义 CSS 主题，通过注入样式实现现代化视觉升级，支持 Chrome 浏览器，用户可通过自定义 CSS 功能一键应用，显著提升界面美观度与用户体验。
summary.en: This repository provides a Material Design-styled CSS theme for V2EX forum, enabling a modern visual upgrade through custom CSS injection. It supports Chrome browsers and allows users to apply the theme instantly via the custom CSS setting, enhancing UI aesthetics and user experience.

metadata.name: django-mobile
metadata.description: Detect mobile browsers and serve different template flavours to them.

summary.zh: django-mobile 是一个 Django 中间件工具，用于自动检测移动端浏览器并动态切换模板渲染。它通过中间件识别用户设备类型，并基于预设的 'flavour'（如 mobile/desktop）透明加载对应模板（如 mobile/index.html），支持多设备适配和优雅降级，无需修改视图逻辑即可实现响应式站点。
summary.en: django-mobile is a Django middleware that detects mobile browsers and serves different templates accordingly. It uses middleware to identify device type, then transparently loads flavored templates (e.g., mobile/index.html) based on the detected 'flavour', enabling responsive design without altering view logic. It supports multiple mobile flavors and graceful fallback to default templates.

metadata.name: bootstrap-table
metadata.description: An extended table for integration with some of the most widely used CSS frameworks. (Supports Bootstrap, Semantic UI, Bulma, Material Design, Foundation, Vue.js)

summary.zh: Bootstrap Table 是一个功能强大的表格扩展插件，支持 Bootstrap、Semantic UI、Bulma、Material Design 等主流 CSS 框架。提供排序、分页、筛选、多选、卡片视图、详情视图等丰富功能，支持 AJAX 数据加载、本地化和扩展机制，适用于数据展示与交互场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Table is a feature-rich table extension for popular CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Semantic UI, Bulma, and Material Design. It offers sorting, pagination, filtering, row selection, card/detail views, AJAX data loading, localization, and extensibility, making it ideal for dynamic data presentation and interaction.

metadata.name: django-emoji
metadata.description: A simple django app to use emojis on your website ⛺

summary.zh: django-emoji 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，用于在网站中便捷地渲染表情符号。它支持将文本中的 :emoji: 标记自动转换为 Unicode 字符或图片，并提供 HTML 实体转换功能，适用于提升用户交互体验的 Web 项目。
summary.en: django-emoji is a lightweight Django app that enables easy emoji rendering on websites. It automatically converts :emoji: text patterns into Unicode or image tags, with support for HTML entity conversion, ideal for enhancing user engagement in web applications.

metadata.name: react-markplus
metadata.description: A React markdown editor and previewer.

summary.zh: MarkPlus 是一个功能强大的 React Markdown 编辑器与预览组件，支持实时编辑、多主题切换、可定制工具栏及数学公式、流程图等高级功能。它提供编辑器、预览或双栏模式，适用于内容创作与文档开发场景。
summary.en: MarkPlus is a powerful React-based Markdown editor and previewer with real-time editing, customizable toolbar, multi-theme support, and advanced features like math formulas and flowcharts. It supports editor, preview, or dual-pane modes, ideal for content creation and documentation.

metadata.name: dannysite.com
metadata.description: Source code to dannysite.com

summary.zh: DannySite 是一个基于 Django 框架开发的个人网站，包含博客、图片展示、账户管理等功能，支持邮件注册、密码重置、RSS 订阅及富文本编辑。采用 django-simple-captcha 和 DjangoUeditor 等第三方库，UI 设计版权归作者所有，建议查看 dannysite4 获取最新版本。
summary.en: DannySite is a personal website built with Django, featuring blog, image gallery, and user account management with email registration, password reset, RSS feeds, and rich text editing via UEditor. It uses third-party packages like django-simple-captcha and DjangoUeditor. UI design is copyrighted by the author. Check dannysite4 for the latest version.

metadata.name: v2ex.k
metadata.description: Get a better UI of V2EX.

summary.zh: v2ex.k 是一款专为 V2EX 设计的界面增强浏览器插件，采用 Vue 重构，提供全新配色、左侧导航栏和快速阅读模式。支持主题切换、全键盘操作及 URL 动态更新，显著提升浏览效率与视觉体验。
summary.en: v2ex.k is a browser extension that enhances the V2EX website with a modern UI, featuring new themes, sidebar navigation, quick-read mode, keyboard shortcuts, and dynamic URL updates for improved browsing efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: hexo-qiniu-sync
metadata.description: Hexo七牛同步插件

summary.zh: Hexo七牛同步插件是一个专为Hexo博客设计的自动化工具，支持将本地静态资源（图片、JS、CSS）自动同步至七牛云存储，无需手动上传。通过配置实现一键部署，支持图片处理、缩略图生成及离线预览，提升博客资源管理效率。
summary.en: Hexo Qiniu Sync is an automation plugin for Hexo blogs that synchronizes local static assets (images, JS, CSS) to Qiniu Cloud Storage. It enables one-click deployment with image processing, thumbnail generation, and offline preview support, streamlining resource management.

metadata.name: v2ex-daily-android
metadata.description: A v2ex client on android platform.(deprecated)

summary.zh: v2ex-daily-android 是一款已停止维护的 Android 客户端应用，专为访问 v2ex 社区设计，支持浏览主题、节点搜索和用户信息查看，界面遵循 Material Design 风格，提供简洁高效的原生体验。
summary.en: v2ex-daily-android is a deprecated Android client for the v2ex community, offering topic browsing, node search, and user profiles with a clean Material Design interface, optimized for native mobile experience.

metadata.name: gitbook
metadata.description: The open source frontend for GitBook doc sites

summary.zh: GitBook 是一个开源的前端文档渲染引擎，专为技术知识管理而设计。它基于 Next.js 构建，支持本地开发和自定义发布站点，提供团队协作的文档管理功能，适用于开源项目和技术团队的知识共享。
summary.en: GitBook is an open-source frontend engine for rendering GitBook documentation sites, built on Next.js. It enables local development and custom publishing of technical knowledge, supporting team collaboration and open-source contributions for documentation workflows.

metadata.name: android-open-project
metadata.description: A categorized collection of Android Open Source Projects,  More powerful web version:

summary.zh: 该仓库是 Android 开源项目的权威分类汇总，涵盖 UI、网络、数据库等 250+ 个精选项目，提供个性化控件、工具库及优质案例。配套开发助手 App 支持反编译、布局分析、屏幕取色等开发调试功能，官网 timeshining.com 提供最新项目搜索与推送服务。
summary.en: This repository is a comprehensive categorized collection of 250+ high-quality Android open-source projects, covering UI components, toolkits, and outstanding apps. It includes a powerful Development Tools app for reverse engineering, layout inspection, color sampling, and debugging. The companion website offers project discovery and updates.

metadata.name: android-training-course-in-chinese
metadata.description: Android官方培训课程中文版

summary.zh: 该项目是 Google Android 官方培训课程《Android Training》的中文协作翻译版本，涵盖 Android 应用开发核心知识体系，由社区开发者共同维护。提供在线阅读与在线编辑功能，支持纠错与内容完善，是学习 Android 开发的优质中文资源。
summary.en: This project is the Chinese translation of Google's official Android Training course, collaboratively translated by the community. It covers core Android development topics, offering online reading and editing support for corrections and improvements, serving as a valuable Chinese resource for Android developers.

metadata.name: django-address
metadata.description: A Django address model and field. Addresses may be specified by address components or by performing an automatic Google Maps lookup.

summary.zh: Django Address 是一个用于存储和管理邮政地址的 Django 模型库，支持通过 Google Maps API 自动解析地址或手动输入地址组件。它提供标准化的地址结构（国家、州、地区、街道），并包含一个便捷的 AddressField 字段类型，简化地址的创建、更新和查询操作，适用于需要精确地址管理的 Web 应用。
summary.en: Django Address is a Django library providing models and fields for storing and retrieving postal addresses. It supports automatic address resolution via Google Maps API or manual input of address components, offering a standardized structure (country, state, locality, street) and an AddressField for easy integration into Django models, ideal for applications requiring precise address handling.

metadata.name: djangoBaidusitemap
metadata.description: django动态生成百度地图。

summary.zh: djangoBaidusitemap 是一个 Django 扩展库，用于动态生成百度地图 XML 站点地图，支持 HTML5、WML 和 XHTML 多格式 URL 输出，兼容 Django 内置 sitemap 机制，适用于 SEO 优化与多终端内容分发。
summary.en: djangoBaidusitemap is a Django extension that dynamically generates Baidu XML sitemaps, supporting multi-format URLs (HTML5, WML, XHTML), compatible with Django's built-in sitemap framework, ideal for SEO optimization and cross-platform content delivery.

metadata.name: wechat
metadata.description: 微信公共平台消息接口服务中间件

summary.zh: Node.js 微信公众平台消息接口中间件，支持文本、图片、语音、视频、音乐、图文等多种自动回复，提供会话管理和多客服转发功能，适用于公众号开发快速集成消息处理逻辑。
summary.en: A Node.js middleware for WeChat Official Platform message interface, supporting automatic replies (text, image, voice, video, music, news), session management, and customer service transfer, enabling rapid integration of message handling logic for official accounts.

metadata.name: foundation-sites
metadata.description: The most advanced responsive front-end framework in the world. Quickly create prototypes and production code for sites that work on any kind of device.

summary.zh: Foundation 是全球最先进的响应式前端框架，支持快速从原型开发到生产环境部署。提供完全可定制的响应式网格系统、丰富的 Sass 混合宏、常用 JavaScript 插件及完整的无障碍访问支持，适用于构建跨设备兼容的网站和应用程序。
summary.en: Foundation is the most advanced responsive front-end framework globally, enabling rapid prototyping and production-ready development of sites and apps that work seamlessly across all devices. It features a fully customizable responsive grid, extensive Sass mixins, essential JavaScript plugins, and comprehensive accessibility support.

metadata.name: clockpicker
metadata.description: A clock-style timepicker for Bootstrap (or jQuery). Sorry but no longer maintained.

summary.zh: ClockPicker 是一个基于 Bootstrap 或 jQuery 的类时钟风格时间选择器，提供直观的时钟界面用于时间输入。支持桌面和移动设备，兼容 IE9+，具备自动关闭、12/24小时制切换、回调函数等丰富功能，适用于需要美观时间选择器的 Web 应用。
summary.en: ClockPicker is a clock-style timepicker built for Bootstrap or jQuery, offering an intuitive analog clock interface for time selection. It supports major browsers including IE9+, works on both desktop and mobile devices, and provides features like autoclose, 12/24-hour modes, and customizable callbacks for enhanced user experience.

metadata.name: metismenu
metadata.description: A collapsible jQuery menu plugin

summary.zh: metismenu 是一个轻量级 jQuery 插件，用于创建可折叠的侧边栏菜单。支持现代浏览器，提供流畅的展开/折叠动画，具备 ARIA 可访问性支持，可通过 CSS 类（如 has-arrow）自定义箭头样式，适用于后台管理系统等需要多级导航的场景。
summary.en: MetisMenu is a lightweight jQuery plugin for creating collapsible sidebar menus. It supports modern browsers only, offers smooth expand/collapse animations, includes ARIA accessibility features, and allows customization via CSS classes like has-arrow, making it ideal for admin dashboards and multi-level navigation systems.

metadata.name: easy-tree
metadata.description: A jquery and bootstrap basic tree view plugin, easily use.

summary.zh: EasyTree 是一个基于 jQuery 和 Bootstrap 3 的轻量级树形视图插件，可将无序列表快速转换为支持选择、添加、编辑和删除操作的交互式树形结构，适用于需要动态层级数据管理的 Web 应用。
summary.en: EasyTree is a lightweight jQuery and Bootstrap 3-based plugin that transforms unordered lists into interactive tree views with selectable, addable, editable, and deletable nodes, ideal for dynamic hierarchical data management in web applications.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tour
metadata.description: Quick and easy product tours with Twitter Bootstrap Popovers

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tour 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap Popovers 的快速易用的产品引导工具，专为构建交互式用户引导流程设计。支持 Bootstrap 2.3.0+ 版本，提供灵活的 API 和丰富的配置选项，适用于提升用户体验和引导新用户。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tour is a quick and easy product tour library built on Twitter Bootstrap Popovers, designed to create interactive onboarding experiences. Compatible with Bootstrap >= 2.3.0, it offers a flexible API and extensive configuration options for guiding users through applications.

metadata.name: daterangepicker
metadata.description: JavaScript Date Range, Date and Time Picker Component

summary.zh: Date Range Picker 是一个功能强大的 JavaScript 日期时间选择组件，支持日期范围选择、单日期模式、时间选择及预设范围，具备灵活的日期限制、本地化支持和多种日期格式，适用于报表筛选等场景。
summary.en: Date Range Picker is a robust JavaScript component for selecting date ranges or single dates with time selection, predefined ranges, localization, and customizable date constraints, ideal for reporting and data filtering interfaces.

metadata.name: bootbox
metadata.description: Wrappers for JavaScript alert(), confirm() and other flexible dialogs using Twitter's bootstrap framework

summary.zh: Bootbox 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap 框架的 JavaScript 对话框封装库，提供简洁易用的 alert()、confirm() 等弹窗接口，支持高度定制化与响应式设计，适用于现代 Web 应用的用户交互场景。
summary.en: Bootbox is a JavaScript library that wraps native alert(), confirm(), and other dialog functions using Twitter's Bootstrap framework, offering customizable, responsive modal dialogs for modern web applications.

metadata.name: jqBootstrapValidation
metadata.description: A JQuery validation framework for bootstrap forms.

summary.zh: jqBootstrapValidation 是一个专为 Bootstrap 表单设计的 jQuery 验证框架，支持实时输入验证并在 help-block 元素中显示错误提示，提升表单交互体验。
summary.en: jqBootstrapValidation is a jQuery validation framework designed for Bootstrap forms, providing real-time input validation and displaying error messages in help-block elements to enhance form user experience.

metadata.name: bootmetro
metadata.description: Simple and complete web UI framework to create web apps with Windows 8 Metro user interface, based on Bootstrap 2.

summary.zh: BootMetro 是一个基于 Bootstrap 2 的 Web UI 框架，专为创建具有 Windows 8 Metro 风格界面的应用而设计，无需依赖 Windows 8 系统。它整合了 HTML5 Boilerplate 和 IcoMoon 图标库，提供 Metro 风格的布局、磁贴、通知、列表视图和翻转视图等组件，适用于企业内部网等现代 Web 应用。
summary.en: BootMetro is a web UI framework built on Bootstrap 2, designed to create web apps with the Windows 8 MetroUI style without requiring Windows 8. It integrates HTML5 Boilerplate and IcoMoon icons, offering Metro-styled layouts, tiles, toasts, list views, and flip views, ideal for modern intranet applications.

metadata.name: jquery-ui-bootstrap
metadata.description: A jQuery UI theme based on Twitter Bootstrap

summary.zh: jQuery UI Bootstrap 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap 设计的 jQuery UI 主题，旨在让 jQuery UI 组件与 Bootstrap 风格无缝融合。它支持与 Bootstrap 共存，并提供现代化外观，同时兼容 jQuery UI 1.9.2/1.10.3 及现代浏览器。项目处于活跃开发中，目标是实现 Bootstrap 3.x 兼容性，欢迎社区贡献。
summary.en: jQuery UI Bootstrap is a theme for jQuery UI widgets inspired by Twitter Bootstrap's design, enabling visual consistency between Bootstrap and jQuery UI components. It supports coexistence with Bootstrap CSS and targets jQuery UI 1.9.2/1.10.3. The project is actively developed with goals to achieve Bootstrap 3.x compatibility and welcomes contributors.

metadata.name: bootstrap-notify
metadata.description: Bootstrap alert system made better, builds off of bootstrap-alert.js

summary.zh: bootstrap-notify 是对 Bootstrap 原生警告系统的增强扩展，基于 bootstrap-alert.js 构建，提供更丰富的通知样式与交互能力，适用于现代 Web 应用中的用户提示与消息展示。
summary.en: Bootstrap Notify enhances the native Bootstrap alert system by building on bootstrap-alert.js, offering improved notification styles and interactions for modern web applications.

metadata.name: eldarion-ajax
metadata.description: a library for adding declarative ajax functionality to your website

summary.zh: eldarion-ajax 是一个用于为网站添加声明式 AJAX 功能的 JavaScript 库，通过 jQuery 实现。它简化了重复的 AJAX 代码编写，支持通过服务器返回的 JSON 中 `html` 字段渲染 HTML 片段，无需前端模板引擎。支持 `<a>` 点击、表单提交等常见交互，适用于现代 Web 应用的无刷新操作场景。
summary.en: eldarion-ajax is a JavaScript library that enables declarative AJAX functionality on websites using jQuery. It eliminates repetitive $.ajax code by leveraging server-rendered HTML fragments returned in JSON. Designed for seamless integration with server-side templates, it supports common actions like link clicks and form submissions without full page reloads.

metadata.name: bootstro.js
metadata.description: Tiny JS library using bootstrap's popovers to help guide your users around your website

summary.zh: Bootstro.js 是一个轻量级 JavaScript 库，利用 Bootstrap 的弹出框（popover）功能，为网站提供用户引导功能。支持 Bootstrap 2 和 3，无需修改代码即可适配，仅需一行变更即可从 Bootstrap 2 升级。支持通过 JS 变量或 AJAX 动态加载引导数据，避免污染 HTML，提升可维护性。
summary.en: Bootstro.js is a lightweight JavaScript library that leverages Bootstrap's popover functionality to guide users through a website. It supports both Bootstrap 2 and 3 with minimal code changes. It enables dynamic slideshow creation via JavaScript variables or AJAX, avoiding HTML pollution and improving maintainability.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tags
metadata.description: Bootstrap-themed jquery tag interface

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tags 是一个 jQuery 插件，用于扩展 Twitter Bootstrap 的标签功能，支持 Bootstrap 2.3.2 和 3+ 版本。它提供自动建议、排除/过滤列表、占位符提示、Bootstrap 按钮样式集成以及可自定义的扩展点，适用于需要交互式标签输入的 Web 表单场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tags is a jQuery plugin that extends Twitter Bootstrap with tagging functionality, supporting Bootstrap 2.3.2 and 3+. It features autosuggest, exclusion/filtering, popovers, placeholder prompts, and Bootstrap button styling, making it ideal for interactive tag-based input in web forms.

metadata.name: angular-bootstrap-colorpicker
metadata.description: Native AngularJS colorpicker directive. No dependency on jQuery or jQuery plugin is required.

summary.zh: 这是一个原生 AngularJS 颜色选择器指令，基于 bootstrap-colorpicker jQuery 库开发，无需依赖 jQuery。支持 Hex、RGB、RGBA 格式，可自定义位置、尺寸和事件，适用于 Bootstrap v3.x.x 项目，提供灵活的配置选项和丰富的交互事件。
summary.en: A native AngularJS color picker directive based on bootstrap-colorpicker jQuery library, with no jQuery dependency. Supports Hex, RGB, RGBA formats, customizable positioning, sizing, and events. Ideal for Bootstrap v3.x.x projects with flexible configuration and rich interaction events.

metadata.name: bootstrap-colorpicker
metadata.description: Bootstrap Colorpicker is a modular color picker plugin for Bootstrap.

summary.zh: Bootstrap Colorpicker 是一个专为 Bootstrap 4 设计的模块化颜色选择插件，支持 jQuery 和 Bootstrap CSS/JS。它提供灵活的颜色选择功能，兼容 v2.x（Bootstrap 3/4）和 v3.x（Bootstrap 4 或无 Bootstrap）版本，适用于网页颜色输入场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Colorpicker is a modular color picker plugin for Bootstrap 4, built with jQuery and optional Bootstrap CSS/JS. It supports v2.x (Bootstrap 3/4) and v3.x (Bootstrap 4 or standalone), offering flexible color selection for web applications. Available via npm, yarn, or direct download.

metadata.name: Semantic-UI
metadata.description: Semantic is a UI component framework based around useful principles from natural language.

summary.zh: Semantic UI 是一个基于自然语言原则的现代化 UI 组件框架，提供 50+ 组件、3000+ CSS 变量和三级变量继承体系，支持 EM 响应式设计和 Flexbox 布局，兼容 React/Angular 等主流框架，助力快速构建美观且可维护的前端界面。
summary.en: Semantic UI is a modern UI component framework based on natural language principles, offering 50+ components, 3000+ CSS variables, and a three-level variable inheritance system. It supports responsive design with EM values and Flexbox, integrates seamlessly with React, Angular, and other frameworks, enabling rapid development of beautiful and maintainable web interfaces.

metadata.name: pjax
metadata.description: ajax + history.pushState = pjax

summary.zh: Pjax 是一个基于 pushState 和 AJAX 的前端技术，用于实现无刷新页面内容更新，支持 jQuery、qwrap 和 KISSY 框架。它提供缓存、本地存储、动画过渡及自定义过滤功能，适用于提升单页应用体验。
summary.en: Pjax is a frontend technology combining AJAX and pushState to enable seamless, partial page updates without full reloads. It supports jQuery, qwrap, and KISSY, with features like caching, localStorage persistence, animation transitions, and URL filtering for enhanced SPA performance.

metadata.name: jquery-pjax
metadata.description: pushState + ajax = pjax

summary.zh: pjax 是一个 jQuery 插件，通过结合 pushState 和 ajax 技术，实现无刷新页面跳转，提升浏览体验。它支持动态加载 HTML 内容并更新浏览器地址栏，避免资源重复加载，适用于需要快速响应的单页应用。
summary.en: pjax is a jQuery plugin that combines pushState and ajax to enable fast, seamless page navigation without full reloads. It dynamically loads HTML content, updates the browser URL, and preserves permalinks, titles, and back-button functionality for enhanced user experience.

metadata.name: hardseed
metadata.description: SEX IS ZERO (0), so, who wanna be the ONE (1), aha?

summary.zh: hardseed 是一个从草榴和愛城论坛批量下载种子与图片的自动化工具，支持代理配置、文件名安全处理及智能重试机制，适用于资源抓取与离线保存，操作简单且适配多平台。
summary.en: hardseed is a batch download utility for seeds and pictures from CaoLiu and AiCheng forums, featuring proxy support, safe filename handling, and intelligent retry logic, designed for efficient resource scraping and offline archiving with cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: django-bootstrap3
metadata.description: Bootstrap 3 integration with Django.

summary.zh: django-bootstrap3 是 Bootstrap 3 与 Django 的无缝集成库，提供简洁的模板标签（如 `bootstrap_form`）快速渲染响应式表单。现已进入维护模式，仅修复漏洞，建议新项目使用 Bootstrap 5 及对应包 django-bootstrap5。
summary.en: django-bootstrap3 integrates Bootstrap 3 with Django via easy-to-use template tags like `bootstrap_form` for rapid responsive form rendering. Now in maintenance mode—only security fixes—with recommended migration to django-bootstrap5 for new projects.

metadata.name: berserkJS
metadata.description: berserkJS 是新形态的前端测试自动化工具 + 页面性能分析工具 ，同时也是个使用 JS 语法控制的命令行浏览器。可用 JS 编写前端自动测试用例 + 页面性能分析用例。 想了解更多？看看连接中的文档吧~~

summary.zh: berserkJS 是一款基于 Qt 的前端自动化测试与页面性能分析工具，支持无头浏览器模式运行主流测试框架，提供 DOM 操作、网络监控、屏幕捕获及性能指标采集功能，API 简洁且符合 W3C 标准，已在微博、Cisco、腾讯等企业落地应用。
summary.en: berserkJS is a Qt-based frontend automation and performance analysis tool that supports headless browser testing with mainstream frameworks, offering DOM manipulation, network monitoring, screenshot capture, and performance metrics collection. Its W3C-compliant APIs are simple and production-proven in enterprises like Sina Weibo, Cisco, and Tencent.

metadata.name: weixin-simulator
metadata.description: 微信客户端模拟器，方便在本地进行微信公众平台API的开发和调试

summary.zh: 微信客户端模拟器，基于tkinter开发，提供本地微信公众平台API调试环境。支持模拟关注/取消关注、自定义菜单点击等交互场景，通过XML数据模拟微信消息推送，简化开发测试流程。
summary.en: WeChat client simulator built with tkinter for local debugging of WeChat Official Platform APIs. It simulates user interactions like following/unfollowing accounts and clicking custom menu items via XML data, enabling streamlined development and testing workflows.

metadata.name: wecheat
metadata.description: 开箱即用的微信公众平台API模拟服务器，帮助你开发与调试微信公众平台应用

summary.zh: Wecheat 是一个开箱即用的微信公众平台API模拟器，基于 Sinatra 框架开发，提供完整的仿真数据与消息交互功能，支持文本、图片、视频等多种消息类型及事件通知，适用于微信应用开发与调试。
summary.en: Wecheat is an out-of-the-box WeChat Official Account API simulator built on the Sinatra framework, offering comprehensive fake data and message interactions including text, images, videos, and events, ideal for developing and debugging WeChat applications.

metadata.name: webot-cli
metadata.description: command line interface for weixin-robot

summary.zh: webot-cli 是微信机器人（weixin-robot）的命令行接口工具，支持发送文本、图片、位置等消息，以及创建、删除、获取微信自定义菜单。通过配置文件管理 appid 和 secret，结合 webot 框架可实现消息自动响应与事件触发，适用于本地测试与快速开发微信机器人应用。
summary.en: webot-cli is a command-line interface for weixin-robot, enabling sending text, image, location, and event messages to WeChat. It supports managing custom menus via JSON configuration, integrates with webot framework for automated responses, and is ideal for local testing and rapid development of WeChat bot applications.

metadata.name: weixin_pay
metadata.description: 微信支付的python接口

summary.zh: weixin_pay 是一个为 Python 开发者提供的微信支付接口库，简化了微信支付 API 的调用流程。该库经过实际项目测试验证，支持核心支付功能，适合快速集成到电商、服务类应用中，提升支付模块开发效率。
summary.en: weixin_pay is a Python library providing a simplified interface for WeChat Pay API. Developed for production use, it supports core payment functionalities and has been tested successfully. Ideal for integrating WeChat Pay into e-commerce or service applications efficiently.

metadata.name: wechatpy
metadata.description: WeChat SDK for Python

summary.zh: WeChatpy 是一个功能完整的微信公众平台第三方 Python SDK，支持普通公众平台被动响应、企业微信、微信支付、第三方平台代调用及小程序云开发等核心 API 集成，提供简洁易用的接口封装，适用于快速构建微信生态应用。
summary.en: WeChatpy is a comprehensive third-party Python SDK for the WeChat public platform, supporting core APIs such as passive response, enterprise WeChat, WeChat Pay, third-party proxy calls, and mini-program cloud development, offering a clean interface for rapid integration into WeChat ecosystem applications.

metadata.name: wechat-python-sdk
metadata.description: 微信公众平台 Python 开发包 [DEPRECATED]

summary.zh: wechat-python-sdk 是一个已停止维护的微信公众平台 Python 开发包，支持订阅号和服务号官方接口，提供消息处理、加解密、模板消息等功能。该 SDK 设计为轻量级，便于集成到各类 Web 框架中，不处理 HTTP 请求响应，仅封装微信 API 操作并返回合规响应数据。
summary.en: wechat-python-sdk was a deprecated Python SDK for WeChat Official Accounts (subscription/service accounts), offering message handling, encryption/decryption, template messages, and menu management. It focused on simplifying WeChat API integration by returning compliant response data without handling HTTP layers, designed for easy integration into web frameworks.

metadata.name: hexo-qiniu-sync
metadata.description: hexo插件 - 七牛资源同步. 可以在本地存放好静态资源（图片、JS、CSS），然后在md文章中直接使用标签引用，在发布时会自动将静态资源上传到你的七牛空间中，并在hexo生成的静态页面中自动引用这些静态资源在千牛的url。

summary.zh: hexo-qiniu-sync 是一个 Hexo 插件，用于自动将本地静态资源（如图片、JS、CSS）同步至七牛云存储，并在生成的静态页面中自动替换为七牛外链 URL。支持离线预览、增量同步、图片处理（缩略图/水印）等功能，简化博客资源管理流程。
summary.en: hexo-qiniu-sync is a Hexo plugin that automatically syncs local static resources (images, JS, CSS) to Qiniu Cloud Storage and replaces references in generated pages with Qiniu CDN URLs. It supports offline preview, incremental sync, image processing (thumbnails/watermarks), and simplifies blog asset management.

metadata.name: material-ui
metadata.description: Material UI: Comprehensive React component library that implements Google's Material Design. Free forever.

summary.zh: Material UI 是一个基于 Google Material Design 的 React 组件库，提供丰富的 UI 组件和主题系统，支持无障碍访问和响应式设计。它经过十年开源社区验证，稳定可靠，适合构建现代化 Web 应用，并通过 MUI X 扩展高级组件功能。
summary.en: Material UI is a comprehensive React component library implementing Google's Material Design. It offers battle-tested, accessible, and responsive UI components with a customizable theme system. Trusted by global product teams, it extends functionality via MUI X for advanced use cases.

metadata.name: mdb-ui-kit
metadata.description: Bootstrap 5 & Material Design UI KIT

summary.zh: MDBootstrap 提供基于 Bootstrap 5 和 Material Design 的免费 UI 组件库，包含 700+ 原生 JavaScript 组件，支持 npm、CDN 和 Webpack 集成，适用于快速构建现代化网页界面，被 NASA、Nike 等企业广泛使用。
summary.en: MDBootstrap offers a free UI kit with 700+ Bootstrap 5 components based on Material Design, built in plain JavaScript. It supports npm, CDN, and Webpack integration, enabling rapid development of modern web interfaces trusted by 3M+ developers and enterprises like NASA and Nike.

metadata.name: bootswatch
metadata.description: Themes for Bootstrap

summary.zh: Bootswatch 提供一系列开源的 Bootstrap 主题，支持通过预编译 CSS、CDN、Sass 导入、npm 包或 Ruby Gem 集成到项目中，适用于快速美化网页界面，支持主题定制与变量覆盖。
summary.en: Bootswatch offers a collection of open-source themes for Bootstrap, enabling easy integration via pre-compiled CSS, CDN, Sass imports, npm packages, or Ruby Gem. It supports theme customization and variable overrides for rapid UI enhancement.

metadata.name: metro-bootstrap
metadata.description: Twitter Bootstrap with Metro style

summary.zh: metro-bootstrap 是基于 Twitter Bootstrap 的 Metro 风格主题，提供现代化的扁平化界面设计，支持通过 npm、Git 或 CDN 快速集成，包含预编译 CSS 和 FontAwesome 字体，适用于快速构建 Windows Metro 风格网页应用。
summary.en: metro-bootstrap is a Metro-styled theme built on Twitter Bootstrap, offering a modern flat UI design. It supports easy integration via npm, Git clone, or CDN, includes precompiled CSS and FontAwesome fonts, ideal for quickly building Windows Metro-style web applications.

metadata.name: DjangoVerifyCode
metadata.description: django verify code

summary.zh: DjangoVerifyCode 是一个用于 Django 框架的验证码生成库，支持英文单词和数字两种验证码模式，具备自适应字体尺寸的图片生成与校验功能，适用于网站用户身份验证场景。
summary.en: DjangoVerifyCode is a Django-based library for generating captcha images with English words or numbers, featuring adaptive font sizing and validation, ideal for user authentication in web applications.

metadata.name: bootstrap3-validation.js
metadata.description: bootstrap3 validation

summary.zh: bootstrap3-validation.js 是一个专为 Bootstrap 3 设计的 jQuery 表单验证插件，支持多种内置校验规则（如邮箱、URL、日期、数字等），支持自定义校验逻辑和异步验证，兼容 IE8，提供简洁的 HTML 属性配置方式，适用于水平表单和内联表单样式。
summary.en: bootstrap3-validation.js is a jQuery plugin designed for Bootstrap 3 form validation, supporting built-in rules (e.g., email, URL, date, number), custom validation logic, asynchronous checks, IE8 compatibility, and clean HTML attribute-based configuration for horizontal and inline forms.

metadata.name: mui
metadata.description: 最接近原生APP体验的高性能框架

summary.zh: mui 是一个专为移动端 HTML5 应用设计的高性能框架，有效解决了浏览器原生体验差的问题，如白屏、动画卡顿、下拉刷新不流畅等。它提供接近原生 APP 的流畅交互与丰富 UI 控件，支持与 HBuilder 开发工具深度集成，显著提升移动端 Web 应用开发效率与用户体验。
summary.en: mui is a high-performance framework for mobile HTML5 apps, addressing core issues like page flickering, poor animations, and unsmooth pull-to-refresh. It delivers near-native app experiences with rich UI components and seamless integration with HBuilder, enabling efficient development of smooth, visually appealing mobile web applications.

metadata.name: WebRPA
metadata.description: 一款功能强大的自动化工具，通过拖拽模块的方式快速构建自动化工作流，无需编写任何代码即可实现网页数据采集、表单填写、自动化测试等任务。  ⬇️⬇️ WebRPA技术交流群 ⬇️⬇️

summary.zh: Web RPA 是一款强大的可视化网页自动化工具，支持零代码拖拽构建自动化工作流，涵盖网页数据采集、表单填写、自动化测试等场景。基于 FastAPI + React 架构，集成 273 个功能模块，涵盖浏览器自动化、数据处理、数据库操作、媒体处理、PDF 转换、文档转换等全栈能力，提供智能搜索、Mermaid 流程图、变量自动补全等高效开发特性，支持非商业免费使用。
summary.en: Web RPA is a powerful visual automation tool enabling zero-code workflow creation via drag-and-drop. It supports web scraping, form filling, and testing with 273 built-in modules across browser automation, data processing, database operations, media handling, PDF conversion, and document transformation. Built on FastAPI + React, it offers smart search, Mermaid flowcharts, variable autocompletion, and full non-commercial free usage.

metadata.name: CodexBar
metadata.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.

summary.zh: CodexBar 是一款 macOS 14+ 菜单栏应用，实时显示 OpenAI Codex、Claude Code 等主流 AI 服务的令牌/额度使用情况（会话+周额度），支持多提供商独立或合并显示，无需登录即可查看窗口重置时间，提供本地成本扫描与状态监控功能。
summary.en: CodexBar is a tiny macOS 14+ menu bar app that displays token/credit usage (session + weekly) for OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini, and other AI providers without requiring login. It supports per-provider toggles, merge icons mode, local cost scanning, and real-time reset countdowns via a compact two-bar meter icon.

metadata.name: openmozi
metadata.description: 轻量级的clawdbot/openclaw，支持飞书，钉钉，QQ和企业微信

summary.zh: OpenMozi 是一个轻量级、专注国产生态的 AI 助手框架，支持 DeepSeek、豆包、通义千问等国产大模型及 OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容接口，提供统一的 Function Calling 能力。它原生集成 QQ、飞书、钉钉、企业微信等通讯平台适配器，内置 25 个工具（文件操作、浏览器自动化、定时任务等）、记忆系统、Skills 技能扩展机制，以及智能上下文压缩策略，适用于企业内部机器人和团队协作场景。
summary.en: OpenMozi is a lightweight AI assistant framework focused on the Chinese ecosystem, supporting domestic LLMs like DeepSeek, Doubao, and Qwen via unified OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible interfaces with native Function Calling. It integrates adapters for QQ, Feishu, DingTalk, and WeCom, featuring 25 built-in tools (file ops, browser automation, cron jobs), memory system, Skills extension via SKILL.md, and intelligent context compression—ideal for enterprise bots and team collaboration.

metadata.name: ydata-profiling
metadata.description: 1 Line of code data quality profiling & exploratory data analysis for Pandas and Spark DataFrames.

summary.zh: ydata-profiling 是一款极简的数据质量分析与探索性数据分析工具，支持 Pandas 和 Spark DataFrame。仅需一行代码即可生成包含缺失值、相关性、分布统计、时间序列和文本分析的完整报告，支持 HTML/JSON 导出，适用于快速数据洞察与 EDA 场景。
summary.en: ydata-profiling is a one-line data profiling and exploratory data analysis tool for Pandas and Spark DataFrames. It generates comprehensive reports with type inference, missing data analysis, correlations, distributions, time-series insights, and text analysis, exporting to HTML or JSON for rapid EDA.

metadata.name: claude-mem
metadata.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

summary.zh: Claude-Mem 是专为 Claude Code 设计的持久化记忆压缩系统，通过 AI 自动捕获、压缩编码开发会话中的关键信息，并在后续会话中智能注入相关上下文，显著提升 AI 编程助手的工作记忆效率与连续性。
summary.en: Claude-Mem is a persistent memory compression system for Claude Code that automatically captures, compresses, and injects relevant context from coding sessions using AI, enhancing Claude's working memory and session continuity.

metadata.name: electronic-wechat
metadata.description: :speech_balloon: A better WeChat on macOS and Linux. Built with Electron by Zhongyi Tong.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Electron 开发的跨平台微信客户端，支持 macOS 和 Linux，提供现代化界面和完整 Web 微信功能，包括消息撤回拦截、贴图支持、文件拖拽发送等。项目已停止维护，作为技术存档供学习参考。
summary.en: An Electron-based cross-platform WeChat client for macOS and Linux, featuring modern UI, full Web WeChat functionality, message recall blocking, sticker support, and drag-and-drop file sharing. The project is archived and no longer actively maintained.

metadata.name: http-relay
metadata.description: A lightweight HTTP relay that forwards /{absolute-url} requests with optional proxy and traffic dump.

summary.zh: http-relay 是一个轻量级 HTTP 中继工具，支持将形如 /{absolute-url} 的请求转发至目标地址，支持代理配置与流量抓包功能，适用于调试、代理转发及流量分析场景。
summary.en: http-relay is a lightweight HTTP relay tool that forwards requests in the format /{absolute-url} to target URLs, supporting proxy configuration and traffic dumping for debugging, proxying, and traffic analysis.

metadata.name: dompdf.js
metadata.description: Convert HTML to a multi-thousand-page vector PDF with a single line of frontend code

summary.zh: dompdf.js 是一个前端库，可将 HTML 转换为多页矢量 PDF，支持分页和数千页文档生成。基于 html2canvas 和 jspdf 改造，直接在浏览器中生成可编辑、非图像式的 PDF，具备高质量输出、小文件体积、无需服务端渲染等优势，适用于网页内容导出和打印场景。
summary.en: dompdf.js is a frontend library that converts HTML into multi-thousand-page vector PDFs with a single line of code. Built on html2canvas and jspdf, it generates editable, non-image PDFs directly in the browser, offering high quality, small file size, and no server-side rendering. Ideal for web content export and printing.

metadata.name: wechat-article-to-markdown
metadata.description: 微信公众号文章抓取 & Markdown 转换工具

summary.zh: 该工具利用 Camoufox 实现反检测抓取，自动提取微信公众号文章的标题、账号、发布时间及原文链接，并将 HTML 内容转换为结构清晰的 Markdown 格式，同时下载图片至本地并重写链接，支持代码块语法高亮，适用于内容归档与知识管理。
summary.en: This tool uses Camoufox for anti-detection fetching to extract WeChat Official Account articles, converting HTML content into clean Markdown with metadata (title, account, publish time, URL), downloading images locally, and preserving code blocks with language syntax. Ideal for content archiving and knowledge management.

metadata.name: openclaw
metadata.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

summary.zh: OpenClaw 是一款个人 AI 助手，支持在 WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack 等主流通讯平台运行，兼容 macOS/iOS/Android 系统，具备语音交互与实时画布渲染能力。其网关为控制平面，核心产品是本地部署的个性化助手，强调隐私、速度与持续在线体验。
summary.en: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that runs on your own devices across any OS and platform. It integrates with messaging apps like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Slack, supports voice interaction, live canvas rendering, and prioritizes local deployment for privacy, speed, and always-on personal assistance.

metadata.name: claude-code-workflow
metadata.description: Battle-tested Claude Code workflow template — memory management, context engineering, and task routing from 3 months of daily usage

summary.zh: 这是一个经过实战检验的 Claude Code 工作流模板，提供内存管理、上下文工程和任务路由三大核心能力。基于3个月多项目日常使用经验构建，采用三层架构设计：常驻规则层、按需文档层和热数据工作区，实现智能持久化开发伙伴。支持多模型分级路由、自动保存进度、强制验证完成状态，显著提升开发效率与代码质量。
summary.en: A battle-tested Claude Code workflow template featuring memory management, context engineering, and task routing from 3 months of daily usage. Implements a three-layer architecture: always-loaded rules, on-demand docs, and hot working memory. Enables persistent, self-improving development with multi-model routing, auto-save, verification gates, and cross-session task tracking for production-ready workflows.

metadata.name: cursor2api-go
metadata.description: Free claude-sonnet-4.6  | cursor不倒我不倒🙏 ❌ 不支持 tools / function calling / MCP

summary.zh: Cursor2API 是一个将 Cursor Web 转换为 OpenAI 兼容 API 的高性能服务，支持 Claude Sonnet 4.6 模型，提供完全兼容 OpenAI API 格式的接口，具备低延迟响应、安全认证、流式/非流式输出及完善的错误处理机制，可通过 Docker、系统服务或本地编译部署。
summary.en: Cursor2API is a high-performance service that converts Cursor Web into an OpenAI-compatible API, supporting Claude Sonnet 4.6.
