It offers full OpenAI API compatibility with low-latency responses, secure authentication, streaming/non-streaming support, and robust error handling, deployable via Docker, systemd, or local compilation.

metadata.name: openclaw-guard-plugin
metadata.description: 🛡️ Workspace file protection plugin for OpenClaw — guards against prompt injection attacks

summary.zh: OpenClaw Guard 插件为 OpenClaw AI 代理提供工作区文件防护，有效防御提示注入攻击。通过拦截外部会话的文件操作，自动屏蔽对身份、记忆等关键文件的读写，并将非关键写入重定向至沙箱目录，确保主会话权限隔离与系统安全。
summary.en: The OpenClaw Guard plugin protects OpenClaw AI agents from prompt injection attacks by intercepting file operations in external sessions. It blocks access to critical files like identity and memory, redirecting non-sensitive writes to a sandboxed directory, ensuring secure agent isolation and integrity.

metadata.name: openclaw-security-practice-guide
metadata.description: This guide is designed for OpenClaw itself (Agent-facing), not as a traditional human-only hardening checklist.

summary.zh: 本指南专为高权限自主AI代理OpenClaw设计，采用‘代理式零信任架构’范式，从传统静态防御转向动态防护。通过三层防御矩阵（事前行为黑名单、事中权限限制、事后夜间审计）有效应对提示注入、供应链投毒等AI特有风险，支持强推理模型自动部署，显著降低用户配置成本。
summary.en: This guide is tailored for high-privilege autonomous AI agents like OpenClaw, shifting from traditional static defense to 'Agentic Zero-Trust Architecture'. It implements a battle-tested 3-Tier Defense Matrix—pre-action blacklists, in-action permission controls, and post-action nightly audits—to mitigate LLM-specific threats like prompt injection and supply chain poisoning. Designed for seamless integration with strong reasoning models to minimize manual security setup.

metadata.name: peon-ping
metadata.description: Warcraft III Peon voice notifications (+ more!) for Claude Code, Codex, IDEs, and any AI agent. Stop babysitting your terminal. Employ a Peon today.

summary.zh: peon-ping 是一款为 AI 编程助手（如 Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf 等）提供 Warcraft III 等游戏角色语音通知的开源工具，支持多平台（macOS/Linux/Windows/WSL2）。通过语音和屏幕横幅提醒开发者任务完成或需要交互，避免终端监控中断工作流，同时支持自定义音效包和 MCP 集成。
summary.en: peon-ping is an open-source tool that delivers Warcraft III and other game character voice notifications to AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf. It alerts users via audio and on-screen banners when tasks complete or require attention, eliminating constant terminal monitoring. Supports cross-platform use, custom sound packs, and MCP integration.

summary.zh: Atlas 是专为 OpenClaw 生态设计的专业 AI 赏金猎人技能，支持自动发现 GitHub、Upwork 等平台的高回报任务，通过智能 ROI 矩阵评估收益与成本，并生成高质量代码提交。具备身份管理、止损保护及自动化交付能力，助力智能体高效完成付费任务。
summary.en: Atlas is a professional AI bounty hunter skill for the OpenClaw ecosystem, autonomously discovering high-value tasks on GitHub, Upwork, and bug bounty platforms. It uses a smart ROI matrix to evaluate profitability, manages identity as a senior developer, and delivers high-quality pull requests with test evidence, featuring built-in stop-loss protection.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo 是全球首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台，支持从小说文本自动生成分镜、角色、场景并合成完整视频。具备 AI 剧本分析、角色场景生成、分镜视频制作、AI 多角色配音及双语界面等核心功能，采用 Next.js 15 + Docker 架构，提供好莱坞标准工作流，适用于短剧与漫画视频创作。
summary.en: waoowaoo is the world's first industrial-grade AI-powered film and video production platform, enabling end-to-end creation from novel text to final video with storyboard generation, character/scene synthesis, and multi-character voiceover. Built on Next.js 15 and Docker, it offers Hollywood-standard workflows for short dramas and comic videos, featuring bilingual UI and seamless API integration.

metadata.name: qiaomu-mondo-poster-design
metadata.description: 一句话生成大师级海报、书籍封面、专辑封面和各类设计作品。无需懂PS、配色或艺术史，AI自动选择最佳风格（基于20位传奇海报设计师）。支持电影海报、读书笔记、公众号封面、小红书配图等。默认9:16竖版，完美适配社交媒体。包含AI提示词优化、风格对比、图生图转换功能。触发词："Mondo风格"、"书籍封

summary.zh: 乔木Mondo海报设计是一款AI驱动的设计工具，用户只需一句话描述需求，即可自动生成专业级海报、书籍封面、专辑封面等设计作品。基于20位传奇设计师风格库，支持多场景适配（公众号、小红书、电影海报等），内置AI提示词优化与风格对比功能，无需设计基础即可产出大师级作品。
summary.en: Qiaomu Mondo Poster Design is an AI-powered tool that generates professional posters, book covers, and album art from a single sentence. It leverages styles from 20 legendary designers, supports multiple social media formats (WeChat, Xiaohongshu), and includes AI prompt optimization and style comparison features, enabling anyone to create master-level designs without design skills.

metadata.name: SpacetimeDB
metadata.description: Development at the speed of light

summary.zh: SpacetimeDB 是一个基于 Rust 构建的分布式数据库系统，专为实时应用设计，支持边缘计算与区块链集成。它通过去中心化架构实现毫秒级数据同步，适用于游戏、物联网和去中心化应用，提供高可用性与强一致性。
summary.en: SpacetimeDB is a distributed database system built in Rust, designed for real-time applications with edge computing and blockchain integration. It enables millisecond-scale data synchronization via a decentralized architecture, ideal for gaming, IoT, and decentralized apps, offering high availability and strong consistency.

metadata.name: ClashBar
metadata.description: 基于 SwiftUI + AppKit 构建、由 mihomo 驱动的原生 macOS 菜单栏代理客户端，专注轻量、稳定与可观测。

summary.zh: ClashBar 是一款原生 macOS 菜单栏代理客户端，基于 mihomo Core，采用 SwiftUI + AppKit 构建。主打轻量化设计（37.5MB），支持配置管理、节点切换、流量策略控制、实时连接监控与系统代理集成，提供中英文双语界面，专注提升代理工具在 macOS 上的易用性与稳定性。
summary.en: ClashBar is a native macOS menu bar proxy client built with SwiftUI + AppKit, powered by mihomo Core. It emphasizes lightweight design (37.5MB), offering configuration management, node switching, traffic policy control, real-time connection monitoring, and system proxy integration. With bilingual support (zh/en), it enhances usability and stability for proxy tools on macOS.

metadata.name: impeccable
metadata.description: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

summary.zh: Impeccable 是一个专为 AI 前端设计优化的提示工程框架，基于 Anthropic 的 frontend-design 技能扩展而来。它提供 17 个精准指令和 7 个领域专项参考文件，涵盖排版、色彩、动效等设计维度，并内置反模式指南，有效规避模板化设计。支持 Cursor 等 AI 工具，显著提升生成 UI 的专业性与一致性。
summary.en: Impeccable is a prompt engineering framework that enhances AI-driven frontend design by building on Anthropic's frontend-design skill. It offers 17 precise steering commands and 7 domain-specific reference files covering typography, color, motion, and UX writing, plus curated anti-patterns to avoid generic designs. Integrated with AI coding tools like Cursor, it ensures professional, consistent UI output.

metadata.name: MiroFish
metadata.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

summary.zh: MiroFish 是一款基于多智能体技术的群体智能预测引擎，通过构建高保真数字沙盘模拟现实世界演化。用户上传种子数据（如新闻、小说）并描述预测需求，系统自动生成智能体进行社会推演，最终输出详尽预测报告，适用于舆情分析、文学创作等场景。
summary.en: MiroFish is a swarm intelligence prediction engine powered by multi-agent technology. It builds high-fidelity digital simulations from seed data (e.g., news, novels) and uses autonomous agents to simulate societal evolution. Users input natural language queries to receive detailed forecasts and interact with the simulated world, enabling applications in舆情预测, creative writing, and strategic planning.

metadata.name: marketingskills
metadata.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

summary.zh: 专为AI代理设计的营销技能集，涵盖CRO、文案撰写、SEO、数据分析和增长工程。基于Agent Skills规范构建，支持Claude Code等主流编码代理，为技术型营销人员和创始人提供自动化营销解决方案，通过标准化技能文件实现跨平台协作与知识复用。
summary.en: A collection of AI agent skills for marketing tasks including CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering. Built on the Agent Skills spec for use with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and other agents. Provides standardized workflows for technical marketers and founders to automate conversion optimization, content creation, and growth strategies.

metadata.name: CursorLens
metadata.description: Create stunning screen recordings for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

summary.zh: CursorLens 是一款免费开源的屏幕录制与编辑工具，专为创作者、开发者和团队设计。基于 OpenScreen 构建，深度优化 macOS 原生捕获流程，支持全屏/窗口录制、摄像头画中画、语音录制、时间轴剪辑、字幕生成及多比例导出，无水印且商用免费。
summary.en: CursorLens is a free, open-source screen recorder and editor built on OpenScreen, enhanced for native macOS capture and editing. It supports full-screen/app recording, camera overlay, voice input, timeline editing, subtitle generation, and multi-aspect export—all watermark-free and commercially usable.

metadata.name: skills-manager
metadata.description: A cross-platform skills manager for AI IDEs. Search marketplace, download locally, and install to Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and more with one click.

summary.zh: Skills Manager 是一款跨平台 AI IDE 技能管理工具，支持聚合搜索 Claude、Cursor、Windsurf 等10+主流AI开发环境的技能插件，一键下载至本地统一仓库并通过安全符号链接快速安装，提供版本控制、批量部署和自定义IDE支持，显著提升AI编程助手的功能扩展效率。
summary.en: Skills Manager is a cross-platform AI IDE skills management tool that aggregates search across major marketplaces (Claude Plugins, SkillsLLM, etc.), downloads skills to a unified local repository, and enables one-click installation into 10+ supported AI IDEs via secure symlinks. It features version control, bulk deployment, and custom IDE support for enhanced AI programming assistant capabilities.

metadata.name: skills-manager
metadata.description: A lightweight desktop app to manage, sync, and organize AI agent skills across 15+ coding tools — Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, and more.

summary.zh: Skills Manager 是一款轻量级桌面应用，用于统一管理、同步和组织 AI 智能体技能，支持 15+ 主流开发工具（如 Cursor、Claude Code、GitHub Copilot 等）。通过中央仓库集中管理技能，支持从 Git 仓库、本地文件或市场导入，一键同步至目标工具，并提供场景分组、更新追踪和技能文档预览功能。
summary.en: Skills Manager is a lightweight desktop app that centralizes the management, sync, and organization of AI agent skills across 15+ coding tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot. It supports importing skills from Git repos, local folders, or the marketplace into a unified repository, enables one-click sync via symlinks/copies, and offers scenario grouping, update tracking, and in-app skill documentation preview.

metadata.name: voxt
metadata.description: 🎙️Voice input and translation app for macOS. Press to talk, release to paste.

summary.zh: Voxt 是一款专为 macOS 设计的语音输入与翻译应用，支持全局热键录音、实时波形显示、多引擎语音识别（本地 MLX 和远程 ASR 服务）及文本增强翻译，具备剪贴板安全粘贴、历史记录管理和多模式触发机制，适用于跨语言实时转录与翻译场景。
summary.en: Voxt is a macOS menu bar app for voice input and translation, featuring global hotkey recording, real-time waveform display, multi-engine speech recognition (local MLX and remote ASR), text enhancement, and clipboard-safe auto-paste. It supports transcription, translation, selected-text processing, and history management with configurable providers.

metadata.name: page-agent
metadata.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

summary.zh: Page Agent 是一个基于 JavaScript 的网页内 GUI 智能体，通过自然语言控制网页界面。无需浏览器扩展、Python 或无头浏览器，直接在页面中运行。支持文本化 DOM 操作、自定义 LLM、人机交互 UI，并提供 Chrome 扩展实现跨标签页任务。适用于 SaaS AI 助手、表单自动化、无障碍访问等场景。
summary.en: Page Agent is a JavaScript-based in-page GUI agent that controls web interfaces via natural language. It runs directly in the browser without requiring extensions, Python, or headless browsers. Features text-driven DOM manipulation, customizable LLMs, human-in-the-loop UI, and optional Chrome extension for multi-tab workflows. Ideal for SaaS AI copilots, form automation, and accessibility tools.

metadata.name: ClashX
metadata.description: Clash X

summary.zh: ClashX 是一款基于 Clash 的 macOS 代理客户端，专为 macOS 15+ (Sequoia) 优化，支持 HTTP/HTTPS、SOCKS 协议及 Vmess/Shadowsocks/Trojan 等多种代理协议。提供直观的图形界面与 Surge 风格配置，集成 GeoIP 规则、Netfilter TCP 重定向等功能，适用于高级网络代理需求。
summary.en: ClashX is a rule-based proxy client for macOS built on Clash, optimized for macOS 15+ (Sequoia). It supports HTTP/HTTPS, SOCKS protocols and multiple proxy types including Vmess, Shadowsocks, and Trojan. Features intuitive UI, Surge-like configuration, GeoIP rules, Netfilter TCP redirection, and advanced scripting capabilities.

metadata.name: openhare
metadata.description: AI-powered desktop SQL client. Cross-platform. Built with Flutter.

summary.zh: openhare 是一款基于 Flutter 开发的跨平台 AI 驱动桌面 SQL 客户端，支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server、SQLite 和 Oracle 等多种数据库。其核心亮点在于集成 AI 辅助功能，可智能生成、优化和理解 SQL 查询语句，显著提升开发者和 DBA 的工作效率。
summary.en: Openhare is an AI-powered, cross-platform desktop SQL client built with Flutter, supporting multiple databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite, and Oracle. Its standout feature is integrated AI assistance for generating, optimizing, and interpreting SQL queries, enhancing productivity for developers and DBAs.

metadata.name: nginx-markdown-for-agents
metadata.description: Self-hostable NGINX module that serves Markdown to AI agents via HTTP content negotiation (Accept: text/markdown), powered by a Rust converter.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个自托管的 NGINX 模块，通过 HTTP 内容协商（Accept: text/markdown）将 HTML 页面转换为 Markdown 格式供 AI 智能体读取。基于 Rust 构建，无需修改现有应用即可为浏览器返回原始 HTML，同时为支持 Markdown 的请求提供纯净内容，降低 AI 处理成本。
summary.en: This project is a self-hostable NGINX module that converts HTML to Markdown via HTTP content negotiation (Accept: text/markdown) for AI agents, powered by a Rust converter. It serves clean Markdown only when requested while preserving original HTML for browsers, enabling seamless agent-friendly content delivery without application changes.

metadata.name: Crawler_Illegal_Cases_In_China
metadata.description: Collection of China illegal cases about web crawler 本项目用来整理所有中国大陆爬虫开发者涉诉与违规相关的新闻、资料与法律法规。致力于帮助在中国大陆工作的爬虫行业从业者了解我国相关法律，避免触碰数据合规红线。

summary.zh: 本项目系统整理中国大陆爬虫开发者违法违规案例，涵盖隐私数据抓取、商业数据侵权、验证码破解服务等场景，并解析《刑法》《网络安全法》等法律条文，为从业者提供合规指引，避免触碰数据安全与个人信息保护的法律红线。
summary.en: This project compiles Chinese web crawler violation cases involving illegal data collection, commercial infringement, and unauthorized access. It analyzes relevant laws including the Criminal Law and Cybersecurity Law to guide practitioners in avoiding legal risks related to data compliance and personal information protection.

metadata.name: seo-geo-audit
metadata.description: Professional SEO and GEO audit workflows for brands, SaaS teams, SEO operators, agencies, and AI-search growth teams.

summary.zh: SEO GEO Audit 是一个统一的审计框架，专为品牌、SaaS团队、SEO运营者、代理机构和AI搜索增长团队设计。它将技术健康度、内容质量、信任背书、外部平台可见性及AI适配性整合为可执行的决策体系，帮助判断网站是否真正具备在搜索引擎和AI驱动发现中获胜的能力。
summary.en: SEO GEO Audit is a unified audit framework for teams needing more than technical SEO checks. It evaluates whether a website is technically sound, structurally clear, trustworthy, AI-ready, externally visible, and aligned across platforms—turning fragmented findings into a prioritized executive decision system.

metadata.name: geo-seo-claude
metadata.description: GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code. Comprehensive AI search optimization for any website — citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority, schema markup, platform-specific optimization, and PDF reports.  If you want learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the skool community

summary.zh: 专为 Claude Code 设计的 GEO-first SEO 技能，提供全面的 AI 搜索引擎优化服务，包括内容可引用性评分、AI 爬虫分析、品牌权威性评估、结构化数据生成及跨平台优化，支持 PDF 报告输出，助力企业抢占 AI 流量入口。
summary.en: A GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code that delivers comprehensive AI search optimization, including citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority assessment, schema markup generation, and platform-specific tuning, with professional PDF reporting capabilities to capture high-converting AI-driven traffic.

metadata.name: CodePilot
metadata.description: A desktop GUI for Claude Code — chat, code, and manage projects visually. Built with Electron + Next.js.

summary.zh: CodePilot 是一个基于 Electron + Next.js 构建的 Claude Code 桌面 GUI 客户端，提供多模型提供商支持、MCP 扩展、自定义技能、跨平台通信及项目感知型智能助手工作区，实现可视化聊天、编码与项目管理一体化体验。
summary.en: CodePilot is a desktop GUI client for Claude Code built with Electron and Next.js, offering multi-provider support, MCP extensions, custom skills, cross-platform bridging, and an AI assistant workspace that understands your projects through persistent memory and onboarding flows.

metadata.name: boss-cli
metadata.description: A CLI for BOSS 直聘 — search jobs, view recommendations, manage applications via reverse-engineered API

summary.zh: boss-cli 是一个基于逆向工程 API 的 BOSS 直聘命令行工具，支持职位搜索、个性化推荐、申请管理、与招聘者聊天及发送问候等功能。具备多浏览器 Cookie 自动提取、丰富筛选条件、结构化输出和跨平台支持，适用于求职自动化场景。
summary.en: boss-cli is a CLI tool for BOSS Zhipin that enables job searching, recommendations, application management, and recruiter chat via reverse-engineered APIs. It supports browser cookie extraction, advanced filtering, structured output, and cross-platform usage for automated job hunting.

metadata.name: chromedp
metadata.description: A faster, simpler way to drive browsers supporting the Chrome DevTools Protocol.

summary.zh: chromedp 是一个高效的 Go 语言库，用于通过 Chrome DevTools 协议驱动浏览器，无需外部依赖。它支持无头模式运行、页面截图、自动化操作等场景，适用于网页爬虫、自动化测试和数据采集。核心优势包括高性能、简洁 API 和跨平台兼容性。
summary.en: chromedp is a high-performance Go library for driving browsers via the Chrome DevTools Protocol without external dependencies. It supports headless browsing, page screenshots, and automation tasks like web scraping and testing. Key features include fast execution, simple API, and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: actionbook
metadata.description: Browser action engine for AI agents. 10× faster, resilient by design.

summary.zh: Actionbook 是一个专为 AI 智能体设计的浏览器操作引擎，提供实时更新的网页操作手册和 DOM 结构信息，使智能体能快速、精准地执行网页交互任务。相比传统方法，其性能提升 10 倍，显著降低 LLM 的 token 消耗，并通过语义化 JSON 定义实现高容错性和跨框架兼容性。
summary.en: Actionbook is a browser action engine designed for AI agents, delivering up-to-date action manuals and DOM structure so agents can instantly operate any website without guessing. It enables 10x faster execution, 100x token savings, resilient automation via versioned manuals, and universal compatibility with any LLM or agent framework.

metadata.name: playwriter
metadata.description: Chrome extension to let agents control your browser. Runs Playwright snippets in a stateful sandbox. Available as CLI or MCP

summary.zh: Playwriter 是一款 Chrome 扩展工具，允许 AI 智能体通过 CLI 或 MCP 协议控制用户浏览器。它直接连接已登录的 Chrome 实例，保留用户会话状态（如 cookies、扩展），避免新建浏览器带来的安全风险和检测问题。核心功能包括 Playwright API 调用、多会话隔离、网络请求拦截、页面调试编辑等，适用于自动化测试、数据采集和智能体交互场景。
summary.en: Playwriter is a Chrome extension enabling AI agents to control your browser via CLI or MCP. It connects directly to your running Chrome instance, preserving logins, extensions, and cookies—avoiding the security risks and detection issues of spawning new browsers. Key features include full Playwright API access, isolated sessions, network interception, page debugging, and live code editing for automation, testing, and agent-driven workflows.

metadata.name: bb-sites
metadata.description: Community fetch recipes for bb-browser — pre-built adapters for Reddit, Twitter, GitHub, and more

summary.zh: bb-sites 是 bb-browser 的社区站点适配器集合，提供 95+ 个预置脚本，将主流平台（如 Reddit、Twitter、GitHub、YouTube、Bilibili 等）转换为 CLI 命令。无需 API 密钥或反爬绕过，直接通过浏览器环境运行，支持搜索、内容抓取、用户交互等场景，实现网页内容的命令行化访问。
summary.en: bb-sites is a community-driven collection of site adapters for bb-browser, enabling websites like Reddit, Twitter, GitHub, and YouTube to be accessed via CLI commands. With 95+ pre-built adapters across 35 platforms, it allows direct content retrieval without API keys or anti-bot workarounds, leveraging the browser's logged-in state for seamless automation.

metadata.name: conductor
metadata.description: Conductor is a Gemini CLI extension that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.

summary.zh: Conductor 是 Gemini CLI 的扩展工具，通过上下文驱动开发（Context-Driven Development）实现软件功能的规范化生命周期管理。它支持在编码前制定详细规格与执行计划，确保代码质量与团队一致性，适用于新项目和现有项目的智能开发流程管控。
summary.en: Conductor is a Gemini CLI extension enabling Context-Driven Development by managing the full lifecycle of software features—from context setup, spec/plan generation, to safe implementation. It ensures high-quality, team-aligned development with intelligent planning and git-aware reverts.

metadata.name: awesome-claude-skills
metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

summary.zh: Awesome Claude Skills 是一个精心策划的 Claude AI 技能库，涵盖文档处理、开发工具、数据分析、商业营销等十大领域。通过 Composio 插件，Claude 可连接500+应用执行真实操作（如发邮件、创建工单），实现从文本生成到自动化工作的跨越。
summary.en: Awesome Claude Skills is a curated collection of practical workflows for enhancing Claude AI across platforms. It covers document processing, development tools, data analysis, business automation, and more. With the Composio plugin, Claude can connect to 500+ apps to perform real-world actions like sending emails or creating issues, extending beyond text generation.

metadata.name: superpowers
metadata.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

summary.zh: Superpowers 是一个面向编码智能体的完整软件开发工作流框架，基于可组合的'技能'和初始指令，确保智能体高效协作。它通过自动触发技能（如需求澄清、设计评审、TDD开发计划生成、子智能体驱动开发），实现从构思到交付的无缝流程，强调 YAGNI、DRY 和测试优先原则，适用于 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 等主流 AI 编程平台。
summary.en: Superpowers is an agentic software development framework built on composable 'skills' that guide coding agents through a complete workflow—from idea refinement and design validation to TDD-driven implementation via subagent-driven development. It automates planning, branching, testing, and execution across platforms like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex, enforcing best practices like YAGNI, DRY, and red/green testing.

metadata.name: Markdown-Paste-Helper
metadata.description: 一个将本地markdown在尽可能保持格式的情况下复制到公众号、知乎、飞书、X等平台的浏览器插件

summary.zh: Markdown Paste Helper 是一款浏览器插件，可将本地 Markdown 内容一键粘贴至知乎、微信公众号、飞书、X Articles 等主流平台，自动转换为适配的富文本格式。支持预处理语法（如 GitHub alerts、任务列表）、自定义公众号主题色与代码高亮，并提供一键分发功能，实现‘一次编写，多端发布’的高效内容创作体验。
summary.en: Markdown Paste Helper is a browser extension that enables one-click pasting of Markdown content into major platforms like Zhihu, WeChat Official Accounts, Feishu, and X Articles, automatically converting it to platform-specific rich text formats. It supports preprocessing syntax (e.g., GitHub alerts, task lists), custom WeChat themes with code highlighting, and offers batch distribution across logged-in platforms for efficient multi-platform publishing.

metadata.name: TUIkit
metadata.description: A declarative, SwiftUI-like framework for building Terminal User Interfaces in Swift.

summary.zh: TUIkit 是一个 SwiftUI 风格的终端用户界面框架，提供纯 Swift 实现的声明式 TUI 开发体验。支持状态管理、布局容器、交互组件和完整样式系统，无需 ncurses 或 C 依赖，适用于 macOS 和 Linux 平台。
summary.en: TUIkit is a SwiftUI-like framework for building Terminal User Interfaces in pure Swift, offering declarative syntax with state management, layout containers, interactive components, and full styling support without ncurses or C dependencies.

metadata.name: tui-studio-desktop
metadata.description: Cross-platform desktop wrapper for TUIStudio (Wails v2 + Go)

summary.zh: TUIStudio Desktop 是基于 Wails v2（Go + WebView）构建的跨平台桌面应用，为 TUIStudio 提供原生 GUI 支持。支持 macOS (.dmg)、Windows (.exe) 和 Linux (.deb) 多平台发布，体积小巧（约8MB），通过 Go 与前端 Vite 热重载集成实现高效开发流程，适用于 TUI 界面可视化设计场景。
summary.en: TUIStudio Desktop is a cross-platform desktop wrapper for TUIStudio, built with Wails v2 (Go + WebView). It packages as lightweight installers: .dmg (~8 MB), NSIS .exe, and .deb. Features hot-reload dev workflow via Vite and Go IPC bridge, enabling native file dialogs and seamless integration for TUI design tools.

metadata.name: tui-studio
metadata.description: Visual design tool for building Terminal User Interfaces

summary.zh: TUIStudio 是一款类 Figma 的终端用户界面可视化设计工具，支持拖拽式组件编排、实时 ANSI 预览、多框架代码导出（Ink/BubbleTea/Textual 等），内置 20+ TUI 组件与丰富主题系统，提供绝对/弹性/网格布局引擎及完整撤销重做功能。
summary.en: TUIStudio is a Figma-like visual editor for designing Terminal UIs, featuring drag-and-drop components, live ANSI preview, multi-framework export (Ink/BubbleTea/Textual), 20+ built-in TUI elements, layout engines (absolute/flex/grid), and real-time theme switching with gradient support.
